In 8 days, Virginians will head to the polls for the last time in 2021.

We’ve got to make sure that when they head to the polls, they’re casting their votes for Terry and all the Democrats up and down the ballot.

If they don’t, Trumpism wins.

If we don’t turn out enough voters, Trumpism wins.

Derek, this isn’t hard. We know what we need to do to win. We need to talk to voters and turn out voters in numbers that will drown out Donald Trump’s candidates. Only then will we defeat Trumpism in Virginia.

[**Will you pitch in right now toward our one week out goal and help us turn out the voters we need? It takes resources to get ads on the air and organizers out knocking doors and making calls. We’ve got to make sure we’re giving this our all.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCS7QVA3azIiLK-1dK17lRsVjgKvw9vq2ki56GIJfHTEZEMPhMRANrX5tXmBM7cGOP8WJZ0kFYhUFuNp-gqeuH_BSuVPH-eKDynVmgahrUlR3zr8xCDRllndt0HpmhS-XWco0EXXe2P2CjpFOVf1eJ_F_AIEEY8YhFZuD90h2Pezv1EJwdCJJ7q0rQxNvt--PsEK1j7_UQPrvKsfwmrAdRAsmRLDLoo_vGCkBYEranoy24LuOzJIsqT-y4XBFFJp1FHD5BJuXL8W_tn6y9YZmewIfJ1LppUnFxs5_SMaoE4n4lJTbX_RhLLv-H2QG_w-mA/3gh/ZtWel79yTfy7V0YUHnDpwg/h1/8izU1ZY6CntVTeFvant8q6okLnaBXDDP4dHSCa5tq2c) **[ Donate $15 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCS7QVA3azIiLK-1dK17lRscubguuTLLMlD6kyM7xFopGjRxJfjIRl1f0WPMU5-tRF6JJHUdxplA_EI6zWoErjI8-FuYG9YoRbuANDHAlMFA4ouYW2Oy83FbUEdQZ6o5yuzTV6K89CSIC5g58p9WNahVt2iEiqTf9TEp56pj2_zFeCpW-rzptEw9nEqwmSOtAnMqDynos5sVUK_qWi4xBq-uQvsj40RUpiY9txn2tGIV9wVG90D_4n1JA9va6gxfw7UnEB8h9eDYWfe32aY3AalXSgBX9K2n2giR-Qnc45-b209lm8WhrpmFlZeMMGZ0GGYTL1h4LuALx1heOXDYIHA/3gh/ZtWel79yTfy7V0YUHnDpwg/h2/tMVdllGL2rxmq_9gzkG-cBaVF3kXEnxz9Jmfuj4-oPQ)

name: PRESIDENT OBAMA ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: President Obama just broke his silence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | This is an all-hands-on-deck moment.

President Obama knows that the Virginia governor's race is one of the BIGGEST tests for Democrats nationwide since President Biden took office.

**So with just eight days left before Election Day, and Trump 's endorsed Republican candidate SURGING in the polls, President Obama is breaking his silence and calling us to action!**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZ9m~)

President Obama is absolutely right.

**Because if Democrats lose in Virginia, we know Republicans everywhere will take it as a sign that our House Majority is up for grabs.**

We simply can't afford to let that happen.

_**NOT** while Republicans attack our right to vote nationwide.

**NOT** while reproductive rights are under threat like never before.

**A****nd NOT** while Donald Trump and his fringe, conspiracist cronies continue to control the GOP._

**It 's on us to send a POWERFUL message that no matter what happens in Virginia, our House Democrats are ready to take Trump's right-wing House Republicans head on.**

****[So we're calling on 1,000 grassroots Democrats all across the country to answer President Obama's call and help us PROVE that our House Majority is here to stay -- in Virginia and across the country. Can you chip in $3 before midnight to protect our House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)****
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw2gErh_)
---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45835127&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjcwNDQ4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45835127&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjcwNDQ4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Eli Bremer
subject: Censorship
body:
We have to fight it
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cikklyk-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cikklyk-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | It’s no secret; the radical left wants to censor your speech.
From the mainstream media to big tech censorship, the increasing/increased level of control and censorship is NOT OKAY.
[**_I am ready to stand up and fight for common sense solutions. Are you with me? _**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cikklyk-ykykmujid-t/)

[**_I’m a fighter. That’s why I’m running. Join me if you are concerned and want to push back. Can you contribute $5 to show your support?_**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cikklyk-ykykmujid-i/)

subject: New Study Proves DeWine’s Waste-A-Million is a FLOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | Friend,

Another study proves what Buckeyes already know: DeWine’s vaccine lottery was a flop. That’s why I wanted to make sure you read my last email.

DeWine announced the lottery in May and by mid-summer vaccination rates fell to new lows. But by then it was too late, millions of your tax dollars had already been wasted.

Now DeWine is bringing the lottery back for round 2. Don’t forget, the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results.

DeWine isn’t governing Ohio. He’s gambling on its future.

FWD: DeWine’s Waste-A-Million is BACK

Friend,

Mike DeWine is back at it – wasting YOUR money to fund another vaccine incentive lottery.

Even after DeWine’s first “Vax-a-Million” FAILED to raise vaccination rates in Ohio and WASTED hardworking Ohioan’s tax dollars, Mike DeWine has announced another vaccine incentive lottery is on its way.

Ohioans aren’t falling for DeWine’s distractions. DeWine’s weak and crooked leadership has led to a failing economy, rampant crime, and endless shutdowns.

Mike DeWine’s Waste-A-Million lottery was a complete failure – just like his time as Governor.

Ohio doesn’t need another failed vaccination lottery to waste their money away. We need a true conservative leader to clean up the mess DeWine’s made of Ohio. Will you stand with me?

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Have you heard what Democrats are saying about Georgia?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Fellow American. Democrats certainly know it |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1a9959056a7c411e81dec16467e1293d&_e=GS7X2MxeqXYiEVfiEDhR16-f21rR7EYFKWw9i3KcqvL5DvLyrf016SI9xyAb20lpr6zVmj27K8nZ-Q6LAso4t14-OU-__AHvW-1j9WwbnPxWPijOxxk-eLhwzNcW8GlaI559OfvgEZgC2FtaslhiB3YjhTnXXgRFgMXjvSIAb5ouyG15abDTe1u9hjcp1urwWuYtPhohIX1iMm0P-G50kzLXmeg-VtSp-9YXzVzuY8rTMBsMxAz09KRTohHtNRKl9ytuz42stJR6_ldMlr6WrnrY9QWDEXKT7NyLNXi7rTInTs64OqCyxN8UjnKs2S0Iy0krhwx26Jnx5_qMqtNINfZhXdKTjAd4IjtBE9BU92oAHNhww0OUafRyBKaD66yO_xGPFXMUiGrvV-CRXSx3zL1pnRNm7bPB2hqPED_qLT6otfyFT0y7Jduo27vOLmlYEULZjdj50Kyrq2wtywT74Q%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I've been incredibly blessed in life. A career as a professional athlete has allowed me to enter the race for United States Senate with a little bit of name recognition in Georgia.

But I'm not running for office to grow my name recognition. I'm running because I love America, have lived the American Dream, and see the need to protect that dream for others.

Too often I find myself asking, _**"How much longer is the American Dream going to be available to us if national leaders continue to take our country down the wrong path?"**_

The eyes of the nation are once again turning to Georgia. Control of the U.S. Senate depends on who wins in Georgia next year.

But don't take our word for it. Here are a few things the Democrats are saying about the Georgia Senate race in their emails:

**"All hands-on deck moment"
"Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake Senate control"
"The second most expensive Senate race ever"**
Facts are facts. **The Georgia Senate runoff elections, which gave control of the Senate to the Democrats earlier this year, were the first and second most expensive races in Senate history.** That's why we're preparing now for everything the Democrats will throw at us next year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1a9959056a7c411e81dec16467e1293d&_e=GS7X2MxeqXYiEVfiEDhR16-f21rR7EYFKWw9i3KcqvL5DvLyrf016SI9xyAb20lpr6zVmj27K8nZ-Q6LAso4t14-OU-__AHvW-1j9WwbnPxWPijOxxk-eLhwzNcW8GlaI559OfvgEZgC2FtaslhiB3YjhTnXXgRFgMXjvSIAb5ouyG15abDTe1u9hjcp1urwWuYtPhohIX1iMm0P-G50kzLXmeg-VtSp-9YXzVzuY8rTMBsMxAz09KRTohHtNRKlIB7-Wofzu-Nv5Ofh-EENRO2j0zsDqIJOwdGAY5d8lZpgNlsUqPpJaCRTNPXtk2rQ6N448Kir6Y02Y0ix7yk7Gw-xeyu7FP84ApWwiegTqMmFC4jWhYq8Z2QvEaS0sm8pqR49AHx8BEvmu7zNI_6PkNs-XWpCnsMNZbvhXyFBGOEyQXOTJsTnFW1krKjwRXUQ2eGSFcp_95qfRgiPuLHtbQ%3D%3D)
Fellow American - sometimes, when driving along the freeway, I look from one side to the other and wonder if folks know just how important this race is to the entire country. **It's easy to go about our daily lives without thinking about politics. But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - _will_ decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. **

You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't _talk_ like a politician, _look_ like a politician, or even _dress_ like a politician.

**I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate.[We've got to do a better job of explaining to people why their lives are better when conservatives are in charge.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1a9959056a7c411e81dec16467e1293d&_e=GS7X2MxeqXYiEVfiEDhR16-f21rR7EYFKWw9i3KcqvL5DvLyrf016SI9xyAb20lpr6zVmj27K8nZ-Q6LAso4t14-OU-__AHvW-1j9WwbnPxWPijOxxk-eLhwzNcW8GlaI559OfvgEZgC2FtaslhiB3YjhTnXXgRFgMXjvSIAb5ouyG15abDTe1u9hjcp1urwWuYtPhohIX1iMm0P-G50kzLXmeg-VtSp-9YXzVzuY8rTMBsMxAz09KRTohHtNRKlWqJ-9Q8uXSIdLmZZ5UTZFN6ZjHSxdVrhMPQTgeAQTJsADHNJNcUfJ4z0XpwmS2iR8xSTGMHRgJkHAyB6BQKFZ23HMi6iZI3EViJb2YlpTLTYfj3v-3T0qAFNoMgWbH__-4pgP0jtvBtWkixPPYqwI_LvH2oKMJPE3yB3JXMvuHOT9oyX-_-4H3xToHlwhrcMSHyZs6-0zw8lNndAAcKtLg%3D%3D)**

Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority:

**"Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue"

"If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future."

"CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red."**
We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. **[Your donation will allow our team to reach Georgia voters- including some new ones we hope to attract - and lay the groundwork for why our campaign will help keep the American Dream alive.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1a9959056a7c411e81dec16467e1293d&_e=GS7X2MxeqXYiEVfiEDhR16-f21rR7EYFKWw9i3KcqvL5DvLyrf016SI9xyAb20lpr6zVmj27K8nZ-Q6LAso4t14-OU-__AHvW-1j9WwbnPxWPijOxxk-eLhwzNcW8GlaI559OfvgEZgC2FtaslhiB3YjhTnXXgRFgMXjvSIAb5ouyG15abDTe1u9hjcp1urwWuYtPhohIX1iMm0P-G50kzLXmeg-VtSp-9YXzVzuY8rTMBsMxAz09KRTohHtNRKly3aO30jhDIvtujZYfyw9cEfqjrezib4h6j2_wJ3eBWOdmpKYP08M1AE97vfC0CACKWMFCyul0yRtUaKbeNM5ynFm4xlUUex_Y0VDuwjpQI1s0v4yFfkBy0hMFEQqH4F-jRHgxRhDOqF_n_SPJQZmv-YsBmb6_B54-GjpcUyLWJaF7X6rdMrStVrgR0eeaCW6Eert3nz1Jmr3h1v5woMF7A%3D%3D)**

We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1a9959056a7c411e81dec16467e1293d&_e=GS7X2MxeqXYiEVfiEDhR16-f21rR7EYFKWw9i3KcqvL5DvLyrf016SI9xyAb20lpr6zVmj27K8nZ-Q6LAso4t14-OU-__AHvW-1j9WwbnPxWPijOxxk-eLhwzNcW8GlaI559OfvgEZgC2FtaslhiB3YjhTnXXgRFgMXjvSIAb5ouyG15abDTe1u9hjcp1urwWuYtPhohIX1iMm0P-G50kzLXmeg-VtSp-9YXzVzuY8rTMBsMxAz09KRTohHtNRKltYPCxZqLifGlqyKnYddKmp0k_P1EbnMpBDzR8Mhd0JlWTg0DE6D61_oiyh58N3UOmBbJ0ZZ037y_Ytrg8I5vgMIs7NmfXo4jNFWwnbm-LhiZELzw_pvv4WLQPVBmqu3ARfp92DVj46Hhqsmi8zgKcxVoHj5AT6MO0UEy7VlXR3m7zZnBAO1BKE9Sek-ceRbvckOT63s-bOrc5VXDRLGsNA%3D%3D)
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Fellow American. Democrats certainly know it to be true.

I hope you do, too.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1a9959056a7c411e81dec16467e1293d&_e=GS7X2MxeqXYiEVfiEDhR16-f21rR7EYFKWw9i3KcqvL5DvLyrf016SI9xyAb20lpr6zVmj27K8nZ-Q6LAso4t14-OU-__AHvW-1j9WwbnPxWPijOxxk-eLhwzNcW8GlaI559OfvgEZgC2FtaslhiB3YjhTnXXgRFgMXjvSIAb5ouyG15abDTe1u9hjcp1urwWuYtPhohIX1iMm0P-G50kzLXmeg-VtSp-9YXzVzuY8rTMBsMxAz09KRTohHtNRKlE-88F70gJF5rN_GHFQnRX7KZB5QGv7_WUC7XzhrSU3T2mQrA4dmuHjhCRDpbddjcsUQVejXMm8thJibwa2veRzcFOBbV95V59Xh7PVxieS_pl9uALtboM4wz1ZvqhdalkiRN9LxrJuMBd6NC6UmTWYKDVWAJ85uOZyPNL2BUIz-yrl8zkodiiSFE_n2kPVbxSq0r8rhsFYNaJ5XTydkijg%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

| [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_25_21_roundup_v3&n=14 "FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU") [FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_25_21_roundup_v3&n=14)

* * *
**WisGOP Milwaukee Office Grand Reopening**
The WisGOP hosted a grand reopening of our Milwaukee office featuring remarks from Senator Tim Scott and joined by Senator Ron Johnson! You can read more about the event in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouNBHja3sfdY8_xeAgIvnS9TUR50HuAhheIQ5M2XGX3DtR1_thWWLYyH8_Jfyk-DZ5Fr_SQg2zt_dmn1AIRyQfFq5aIkW-Z3IAwlxuinREAMYMgCZ9ngu-b1u-9SWhNQTpQtpRyadFIOBw0qEAOxsQm82ks5KhoBz0accIuN9QTnmimrd2WoB9222ncNgOAsGqo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_25_21_roundup_v3&n=15).

Candidates and elected officials like Senator Johnson joined over 200 enthusiastic conservatives at the Waukesha County GOP's Annual "Grazing with the Elephants" event.
**Door County GOP Meet & Greet**
Elected officials and statewide candidates met with members of the Door County GOP to share about their platforms and vision for Wisconsin.
**Green County Pints & Politics**
Green County Republicans gathered over beverages and conservative ideas just outside of New Glarus.
**Waupaca County GOP Candidate Training**
WisGOP Grassroots Director Leslie Hubert spoke to Waupaca County Republicans about the nuts and bolts of running for local office.
**Manitowoc County GOP CRT Event**
Manitowoc County Republicans heard from Wisconsin Institute of Law and Liberty Deputy Counsel Dan Lennington about the key legal issues and legal strategies for removing harmful Critical Race Theory from our schools.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: What they’re saying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkmHNvIf45AK4m2XwhmN597u3zq9c6LNFflew2OSx8V0UanAPLIlkzinEeHRwmyfvb0MtDI8JMa3CKjRGM51x7VjxNwKjEIt4wtMgrJdLzA2deBswIP74mcnC2ZYdrYjiKYb3h5IZv9Wj-_RS2I6blk_Qg-gPokC5-dPAoo3DwvQlq6BSCe4tM63OeSTyNNE8sFLEAzawy2hQwQ-EaJnudjpw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I've been incredibly blessed in life. A career as a professional athlete has allowed me to enter the race for United States Senate with a little bit of name recognition in Georgia.

But I'm not running for office to grow my name recognition. I'm running because I love America, have lived the American Dream, and see the need to protect that dream for others.

Too often I find myself asking, _**"How much longer is the American Dream going to be available to us if national leaders continue to take our country down the wrong path?"**_

The eyes of the nation are once again turning to Georgia. Control of the U.S. Senate depends on who wins in Georgia next year.

But don't take our word for it. Here are a few things the Democrats are saying about the Georgia Senate race in their emails:

**"All hands-on deck moment"
"Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake Senate control"
"The second most expensive Senate race ever"**
Facts are facts. **The Georgia Senate runoff elections, which gave control of the Senate to the Democrats earlier this year, were the first and second most expensive races in Senate history.** That's why we're preparing now for everything the Democrats will throw at us next year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkmOEVSmyzJWavzJxhzijnotNhFihlsIyvW4siTJQKmKWq8gtJBQ_D1wR84iA8kQJlbS3FtR-wlVqksKy77n7jC2_8qKCClgfC8HTyYPGV6bNLG-pq1P_sh09wUJCMl8vn50G0DWzjrEaGvBCOr6SmF3YCaAwTDOEkKs9n4TWerryAOJMnU2NwA-omlokRfIq3QrdkX5XdyifhR0zmFdfj5yQ%3D%3D)
Peter - sometimes, when driving along the freeway, I look from one side to the other and wonder if folks know just how important this race is to the entire country. **It's easy to go about our daily lives without thinking about politics. But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - _will_ decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. **

You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't _talk_ like a politician, _look_ like a politician, or even _dress_ like a politician.

**I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate.[We've got to do a better job of explaining to people why their lives are better when conservatives are in charge.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkmw8-S5J7a-z60JMFtyHxvE72ayVVqfCkhJlKzCW9HzksIPcwVlCeJpv-6oiXt1z8q2rAB-F-bcxRIyFhWn3Odfe-w-0IkgaDQJgEzIrse6bG8b7PBc_WyCNyxZGTmELDxMV6OrXO8KJuR39C57JMv_xZhzmCII5IIBgSb0LPVmYisRNJYQm6ziC0IYxyy3itiYh9MkAzSf2zgRBoVNIaVLA%3D%3D)**

Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority:

**"Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue"

"If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future."

"CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red."**
We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. **[Your donation will allow our team to reach Georgia voters- including some new ones we hope to attract - and lay the groundwork for why our campaign will help keep the American Dream alive.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkmwMH4wN7N3chjOs0u5UxBJfK9t1z74ldNS1P1AraNNrTtiTyb3zfdxUvZMpGkvREyPU41D7Ux3Od06TnywuoSMq7irEqlwEhN5YM7q6a_lMdQNeVos3F09BYWkxwHSGqJ7EeTB4MY0A_q2H05YQOFzAVP6dxecMj_GuIBqt_yeF23XnVuhkgLhjXfKNUIQWyi1YXgVi9J2gcxZXMcSblKnw%3D%3D)**

We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkmNMCNkXU04S6fwCZo1z7nIib8xr_s_mgbGOpLRHcBzlkoetSYX7FgbbI-rPifmAMQsM-m89z3FELfOESSjTnOrTFQ5uw-ka1ufz_eRTCwlgKWk7kW4PRX-i91UIg-tdSQvaEzucI9DV5n37tykksjMcoItFXwSawz0FdTQmCQKdBpgVMlsPgmKzvtQ8Shrg1fAxSBlrKbKfiQjCKuN2u-Mg%3D%3D)
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it to be true.

I hope you do, too.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkm0b1Thy8voBteMyMCrHMsWj3RpLiW-_pb58qNbEya96oS8G2vvdvVeBaMLSxhn6fquq60rpfhRyhIH3sGbApp4WaZPBL26RS8s3eND6tPXqwrXiMfdkw2WpBaj8sB7Tegy_oKwb1MBGA4jQh1wET6zj10S0HmYWVDNGHAq8MbTjLFPiXJocOfdVG3xLoPgx8_R9yFsOkY9W_2SmRN07OO_Q%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW0CMLfXC4JHbFOq3uUA3FJ-8SQgljFqXbzZ4bPze6IHGKmmygqBxcfpLTgI4bWpQhZXLPRZWb8qtP3FxebxUqmRnpZ5tTrB4Vr5FZHuJ-87YEqDCZXHacA4ZM_olJZ6jr5mZxdF_Lw7Ln14cxO7xOS2egdGiYkYLrp8xGEiYDXbbFlTmaE_d5PYQzyefL8pjdbbibNg2Guqjly3pjcsHli88fhghF0FZgqXFfnYlKtkmYL2P94RFragIJp-F2mhc-kYiJViX8Zf_-gyr7OzR4J5WJxYMXVBb0Q93eM6NoTnVLDTdGSK9J59uqFTBMAF2HD8NTVebWctfOypH8or8nHKhDGbk2eMfijianMMTnaqXYEgLD8cVrqog1oL0Wm7E14nunVA5oa6aZWkDZ6_RhXu35CRaS780tt8_W7njVAqcFFNYNzd1XlPEPXQj6NpW8A%3D%3D)

* * *

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW75shUNYzj1ealg2O5jUd2B6sH3j-6IYlQbRdejlo1X46WFyIXAJkGiifUpezGs6t--kl9idl-GNs4bE_INIVtsSeV-kGDlMR24orNKk88LOGS3rZpPuwMWd8_UY3nnW_AdkLfvTcjB6vlWbeVayu_j1uINDiO8u6w0gmAtLXL5Ncjs8ke9PAehajMT3YFrvdMtoZAi91sJcK9wDRHHxUEqleL6SrOjEnBFgsFOWnH4IYB6XcRHTIO5dsB4lYMvLVw%3D%3D) [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW7BFGuTfgG_XQ3JVZsyzhxHVv9Lqma7PvrPKDilAsZwg92r8VVpn5oL-I-GqXre8vCVrdEffnkwEkqe8cnuv8RIHNYwT2BNQw7QZY4dSmgo4XkRMIyiXBRXk0egT9EJZynXLw_MrxngWDlRpH7KmDHYsZy0S7Si2ttVYQV5V56teGSl1k1TApYkAz16OQkTbxdlulfZr5QRbCkY_5QyW4HU3xdy-B6nyDUdUC1bTo-QjbIsMiaaFcPnwLHe7qoqaag%3D%3D) [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW6m9_7qesPJfAGoKGR7calbYX6bOa-Hsna0RNLIt6pOMwVq7NGDEmk-VuCtFEYwX8poIDarEcmkmSjb-O057Jk_XeaHPnIb4dFjt6ptaZTVcr935O78b-MZKLJsd4NuMqYGvR6IxRwUf2xZMlnanjkV1x85JYVKtkXjcJAnmJEuSn-GssQDIZFj2M_dUS_3L1k9JOM0Mu91SbWARPKFcgvVO7AAXnUO56-Iep80f4lvVjUuT0HW4a_Q7CFkDlb7qUSjKD9tDQ48sA9-i4wllUyo%3D) [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eaaa0ce7871846e6a51cf450fafbc93a&_e=dKVCq_GiZ3JXUz8_8KMOW1SZv5bIvKBGs-5qeVxJCmLdPxDo1f40UcZ-Me_FK8bAETcKPb-D6XAbGm84BUAEVNGKq_ABjJM0YxrVEO6sfkSw_Mnl6-tqoOGNDK1NRFPvDl_mev8u6ocr4ctwAU6C6wFEuGjBVfIrkZyDPKLWR21-1EEGdJOzLCxZ-UH3pwHQz82pxIAhAY9Q0TFJ52r6TiQMmCx_Ye1vEY8cA0yjH-M4WmTFVsLRkA3NzmRAxEcCbGjd79kT0zG0aaUmST_ITA%3D%3D)

Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority: "Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue" "If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future." "CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red." We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year. Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it to be true. I hope you do, too. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate * | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team Moore
subject: Thank you for joining!
body:
| | Thank you so much for joining Wes Moore in building a stronger future for Maryland. **We have one more favor to ask: Wes's campaign is powered by people like YOU. He needs a powerful surge of grassroots support to keep going. ** **[Will you forward this email to 3 friends and ask them to show their support for Wes's campaign, too?>>](https://secure.ngpvan.com/0w89-xw-3UGRF7-77Fbh2Q2)** Thank you! Team Moore
---

---

Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. And we need your help to do it. | | [**DONATE**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wesmoore-email?refcode=footer&amount=25)
---
Making your gift monthly will maximize the resources to help Wes bring change to Maryland. Make your donation monthly right now!
| [**DONATE MONTHLY**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wesmoore-email?refcode=footer_recur&amount=25&recurring=auto)
---
It’s supporters like you who fuel Wes’ campaign and we’re so thankful for your support.

We’re committed to ensuring your contact information is up to date and accurate. If you are not at , please update your preferred name and email [_**here**_](https://secure.ngpvan.com/8SR1iQFGv02nGTjRTSWiAA2).

| | BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, LISSA MUSCATINE, TREASURER.
---

Please read the message below from our sponsor, 4Patriots.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkUuSrSAQRFdz79DgDw4cdEf33QeIICooiB9Y_bPnL6IiR5VZGad0pwzBSLxdhwCCECD2CKesgY34BZy3n59fCr-4-CYvAqQfkutl2GRObs1auqU0YcjvsesZ7anGrGVEtS2FoqVMQtkroCSkgLx9h1vAGKbgvXRjztsLf73Q55mcZD83_83uV_-3gz93Xl74x587O2Z9HSgNJgFp4oFmvfYeQnvfysewbqVG68Vsp8mlverT-SWCyxVTHx8xmhWR5iKEKUmXtkz9vtoD4TqvNyr5DrEuINLe6GVFmR-G3DyZ9eT7hCeJ7zrgwZZdAlPlMYZTaudSn5Bx9UIOaNxDiZAcrmkMwstdiucYIYokE8dMK4kEimThFZkU9Czo4TZZp5Qed20XKMLmw3IJnuyJ8ISZUic8aVnDMNpL3SpHzOOd5VFPIbbphdjgxofNXL0Ie57YlvzE1VifxucZyh45VtKO79Tp7XLL4nbGn19a_xD-A_zO3d0kONMeNBC3W-MPOIyh8TmZfW1slk-5hpYKfWM40bgJx_4PG1zDRg). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

| | Derek,

In August, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.

Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.

**_Derek, Youngkin climbed in the polls. Then the experts at The Cook Political Report moved the race to a toss-up. And right now? Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

That’s really bad news because this election is almost over — we only have one week to turn things around.

Here’s the good news: we have a plan.

[**We need to continue to build our historic grassroots field operation, but — we can’t do that if we don’t have the funds. Will you chip in any amount to my campaign’s Early Voting Fund so we can get our voters out to the polls? The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout.

With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to **every single corner of Virginia** , get mailers in **every single Virginia mailbox** , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.

**Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their turnout operation, I’m going to need your help right now.**

[**So, will you help me out today? Your contribution will go directly toward funding the biggest grassroots mobilization effort Virginia has ever seen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37938044/313262169/-2023814932?refcode=20211026.2_TM_10HN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzJjZDI0ZC0zZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVgAg0hiaixjJ5uWKFvd2sltS9VobF2gn2UeLy4ukGY=)

clean_body: But we have a plan | | | = | | Derek, In August, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin. Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having. Derek, Youngkin climbed in the polls. Then the experts at The Cook Political Report moved the race to a toss-up. And right now? Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH. That’s really bad news because this election is almost over — we only have one week to turn things around. Here’s the good news: we have a plan. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout. With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to every single corner of Virginia , get mailers in every single Virginia mailbox , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote. Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their turnout operation, I’m going to need your help right now. = Thanks for being on my team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfiq4jmffsb5g970g90r38n77fvjmf7aapmo9va8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gm4pb4c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5b7lcnr4uv4156agm607b619vg5fjd83nusnbr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gm4pb4c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zahfc949ppkh1q43pnfqu7d7p077tr7o2tntp1t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gm4pb4c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: The Clintons want control of Virginia BADLY (Read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 7 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58612866:6b-K232Nu:m:1:3298722022:F52875C650D100F1CCDE9DDF1D6B4775:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58612866:6b-K232Nu:m:1:3298722022:F52875C650D100F1CCDE9DDF1D6B4775:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58612866:6b-K232Nu:m:1:3298722022:F52875C650D100F1CCDE9DDF1D6B4775:r "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

body:

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeimr1be45e752rkg1hm3dke7bre6eks7ignc1i0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gm6o36clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. subject: Support Voter ID
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, will you stand with me in supporting voter ID laws?
Peter, When it comes to our elections it should be easy to vote and hard to cheat. My belief in voter ID is simple: we need free but fair elections where every American's right to vote is respected and secured.**_This is why I support voter ID laws._ The security of our elections should be of the utmost importance and we should take steps to increase security.**The Democrats are going to do everything they can to stop voter ID laws and other parts of our conservative agenda. We need to make sure we win in 2022 but to do that we need your help.[**Will you stand with us in supporting voter ID? Every donation helps give us momentum into 2022. | Friends, An invitation and an update on my campaign. First, if you're anywhere near Will County, **let's get together at Skooters in Shorewood this Saturday,****October 30th** and join the Will County Young Republicans for an "E.I. Q&A;" with me, Bobby Piton for U.S. Senate and Scott Greene, for Illinois' House, District 86. We'll have a special screening of the Deep Rig Movie and lots more. We've been hosting these events all around the state. It's going to be a great time so BRING FRIENDS! Register here: **[https://secure.anedot.com/piton-for-us-senate/willcounty](https://tan434.keap-link001.com/api/v1/click/5179445179449344/6621432667570176)** Maybe you've noticed, Tammy Duckworth isn't campaigning. She doesn't think she has to. She's in for a big surprise! Here's the latest on my campaign for U.S. Senate, just this past week:
* I was with the great folks of Boone County, IL and here's a passionate [snippet of my speech](https://tan434.keap-link001.com/api/v1/click/6436130514665472/6621432667570176) there.
* Next, I was in Utah at the We Can Act Convention with Gen Michael Flynn and other patriot influencers.
* While there, I had a Zoom call into the Illinois Conservative Union's Strategy Conference. Ethan from my campaign spent the day there and said it was a great event! (Watch for photos and videos soon!)
* I returned to Illinois in time to attend the Polish Heritage Banquet in Schiller Park. My parents had the largest family to ever be freed from Communist Poland and I'm working to keep us free, here in America.

People all around the country want me to win this Senate seat. Getting support from YOU can help secure this win. Here's where you can **[help with any amount, small or large: Click Here](https://tan434.keap-link001.com/api/v1/click/6234849959346176/6621432667570176).** If you want to unsubscribe, **[you can unsubscribe here](mailto:info@bobbypiton.com) **by sending a blank email. Instead, I hope you'll email me, wanting to get involved in the fight for freedom and security. This is OUR country. It doesn't belong to the elitists, globalists and our enemies, who'll do anything to try to take it from us. Let's not let that happen on our watch!

| | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. | | | **Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target – banning Christianity _and the Bible._
“This is about control, not public health,” he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ******_Urgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy – the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the “most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America.” I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ro02dtml2mdkkajstcg11b6tfop619lrv6lbmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs)_**_[.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zih64ma6vmqfj0malq94ahq6716j3mci089fng68_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and
prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkg5f1vf494nm8bet4q4b8huvvtoi3s0qqek0di8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zss0amdccf2obg5bia6qbnb6bg613a3cmcbrjcl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk5l023rclthbg6puc4vo1gfbtb9mfh5sisdlk3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5rg8ppfhjol4g403u4ifbsvvlm9usv7mksb16ug_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs)_[.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zroku4d73am5clelrh4md51u94bu4t1t61d0086g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5t0nfgrh1k3j8pg031khmtt5retd9u1eeti0lfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs)_**[!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdo7fgm7f7o9nq1295prj030fa2jtnmh16616940_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9gmeo76clh2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. subject: no time to waste
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Oliver for Congress
body:
| Hi , I'm Brittany Oliver, and I'm running for Congress in MD-02 because Congress needs more progressive, young Black women who will fight for the working class. **[I need to raise $11,750 in the next 24 hours to start hiring staff and running ads for my campaign ASAP. There's no time to waste, so please donate NOW to launch my campaign towards victory >> ](http://clicksp.brittanyformaryland.com/f/a/3WHKJmCVyhDje1s2ghqR-w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjWje-P0RMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyaXR0YW55LWVtP3JlZmNvZGU9VFItd2Vic2lnbnVwJmFtb3VudD0zMVcDc3BjQgphd76yd2EiI284UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAARg~~)**
---

---
Let me introduce myself:
* I'm a Baltimore native, raised by my mom and grandma.
* I have spent my career advocating for and uplifting Black women.
* _And if elected, I would be the youngest Black woman serving in Congress._

**[Most importantly, I am ready to hit the ground running to fight for working class families in Congress as hard as I can. ](http://clicksp.brittanyformaryland.com/f/a/3WHKJmCVyhDje1s2ghqR-w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjWje-P0RMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyaXR0YW55LWVtP3JlZmNvZGU9VFItd2Vic2lnbnVwJmFtb3VudD0zMVcDc3BjQgphd76yd2EiI284UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAARg~~)** MD-02 deserves a Congresswoman who knows what they're going through and will be a fierce advocate for progressive reform on today's urgent issues. The time for change is now, and I am done waiting. What about you? **[This race won't be easy, so I need to raise $11,750 in the next 24 hours to start hiring staff and running ads. name: American Update
subject: To Any American Who Owns a Cell Phone
body:
If you own a cell phone, then mobile service providers hope you never get to see this video that could soon go viral. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8958%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4%2fIaENDyaLWKafikogb%2fPg&sysid=1)
| **Editor's Note: **Below is an important message from our colleague and legendary geotech investor David Forest. He has an exceptional track record in discovering new technologies. And he uncovered an unusual development in the 5G space. We urge you to see Dave’s message.
* * *
**To Any American Who Owns a Cell Phone** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16097%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4T7gOC3Frmhl7GdS%2fxOQnQ&sysid=1) If you own a cell phone, then mobile service providers hope you never get to see this video that could soon go viral. It was shot in downtown Denver by a multi-millionaire, who exposed sensitive truths about mobile phones and 5G. His experiment could strike a bad chord with mobile phone companies. But you’ve got to see what this man discovered and what it means for phone users in the weeks ahead. | | [ Watch Video Now ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16098%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aP6z3s6ndJUDC5NBpnBKKQ&sysid=1)

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Let's Eliminate The State Income Tax In Georgia!
body:
Georgians Deserve More Money & More Jobs!
| | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| Donate Now!
---
| It's time for Georgia to eliminate state income taxes. We are sandwiched between Tennessee and Florida; neither have state income taxes.
Georgia is the fly-over state for businesses. Let's get competitive. It's time for Georgians to keep more $$$ in their pockets and create more jobs!
No community will be left behind; this includes small towns and rural Georgia. As Governor, I will seek to dramatically reduce, if not fully eliminate state income tax.
I need your help to do this! My campaign is fueled by grassroots Patriots like yourself. Please donate to help me Take Georgia Back.

---

Folks,

**As the national debt goes up, Joe Biden’s poll numbers go down like a big fella on a seesaw.**

It comes as no surprise. I can’t imagine too many people would be happy with me if I forced vaccine mandates on people, left Americans behind in Afghanistan, or opened our borders to everyone and their cousin Vinny.

You can’t fix stupid...but what you can do is vote it out of office and keep those with common sense in.

**[Help me out this next election cycle and vote stupid out of office, who ever that might be for you.> >](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4tkc7fuohsrr5aoo0tl90cmo3herq42i4a0ps40_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9imcoj4chh2bs)**

I’m not saying I’m the smartest person in the room, because I’m not. But unlike a lot of the folks here in Washington, I don’t pretend to be something I’m not.

**[With your support, I promise I’ll keep working day and night on passing America-first, pro-Freedom and pro-family Legislation in the U.S. Senate.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z47ik4ebs92f5a9sghohnq4678vao2bt1ecpo5g0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9imcoj4chh2bs)**

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Here’s what isn’t helping the economy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We need to bring sanity back to Washington. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/89cd2d0d019961bd/31cf6baa410edfb3c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Things are only getting worse under the Biden Administration. Gas prices are up, housing is up, supply chain issues mean there are shortages of goods all over the country, and we still have an unemployment problem. So what do the elites in power do? The put even more mandates in place to harm businesses. More than a year and half ago, the federal government forced businesses to shut down. They put so many restrictions in place that many were forced to close their doors permanently. Now they’re forcing businesses with more than 100 employees to enact vaccine mandates. This is forcing people to quit jobs where we are seeing enormous shortages and burnout. It is NOT good for America! We have lost our way when it comes to dignity of work. It’s time to find our way back. I’m working hard every day to push back against the radical left and enact commonsense measures to get America back to work. I’m grateful for your support. Together we’re going to take back the House, and reverse this damage. It’s not too late — but it’s going to take all of us working together to bring sanity back to Washington. For our future,Kevin Hern
---

body:
Friends, Nikki has an important request for our top supporters as we head towards our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Check it out:

Nikki is right, team. Every dollar that we raise now will go towards our effort to defeat Ron DeSantis next year. We urgently need your support as we build our campaign to defeat America’s most dangerous governor →

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=1026alicia]

I know you’ve heard this before, but it’s true every time we say it.

Ron DeSantis continues to prove that he’s dangerously unfit to lead. Just this month, he called a special session to ban private employers from requiring vaccines. He cares more about pleasing Republican donors and Fox News viewers across the country than delivering for Floridians.

So what do you think, team? If you’re ready to try something new and elect a Governor who puts Floridians first, click here to chip in now:

Thanks for fighting with us on this!

Alicia

Digging a little deeper into the campaign finance filings, the bigger picture is more of a mixed bag. While we outraised Franklin by more than 60% for the quarter, his cash-on-hand advantage is still significant ($92,997 to be exact).
We’re not in the habit of making excuses, but, honestly, we think this is only because Franklin’s been “campaigning” since the beginning of this year. We’re putting “campaigning” in air quotes because as far as we can tell, for Franklin that just means asking his wealthy donors to cut him a check.
And now that we know _exactly_ how much we need to raise to close the gap, that’s what we’re gonna do, one $10 or $25 donation at a time.

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Endorsement from Secretary Leon Panetta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
I’m thankful for the Secretary’s support and guidance. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta]Dear friends,
I am so excited to announce the endorsement of former Secretary of Defense Leon Panetta!
I’m so honored to have earned the endorsement of my former boss and great American leader who has worked for decades keeping our nation safe. It was a privilege to work under Secretary Panetta in the Obama Administration's Department of Defense, and I appreciate the vast amounts of wisdom he has imparted upon me.
Secretary Panetta has an impressive career as a steadfast public servant , serving as President Obama’s Secretary of Defense, Director of Central Intelligence, White House Chief of Staff to President Clinton, Director of the Office of Management and Budget, and a Member of Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta]
I appreciate Secretary Panetta’s endorsement, guidance, and friendship, and today, I’m asking you to join him in supporting our campaign. Please, will you make a grassroots contribution?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-panetta]I’m excited to announce other important endorsements soon, and I look forward to working by your side to win this campaign and restore America’s dignity.
Thank you for your support,
Eric Lynn

name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Will you stand up to this failed leadership?
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Friends, I need your help. With Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer running Congress and Joe Biden in the White House, Americans are witnessing the results of _failed leadership_.
---
| | | | | [STOP THE FAILED LEADERSHIP!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008708&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | _Failed leadership_ led to **tragedy in Afghanistan** and the security concerns that have followed. _Failed leadership_ resulted in **record high levels of illegal immigration** and a crisis at the southern border. _Failed leadership_ led to **Iron Dome funding being pulled** at the last minute, betraying our ally Israel. _Failed leadership_ produced a **stumbling economy** that is experiencing a **surge in inflation** , making it harder for families to provide the basic essentials. _Failed leadership_ has led to **out of control government spending**.
---
| | | | | [SUPPORT MIKE HERE](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008708&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | The list of failures by President Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer goes on and on. Americans can’t afford more failure. I need your help today. Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner
---
[ Manage Your Subscription ](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.php?r=126057447&l=64880&s=NE1B&m=1008708&c=493811)
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **email@miketurner.com**

Citizens for Turner
120 W. 2nd StreetSuite 1510
Dayton, OH 45402

\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

[](https://www.icontact.com/signup-trial?utm_medium=poweredby&utm_source=footerlink&utm_campaign=iC%20Footer&afid=144186)

subject: 1 week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Coming up short is not an option.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---
Peter,
**We are officially ONE WEEK away from Election Day.** ****
I am excited to announce that this is my FINAL weekly fundraising deadline. My team and I MUST reach $75,000 by FRIDAY. **[ALL donations made this week will go directly towards handing out yards signs, staffing last-minute door knockers, and pushing people to the polls to VOTE GLENN.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)** | | [**CHIP IN TO REACH MY FINAL WEEKLY GOAL!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---
This race is a dead tie, and if I don't reach my final weekly fundraising goal we are going to be in trouble come Election Day.

The clock is ticking, and coming up short is not an option.

_**Can I count on you to help me reach my FINAL weekly goal before it 's too late?**_
**[Yes GLENN! You can count on me!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)** | [**DONATE $25 > > > **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616485:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---
| [**DONATE $50 > > > **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616486:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---
| [**DONATE $100 > > > **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616487:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---
| [**DONATE $250 > > > **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616488:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---
| [**DONATE ANYTHING > > > **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
---

Terry McAuliffe knows this race is a dead tie, and he is getting nervous. I know he is going to pull every trick in the book to pull ahead in the polls. **We MUST BE PREPARED for this.**

The clock is ticking. **[Will you join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)**

I have faith we can win this in 7 days, but we need ALL hands on deck to make it happen.

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616484:JJILi32NQ:m:1:3253819041:1866BAEAA523CD4B76EFEF6512A868E8:r)
Glenn Youngkin PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC

clean_body: | = | | Folks, The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) recently released their list of “Young Guns” -- Republicans running for office that the NRCC believe to have a “clear path to victory” in some of the most competitive congressional districts. The NRCC and other Republican groups will use this list to identify candidates to fund and support -- and Elaine’s opponent, Jen Kiggans, is on their list. = | | | = Elaine is one of the NRCC’s top targets -- so it’s no coincidence that Kiggans ended up on this list. Republicans believe that Kiggans is their best shot to flip VA-02, but Elaine isn’t going to let that happen -- as long as she has your support. Elaine needs you to invest early in her campaign so that we can be prepared to fight back against Republicans and their outside spending. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = \-- Luria HQ | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:
| | [_**I don’t normally send you emails this long, but a new poll just revealed I have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to WIN this Governor’s race and create a Maryland that works for everyone. I set an ambitious goal -- 100 gifts before midnight -- to push my campaign into hyperdrive, pull ahead in the polls, and bring economic opportunity to every community in our state. It would mean so much to me if you could read my entire message, but if you need to log off, can I count on your urgent $15 before you go? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37950800/313311804/-711004501?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_moore_30_cl&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThhYWRjZi02ZDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtMxEwSi3-8afY3M0W9310x4G8xYo7BlFxMEGXTUXQs=)
* * *
After watching my mom struggle to raise my sisters and me alone -- I vowed to devote my life to service. I served our country in Afghanistan. I served as a small business owner to help kids afford college. I served as the CEO of one of the largest anti-poverty nonprofits in the country. And hopefully soon, I will serve as your next Governor -- but this run is also very personal for me. Because unlike many who run for office, I know what it’s like to struggle. I know what it’s like to grow up thinking I would never be afforded the chance to achieve my dreams. _**[I’m running for Governor to ensure no child in our state ever feels that way again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37950802/313311805/-711004501?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_moore_30_cl&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThhYWRjZi02ZDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtMxEwSi3-8afY3M0W9310x4G8xYo7BlFxMEGXTUXQs=)**_ [_**As of 11am, I’m locked in a dead heat to win this race. Throughout my life, one thing has sadly become all too clear:
Opportunity is readily available to some, and dangerously absent for others.
We have some of the nation’s most prosperous communities -- and some of its most impoverished.
We have world class medical institutions -- and people who can’t afford basic care.
We have some of the best schools -- and also the most underfunded.
I’m running for Governor to ensure everyone has an equal chance at opportunity.
[_**I believe no matter what road you start down, you deserve a path to success. But I need your help to fight for it -- we are closer than we’ve ever been to winning this thing. I need 100 supporters to chip in $15 before midnight to help me spread my message to voters and pull ahead in this consequential race. Your support in this moment would mean so much to me. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37950827/313311830/-711004501?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_moore_30_cl&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThhYWRjZi02ZDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtMxEwSi3-8afY3M0W9310x4G8xYo7BlFxMEGXTUXQs=)

clean_body: | | = After watching my mom struggle to raise my sisters and me alone -- I vowed to devote my life to service. I served our country in Afghanistan. I served as a small business owner to help kids afford college. I served as the CEO of one of the largest anti-poverty nonprofits in the country. And hopefully soon, I will serve as your next Governor -- but this run is also very personal for me. Because unlike many who run for office, I know what it’s like to struggle. I know what it’s like to grow up thinking I would never be afforded the chance to achieve my dreams. =** = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Throughout my life, one thing has sadly become all too clear: Opportunity is readily available to some, and dangerously absent for others. We have some of the nation’s most prosperous communities -- and some of its most impoverished. We have world class medical institutions -- and people who can’t afford basic care. We have some of the best schools -- and also the most underfunded. I’m running for Governor to ensure everyone has an equal chance at opportunity. = | = = = = = Elevate, Wes Moore Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. And we need your help to do it. | | = Making your gift monthly will maximize the resources to help Wes bring change to Maryland. Make your donation monthly right now! | = It’s supporters like you who fuel Wes’ campaign and we’re so thankful for your support. We’re committed to ensuring your contact information is up to date and accurate. If you are not dpwillis67@gmail.com, please update your preferred name and email . Any contact information here reflects the donor information we have on file for this specific email. If you donated with a spouse, with a check, or with a different email address, it may not be reflected in our records just yet. Thank you so much for your support and understanding while we work to update our records. If you’d prefer to receive fewer emails, we understand. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This race just shifted the wrong way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, when I heard that The Cook Political Report shifted the Virginia governor’s race from “Leans Democrat” to “Toss Up,” I thought for certain we’d have a surge in grassroots donor support.
I mean for days, everyone from the Associated Press to Donald Trump is claiming that Youngkin has the momentum.
**_So I was stunned when my team told me our donors weren’t stepping up to the threat._**
If I haven’t been direct about this, let me be direct right now: I need you, Peter. Democrats NEED to wake up to the threat that Virginia might fall to Republicans.
Glenn Youngkin is using his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final days of the campaign. If we don’t have the resources to compete, Democrats may lose 2021’s most important race.
**[So, what do you say? Will you step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer right away? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Can you do this for me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Can you help me with something, friend? Our end-of-month deadline is this Sunday, and we’re at a real risk of missing our October goal. It's critical that we build a strong foundation to show the strength of this campaign. **But right now, we're still $15,000 behind.** With Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump laser-focused on New Hampshire, we can't afford to fall short of any goal. News outlets across the country are predicting that this will be one of the most expensive Senate races of the cycle – Republicans have already spent over $3.6 million on attack ads against me, and that's just the tip of the iceberg. Between now and November 2022, GOP special interest groups and dark money super PACs will pump hundreds of millions of dollars into New Hampshire in an effort to unseat me and take back the Senate. A McConnell-linked super PAC, One Nation, recently announced a $10 million ad buy that targets my campaign. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, making it one of the closest races in history, and now Republicans and Democrats alike are calling my Senate seat one of the most vulnerable in the country. That's why I’m humbly asking you for help. **[If we're going to defend our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort from people like you, friend. Will you please rush $5 today to help my team and me hit our October goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37952467/313320055/-214106137?refcode=e20211026_mwh-oct-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU3ZGY3Yi03MjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7gLios520HhPRhVPSgC32VspbWOoW8Xc0KOZsPKA9Q=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37952468/313320056/-214106137?refcode=e20211026_mwh-oct-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU3ZGY3Yi03MjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7gLios520HhPRhVPSgC32VspbWOoW8Xc0KOZsPKA9Q=)

Maggie Hassan

# **Friend — Joe Biden and the Democrats want the federal government to treat parents like domestic terrorists.**

---
You can’t make it up. The Biden Department of Justice has launched a “task force” to go after parents who show up at school board meetings and don’t want their kids indoctrinated by Critical Race Theory. We need to stand strong against Critical Race Theory — which teaches that America is a racist country and the only thing that matters about a person is their race. And we need to stand with the parents who are speaking up against this anti-American propaganda. [**That’s what I think — how about YOU? Do you stand with parents, or with Joe Biden and the woke left? Let me know below.** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/c6f0f5b13b1cc326/4ead7782d064d7edc3d6b838967d376c)

We flip Congressional districts Republicans have held for decades, win statewide elections by record margins, take the General Assembly, and pass landmark legislation on a number of issues. I’ll be honest with you, Derek — if we don’t continue to lead by example, all of the progress that we’ve made could be undone in November if we don’t elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **According to a newly released report, the organizers of the January 6 riot say that they participated in "dozens" of planning meetings with Members of Congress and White House staff!**

It’s concerning that one of the highest levels of our government is already infiltrated with people who believe in Trump’s Big Lie and condone this level of violence.

And if our opponent Derrick Van Orden is elected, then they will add another member to their ranks! He was at the Capitol on January 6!

We can’t let that happen. No one who participated in a coup against the government should be allowed to serve in Congress.

According to a newly released report, the organizers of the January 6 riot say that they participated in "dozens" of planning meetings with Members of Congress and White House staff! It’s concerning that one of the highest levels of our government is already infiltrated with people who believe in Trump’s Big Lie and condone this level of violence. And if our opponent Derrick Van Orden is elected, then they will add another member to their ranks! He was at the Capitol on January 6! We can’t let that happen. subject: A “Weekend at Bernie’s” Presidency...
body:
Our country needs a lot of work to overcome Biden’s border crisis.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XK75bm9tpx_nCNnpWPdiziWCNnvyGBKApn19vc1EiPjy8Uoy2uDK1ej7Ih-6HV8OvNJfNVZlHN3097cSITTxBQC5cK2W5eViT9n1KZPMHRKJ8Sbp4iiAct0Gyd0FumiokUHqVhBhUrD4LBt7loSIwrAOqX4QERWb4iZ98Ih-wfBFG1--wIJhU3pfHsrhxcHyXtKm8DPA2xk=&c=rRJBJ1VK5tA-aLgz7LuM56k_m7tlYHPqWHHxt1ouOvKUadNskcMcLg==&ch=PxtRmbIn4qu4nuOq0SKy_geX0JlROycenc-ROgngPzYp-wUER0bgSw==)
