| Friend,
Our country needs a lot of work to overcome Biden's border crisis. Unfortunately, we have a weekend at Bernie's-type presidency going on right now instead of strong focused leadership that will get us out of this crisis.
I went on Fox News to talk about the crisis at the border. Take a look:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XK75bm9tpx_nCNnpWPdiziWCNnvyGBKApn19vc1EiPjy8Uoy2uDK1ej7Ih-6HV8OvNJfNVZlHN3097cSITTxBQC5cK2W5eViT9n1KZPMHRKJ8Sbp4iiAct0Gyd0FumiokUHqVhBhUrD4LBt7loSIwrAOqX4QERWb4iZ98Ih-wfBFG1--wIJhU3pfHsrhxcHyXtKm8DPA2xk=&c=rRJBJ1VK5tA-aLgz7LuM56k_m7tlYHPqWHHxt1ouOvKUadNskcMcLg==&ch=PxtRmbIn4qu4nuOq0SKy_geX0JlROycenc-ROgngPzYp-wUER0bgSw==)
---
| Arrests at our border are at an all-time high, and we need to do something about it. I've been fighting every day to ensure Conservatives take charge in 2022 to put common-sense border policies in place that this Administration and far-left radicals won't do.
We can secure our border with strong leadership taking over the House in 2022, but in order to do so, I'm going to need your help! [Can I count on your support to ensure Conservatives win big in 2022?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XK75bm9tpx_nCNnpWPdiziWCNnvyGBKApn19vc1EiPjy8Uoy2uDK1ej7Ih-6HV8OvNJfNVZlHN3097cSITTxBQC5cK2W5eViT9n1KZPMHRKJ8Sbp4iiAct0Gyd0FumiokUHqVhBhUrD4LBt7loSIwrAOqX4QERWb4iZ98Ih-wfBFG1--wIJhU3pfHsrhxcHyXtKm8DPA2xk=&c=rRJBJ1VK5tA-aLgz7LuM56k_m7tlYHPqWHHxt1ouOvKUadNskcMcLg==&ch=PxtRmbIn4qu4nuOq0SKy_geX0JlROycenc-ROgngPzYp-wUER0bgSw==)
---
| | | [SECURE THE BORDER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XK75bm9tpx_nCNnpWPdiziWCNnvyGBKApn19vc1EiPjy8Uoy2uDK1ej7Ih-6HV8OvNJfNVZlHN3097cSITTxBQC5cK2W5eViT9n1KZPMHRKJ8Sbp4iiAct0Gyd0FumiokUHqVhBhUrD4LBt7loSIwrAOqX4QERWb4iZ98Ih-wfBFG1--wIJhU3pfHsrhxcHyXtKm8DPA2xk=&c=rRJBJ1VK5tA-aLgz7LuM56k_m7tlYHPqWHHxt1ouOvKUadNskcMcLg==&ch=PxtRmbIn4qu4nuOq0SKy_geX0JlROycenc-ROgngPzYp-wUER0bgSw==)

| Thank you for your support,
Kat Cammack

name: The Desk of Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: 12 Zeroes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58592889:6PjK3329N:m:1:3103520637:324F8B516268220402A069AB8BFEF73B:r "Biden") Peter, Joe Biden and the lackeys in his administration have abandoned America's border security and are endangering our nation by ignoring the tens of thousands of illegals pouring into our country. Instead, their attention is now focused on their Socialist spending spree. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58592889:6PjK3329N:m:1:3103520637:324F8B516268220402A069AB8BFEF73B:r "Graph")**As Homeland Secretary Mayorkas is canceling border wall contracts, the U.S. Customs and Border Protection reports a massive increase in illegal immigrant encounters this year, bringing the total to well over a million.** He has directed ICE to no longer conduct illegal immigrant raids at workplaces. The man singularly charged with our nation's security is making America **LESS SECURE**. I'm Andy Biggs, Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus and a Congressman from the border state of Arizona. **[I need you to join my team, so I can continue to stand up for America and force the Biden administration to protect our citizens from this invasion rather than use our tax dollars to spend it on housing, food, and free college for illegal aliens.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58592889:6PjK3329N:m:1:3103520637:324F8B516268220402A069AB8BFEF73B:r "I need you to join my team, so I can
continue to stand up for America and force the Biden administration to protect our citizens from this invasion rather than use our tax dollars to
spend it on housing, food, and free college for illegal aliens.")** At the same time Biden and his minions are compromising our external security, they are ruining America's economy from within by attempting to spend $1.5 trillion on "infrastructure". **So you are aware, there are 12 zeroes in a trillion --12!** We all want better infrastructure, right? Less than 10% of this behemoth spending bill goes to what you and I would consider "infrastructure" \-- roads, bridges, ports of entry, etc:
* Nearly **$79 billion for the IRS** to ramp up enforcement of Joe Biden's tax-and-spend agenda.
* More than **$15 billion** for electric cars, "**tree equity** " (whatever that means), and to create "**green energy** " beacons for government buildings.
* $2.25 billion for AOC's Green New Deal army.
* **Millions towards "free" college for illegal aliens.**
* $25 million for "bias training" to push their far-left worldview on government and private sector employees.

**[I need your immediate contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 to help stop the Socialists in their tracks.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58592890:6PjK3329N:m:1:3103520637:324F8B516268220402A069AB8BFEF73B:r "I need your immediate contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 to
help stop the Socialists in their tracks.")** If we don't fight right now, these Socialists will have their way, and the America you and I once knew--and still love--simply will cease to exist. It's not just out of control Socialist spending and an America that is less secure. Every time you turn on the news, you see one troubling and offensive event after another.
* Businesses being forced to shut their doors due to repressive government mandates.
* Loss of respect by our allies and the fear of our enemies.
* Our brave men and women in law enforcement being maligned and, in too many cases, KILLED in the line of duty.
* Assaults on our Second Amendment rights and civil liberties.

This is not the America we want. This is not the America our children deserve. **[I need you to stand with me against Socialists who are seeking to transform America into a country we will never again recognize.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58592889:6PjK3329N:m:1:3103520637:324F8B516268220402A069AB8BFEF73B:r "I
need you to stand with me against Socialists who are seeking to transform America into a country we will never again recognize.")** I need you to help me protect the citizens of this country and restore America's greatness. America First, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58592889:6PjK3329N:m:1:3103520637:324F8B516268220402A069AB8BFEF73B:r "Andy
Biggs") Andy Biggs, Chair, House Freedom Caucus
Congressman, Arizona's 5th District
---

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Baker/Polito Target First Responders
body:
Diehl Releases New Ad Targeting Baker/Polito Firing of State Workers
| | | |
---
---
---
| October 26, 2021
DIEHL CALLS ON BAKER / POLITO ADMINISTRATION TO END FIRST RESPONDER MANDATES AND FIRINGS As Governor, Geoff will end mandates, reinstate jobs.
(Whitman, MA - 10/26/21) Geoff Diehl calls on the Baker - Polito administration to stop punishing the heroes who worked through the pandemic by terminating their employment if they are not complying with the vaccine mandates.
Diehl released an ad today: [Diehl Ad First Responders Stabbed in the Back by Baker Polito](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmXAt6ZvyZgKO9mvcdnB9xwFzWL71-D7M1HnrnbHIGSqNCWb7NPiGKlAy9pFJx-r9zhZY7zhHyTCAWzV8ATJYVzk7mRsDH0U34E0u8jsFzV1LoL9Roee38dii6otQdiaLz_b-woYA2JHwL7JLSNing==&c=9juKFj5WBQWPEIDF7H2JszcRCxoI5x2QzRMpb8OEeNb5jZVJpxYGSQ==&ch=nfHSxJolfMYhhH4iVsNz2ps2USPl1lMAPM-s48S-QiQuCZ6EvEkJwg==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmXAt6ZvyZgKO9mvcdnB9xwFzWL71-D7M1HnrnbHIGSqNCWb7NPiGKlAy9pFJx-r9zhZY7zhHyTCAWzV8ATJYVzk7mRsDH0U34E0u8jsFzV1LoL9Roee38dii6otQdiaLz_b-woYA2JHwL7JLSNing==&c=9juKFj5WBQWPEIDF7H2JszcRCxoI5x2QzRMpb8OEeNb5jZVJpxYGSQ==&ch=nfHSxJolfMYhhH4iVsNz2ps2USPl1lMAPM-s48S-QiQuCZ6EvEkJwg==), focusing on the Governor's flip-flop on this issue, as well as the Lt. Governor's hypocrisy of saying the administration has State Police's backs at the recent graduation ceremony last week in Worcester.
Diehl has pledged publicly that, once elected Governor, he will restore the jobs of everyone who was fired and will end the mandates which were enacted after the June 15 lifting of the state of emergency in Massachusetts.
"It's very simple. Individuals have the right to make their own health care choice related to taking a vaccine which, we're finding out, is not providing the guaranteed protections promised by government officials. In fact, we're seeing some very serious adverse reactions occur and its more clear than ever that a medical decision like this should be left between a person and their doctor," stated Diehl. "This is particularly true when discussing the brave first responders who worked through the pandemic, when a vaccine wasn't available."
Meanwhile unemployment numbers came out this week, and [Massachusetts is the only state in the country to see an increase in people out of work](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmXAt6ZvyZgKO9mvcdnB9xwFzWL71-D7M1HnrnbHIGSqNCWb7NPiGKlAy9pFJx-rfEjFb72Kbi5SfJHYOwWsQPxCQ_OA2OzBngBkCLD6sZgPCVbPHWxv8FG06wMIyTtA7ROWT_LrLqlI2ZA4_K51keDQyOArcqV-ahmIIoyYPk-vSanm3aKnJ1cuFx3iqCYvkGcvsLjHqn21K4tSuipsSbaTVsQQn9YQPOHblUD7Y4WuRsyyCN-YOA==&c=9juKFj5WBQWPEIDF7H2JszcRCxoI5x2QzRMpb8OEeNb5jZVJpxYGSQ==&ch=nfHSxJolfMYhhH4iVsNz2ps2USPl1lMAPM-s48S-QiQuCZ6EvEkJwg==).
Diehl added, "The Baker - Polito administration obviously consider people who want a say in what's put in their body as expendable, but there's only so many members of the National Guard out there to replace all the highly trained law enforcement officials, DCF workers and [various state agency employees losing their jobs right now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmXAt6ZvyZgKO9mvcdnB9xwFzWL71-D7M1HnrnbHIGSqNCWb7NPiGKlAy9pFJx-rZQeZLYPABXzBvepOZ1edPj91BmKVr7otW64eB8lBScNWhZ-aM7f4yuQrfRlHkgRq_uAG8RszdA2RmUMaE04F3w6JpatFg3WkNv3WORfU2rPSLKhn-KF-Rh_wBkjs35veW7pPm-ZRXlvubhLMSer50Xwqak5PDQ0A9UWiwvT9Ysgo2kCL6a-FopjdaisjuUfo7YiJk_oqydErhfTaaUJjBQ==&c=9juKFj5WBQWPEIDF7H2JszcRCxoI5x2QzRMpb8OEeNb5jZVJpxYGSQ==&ch=nfHSxJolfMYhhH4iVsNz2ps2USPl1lMAPM-s48S-QiQuCZ6EvEkJwg==). This mandate is putting at risk the ability for the state to perform the vital services needed by the citizens as we recover from the pandemic.
---
|

---
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
To Support Geoff Diehl's Campaign for Governor: [Donate to Diehl ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmXAt6ZvyZgKO9mvcdnB9xwFzWL71-D7M1HnrnbHIGSqNCWb7NPiGBtqsh33P0-QkJh7wpGkTEWdWrPFJdgshB6KMk2IO9LMnRJ2Zr-PHGh7qka7idvyVAYWsTtJe2gAyy_1lsRB96Lv9u_1BCUzHg_dKYA5C7q9oi6CwgufAVMvMssOo2o2_w==&c=9juKFj5WBQWPEIDF7H2JszcRCxoI5x2QzRMpb8OEeNb5jZVJpxYGSQ==&ch=nfHSxJolfMYhhH4iVsNz2ps2USPl1lMAPM-s48S-QiQuCZ6EvEkJwg==)

name: Danielle Allen
subject: We can change Massachusetts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
Thank you for joining this campaign!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37957275/313331047/-247783725?refcode=welcome&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBkMDM5Ny03OTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyQ-09LZqdbIfM7Grl9wYN4teRw2vkcGg4szUfWgTDM=)
---
| Peter Willis-

I’m so excited to have you on this team. We can reimagine our state as One Commonwealth and knit our communities together. We will call the powerful back to their responsibility for the greater good and connect those who feel powerless to their power.

I remember when Covid hit, friend. No help was coming from Washington, and what little came from the State was slow, halting, and fumbling.

But while the state was failing, our communities stepped up to the plate.

We got to work. We organized. Together, we found new ways to protect our neighborhoods and share knowledge that saved lives.

Now, I invite you to join me in reimagining a Commonwealth that aspires to this true sense of community. One that lives up to its legacy as a beacon of opportunity and a leader for democracy. **Together we can innovate with social and civic infrastructure to make housing abundant and affordable, transportation efficient and environmentally sustainable, and schools healthy and supportive of growth, all while also addressing climate change, the looming threat that could make all of it so much worse.** | [Donate to our campaign ⇒](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37957276/313331048/-247783725?refcode=welcome&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBkMDM5Ny03OTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyQ-09LZqdbIfM7Grl9wYN4teRw2vkcGg4szUfWgTDM=)
---

Let's come together, work together, learn together, decide together, and act together.

_-Danielle Allen_

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37957277/313331049/-247783725?refcode=welcome&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBkMDM5Ny03OTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyQ-09LZqdbIfM7Grl9wYN4teRw2vkcGg4szUfWgTDM=)

**Danielle Allen** is a mom, social entrepreneur, and nonprofit leader. She has advised presidents, governors, and mayors around the country on critical policy decisions. She has started and led a range of organizations, from local civic education providers to a global philanthropy. Danielle has worked tirelessly for decades in the policy domains of education, justice, and health. Her leadership is characterized by listening, collaborating, and innovating--as in leading a multi-disciplinary covid response team that led to the Biden-Harris Pandemic Testing Board and an interstate compact to build out COVID testing resources. | [Donate Now ⇒](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37957278/313331050/-247783725?refcode=welcome&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBkMDM5Ny03OTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FyQ-09LZqdbIfM7Grl9wYN4teRw2vkcGg4szUfWgTDM=)

body:
We're asking you to pitch in:
#

Northampton County, Pennsylvania.
It was once home to Bethlehem Steel, one of the biggest steel manufacturers in the world, and it’s part of the beautiful Lehigh Valley area.
Politically, it’s one of Pennsylvania’s most important swing counties — Joe Biden won there by less than 1% in 2020.
**And it’s a county that we’re going to have to win if we’re going to elect Malcolm Kenyatta to be a champion for working families next year.**
[Could you please make a $3 contribution to help us organize and win in places like Northampton County? body:
Only ONE Week to Get Out The Vote! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/783408ead6e1/rally-with-allison-russo-rep-joyce-beatty-and-more-this-weekend-5027957?e=400a181d5a)

| | |

| | |
# Allison Russo, Tim Burga, Rep. Joyce Beatty, Danny O'Connor, and local Democrats across the state are ready to [**Get Out The Vote**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bde5438875&e=400a181d5a) this weekend, _but we're missing your name._

Hi ,

_**There is exactly 1 week left before Election Day.**_ We are sprinting towards the finish line, and in a special election that means _turnout_ , _turnout_ , _turnout_! That's why Allison Russo and Democratic leaders from across the state are holding GOTV Rallies, Canvasses, and Phone Banks all across Ohio this weekend!

We need our voters fired up and ready to #Flipthe15th, and we need your help to make that happen! Sign up to join our GOTV events, and then invite your family, friends, neighbors and coworkers to join you!
---

* [**Pickerington/Violet Twp. Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=868dd01ffd&e=400a181d5a)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: My Promise To You: I Will Oppose Any and All Tax Increases
body:
I joined Grover Norquist to sign the Taxpayer Protection Pledge | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5b2d644b61&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
## **My promise to you:
I will oppose any and all tax increases**
Hi Friend,

I just signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge. This is so important because it's a promise I made to you. It is considered binding as long as I hold office because you deserve to know where I stand on the tax issue. Below is a photo of me standing with Americans for Tax Reform President Grover Norquist right after I signed the Pledge.

**In an era of runaway government spending by the Democrats’ one-party control of Washington, we need someone who will stop the wasteful borrowing and spending. That’s why I’m committing to Pinellas County voters that they can trust me to stop the spending and not raise their taxes.**

The Taxpayer Protection Pledge was endorsed by President Reagan when it was introduced in 1986. You can learn more about it [here](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5d628d91ee&e=c2296cffff).

I am grateful for your continued support. Together, we will win and return CD 13 to Republican control and help flip the House RED!

Gratefully,

Amanda Makki
---
|
---
| [Stand With Amanda - Chip In Now!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a368aa0808&e=c2296cffff "Stand With Amanda - Chip In Now!")

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Biden says first responders should be fired…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s4TtOQM3H-SdcnsPZT0oHGrnlx6S1VnyIV4OHDdxjrXElEZORcpEBmDy0vgIRRtfaOq94YtfDNWQajEa24pA8xo9KNSLEeJYVXbDaZ5qwvnr5_zancXm-O_hSlun_AjZ_-cCtApwtr5Ufw7MXppL9b_kg9rNFQwlu4HhNyPBcg649MULudoTz2pnT2YcQWeH&c=VcvoxF1N-cL2Y8R-5vAOPwXlBDENouhmNFzzjIRHAdrC7OPCdNe2Sg==&ch=KKP_Sinmri1N37pUSirloFjrIJqgSYmZdjbLf5i-yzFRjd-UHmtqkA==)
---
| Peter,
---
| None of this should come as a surprise...
During a town hall with Fake News CNN, Joe Biden just chose his vax mandates over our first responders and mocked our freedom on national TV.
That's right - he thinks the men and women who protect your communities every day should be out of a job if they don't comply with his medical tyranny.

body:
#

Friend,
**[October will be over shortly, so I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign’s end-of-month fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37959678/313342503/1515758891?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTZmMDhhNy04MzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKWH8b2PT0mJ-uHfKgolETmUyb1jDQV9FYMvVO-R0TY=)**
The deadline is set to expire in a few days, but before it does — I hope that you’ll give me a moment to explain why reaching our goal is so important:
Growing up, I watched people monopolize our local, state, and federal levels of government, and sell empty promises to their constituents — while using their power and influence to benefit themselves and their wealthy friends.
I ran for office to create space for folks who grew up like I did — in Section 8 housing and on food stamps — and to work on behalf of New York’s 17th Congressional District — the very community that raised and shaped me into the person I am today.
Since starting my term in January, I've fought tooth and nail to deliver legislation on urgent issues. I have co-authored provisions of both the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the Freedom to Vote Act, and recently I muscled a truly universal child care program through the House Education and Labor Committee for inclusion in the final Build Back Better Act.
This is life-changing legislation that will greatly improve the lives of hundreds of millions of Americans, but I know that the work doesn’t stop there. I am also fighting to urge the Senate to abolish the filibuster, so Democrats can pass critical legislation without obstruction from Republicans.
**[There are a lot of tough battles ahead, but I’m ready to take them on and create a government that uplifts every American. Chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to support my re-election campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37959679/313342504/1515758891?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTZmMDhhNy04MzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKWH8b2PT0mJ-uHfKgolETmUyb1jDQV9FYMvVO-R0TY=)**

clean_body: Friend, = The deadline is set to expire in a few days, but before it does — I hope that you’ll give me a moment to explain why reaching our goal is so important: Growing up, I watched people monopolize our local, state, and federal levels of government, and sell empty promises to their constituents — while using their power and influence to benefit themselves and their wealthy friends. I ran for office to create space for folks who grew up like I did — in Section 8 housing and on food stamps — and to work on behalf of New York’s 17th Congressional District — the very community that raised and shaped me into the person I am today. Since starting my term in January, I've fought tooth and nail to deliver legislation on urgent issues. I have co-authored provisions of both the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the Freedom to Vote Act, and recently I muscled a truly universal child care program through the House Education and Labor Committee for inclusion in the final Build Back Better Act. This is life-changing legislation that will greatly improve the lives of hundreds of millions of Americans, but I know that the work doesn’t stop there. I am also fighting to urge the Senate to abolish the filibuster, so Democrats can pass critical legislation without obstruction from Republicans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress and a person from a working-class background, these issues are deeply personal to me. Every day, I fight for those who’ve felt unseen by their elected officials — and I won’t stop working for economic, racial, gender, LGBTQ+, and environmental justice. Thank you for supporting our movement, and I look forward to our work together ahead of the election. Onwards, Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Race Theory lesson")_ **from a 6th Grade Classroom in Ohio.

subject: MAGA Champion Eric Greitens Dominating Missouri Senate Race According to President Trump’s Pollster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| MAGA Champion Eric Greitens Dominating Missouri Senate Race According to President Trump's Pollster
---
| As reported by the [Washington Examiner,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KumabP8CIIwDE2XJ8RJuqmRnvqOfFP1oXzTAjxdqPpUvE_QSYYRpYzsviYtJU7HehWz7TwYWgP_PQkE_YXPD4d89kr82HtXLJuJzMKrLCzbHQrRnil2YsyMXu81fmnUZQ23_xNynyu-6OXlrBOTRFetOg_2LjDfkgY_xK76IAhmvYivKnm1m2dCX0b_FgUAYaLr56qXHT7R7ia1AA5ZbZFkfPj-doXVm2ztqfhZLGnOPYmUr9BKTgc0280Tu_v5iQDXp9-dMaij5Bl8g8Dd0Rg==&c=gVwrHBzmSx4hwirfgtY_wRVobT4BItvVAG-EE_2Av21O2gDRG_5sXQ==&ch=wm6IEJB38-6ujuBTQSpFNq0fXMhRKu0SRDpUji-7AcFpokwk_zWrdA==) President Trump's pollster finds MAGA champion and former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens holds a massive lead in the 2022 GOP primary for the US Senate-- a lead which increases when voters are told of his vow to vote against reelecting Mitch McConnell as Republican leader.
New [Fabrizio, Lee & Associates ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KumabP8CIIwDE2XJ8RJuqmRnvqOfFP1oXzTAjxdqPpUvE_QSYYRpYzsviYtJU7HeSg3ctlZuUIvW6C5yRd00HAGU5x70umMNPL5jOd7S1DbJ-FbusoeqATPNeAo5wLjpXApZ91JfhmzprFA57dOtZA==&c=gVwrHBzmSx4hwirfgtY_wRVobT4BItvVAG-EE_2Av21O2gDRG_5sXQ==&ch=wm6IEJB38-6ujuBTQSpFNq0fXMhRKu0SRDpUji-7AcFpokwk_zWrdA==)polling shows Governor Greitens leading his Republican challengers in the 2022 race by double digits. He currently has 36% support in the race, and leads his nearest opponent by 19 points.
However, Governor Greitens' lead expands further when voters are told of his pledge to remove McConnell as Republican leader in the Senate, jumping from 36 percent support to 44 percent support-- extending Governor Greitens' lead from 19 points to 30 points.
In the third quarter, the Greitens for U.S. Senate Campaign and The G Team, a joint fundraising committee supporting Governor Greitens' candidacy raised a combined total of $679,719.03.
Over $3.8 million dollars has been raised to support Governor Greitens, according to campaign fundraising data and media reports for the Greitens campaign and super PAC independently supporting him.
Since announcing his campaign, nearly 19,000 patriots have donated to Governor Greitens' campaign accounting for over 24,000 donations.
[BREITBART: Senate Hopeful Eric Greitens Leads GOP Primary by Double Digits -- Gains Support with Anti-McConnell Stance](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KumabP8CIIwDE2XJ8RJuqmRnvqOfFP1oXzTAjxdqPpUvE_QSYYRpYzsviYtJU7HeDkK6Y_Bq7DxhWuFrapougq-JtZxlYZrDJGK7EamqjMvWz11EDgpus4QtFOS6Chc-zC4J7Ys1HC_p436ijsxG-JY2oVuUNUYstfATXrzvcCCTlw-GB_K0O-MKGB_C5xYVi4a1oRUlPOVfBod4uD-HH5DM-4SomPhprJn5Y50dazPONJgEl9788bATsGgDrn1nna0ceyn0K6M_3rs-1E67jwWlLYV_he7lWR3Ebc81atNHvqaMYPTL8iKHgLLvNKWB4FyIY2rGN4A=&c=gVwrHBzmSx4hwirfgtY_wRVobT4BItvVAG-EE_2Av21O2gDRG_5sXQ==&ch=wm6IEJB38-6ujuBTQSpFNq0fXMhRKu0SRDpUji-7AcFpokwk_zWrdA==)

body:
We can’t let Trumpism in America win.

| I’ll be blunt, Peter. The Virginia Governor’s race is the most important in the country in 2021 and recent polls show a tied race.

With so much on the line for Virginia and our country, I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.

[_**Early voting has already begun. Can you split a donation between my campaign and John King to help stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37960395/313345880/-844928598?refcode=BLU-KING-20211026-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDc0YzA4Yy04NjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vb2RBed6Di9mkrXvOUZEwME4703k_A-Ck5IUPAKYpuE=)

Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

clean_body: We can’t let Trumpism in America win. | I’ll be blunt, Peter. The Virginia Governor’s race is the most important in the country in 2021 and recent polls show a tied race. With so much on the line for Virginia and our country, I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now. = I mean, think about it: My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump.And media outlets like the Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by “playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’” And, with Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia. Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win. Don’t let it happen. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Terry * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . body:
Every. Vote. Counts. Make sure you’re ready to get out and vote for me on [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=aebfbc0658a9434fbcf24d0bd2058fdb&_e=rs-eEsz1yP9-etmNAJc6ZpvpRShs20tYakBLFjksyjMoaTVOsOBoIlj7fktSQuETznwNpkDnKx15UZqmHiMacJuknXZOtMf-8oCq-yGvrPBztWRA0_0qb3W2eZo_OQhOuCqAfBovipK37lI_Zx8y4f54F3scWwfe4JyRqgYTXrBQ3zurlnSWKPkVbB0b5jTGmN_ed-eA8HsHHbxzKnXbEqk1IAzXRXQEsspns956snqze8HhYmy84Po6kGfB40uNnuKsurCMFeTq6-Tbd-HTEwF6M-RZmOHS8rNCQ9dutnqGoMu-ST6NukxpSFTvOF8EoRyNP0dipk1aEeqZ1xHPZ3y94x7ty4cOduAYqHIIZ9Fg9ClBzUgyJOrUV4V-eDMmpisT_-BqP20kX0_axjA8cRtIoI06OU3amL67oogQ4DWJjJ0MaR_oW69N9ilhgwODlO_4LPFlFHTUrDp2kAoWLKxquz-0VY6ktAdxoOQ5XuM%3D) | |

Friend,

_**_Election Day is officially ONE WEEK AWAY._**_

Throughout this campaign, I’ve been so inspired by the encouragement I’ve received from amazing supporters like you.

And now, as we’re finally closing in on November 2nd, I’m excited to say that our campaign WILL WIN this race... _**as long as my top supporters get to the polls.**_
[**FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=aebfbc0658a9434fbcf24d0bd2058fdb&_e=rs-eEsz1yP9-etmNAJc6ZpvpRShs20tYakBLFjksyjMoaTVOsOBoIlj7fktSQuETznwNpkDnKx15UZqmHiMacJuknXZOtMf-8oCq-yGvrPBztWRA0_0qb3W2eZo_OQhOuCqAfBovipK37lI_Zx8y4f54F3scWwfe4JyRqgYTXrBQ3zurlnSWKPkVbB0b5jTGmN_ed-eA8HsHHbxzKnXbEqk1IAzXRXQEsspns956snqze8HhYmy84Po6kGfB40uNFTE36wzOxa69wcU7N4xZr7mKI5HkrOWvEU7sRPtqW51m9oGUmEEjT818qhvuHJqJrVdidC8PUKofugbFEt-NFZQ_NYGdeHZKmAu-bIAIexf5AODIX0uFQdcJ3rVrp9UffhJCOeK7RFqjAvIYr1F0ap6boZObCRZCLKY1Kt7udmncK5iOjSvt1osOtxfBJhCyOapoW-3hvzXO7G1SIYYyJvHqxjm7GjEN1tSbZdQBZVI%3D)
From now until Election Day, you are able to vote in person OR by mail. But don’t wait until the very last minute to turn in your ballot.

_The stakes are just too high for anything to keep you from voting. If we want to win this race and take back Virginia,_**_every vote will need to count._**

Derek,

I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record.

Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority _hinge_ on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.**

**So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84jWGEGlegFG2CsLAesz7NTq5COCZqrpWhi0nK0tVdKxbwenpwZ0BoG6PtHd0KGdbPfZH_R9s6HmVPMKaz2xfVplLahhXdDG62HDAsh-A0qpZYp13XSqeaDSIOtiVuFE0Sc0CdOwQRaBTRUlCsZM6kmHDXK8ifimsz0LQP9LloJgZG1nx3pJrn8xGxyJL_NJhKLQFnra27yY_btOoQZRxn5BT4745Vcr0bh7hbHCPgki3pY3pEB5TvE-KvT7W8x23n09MGVXsTOewBPWx1_IypMVRIORz4sce-DTSlusnp4ipXNIaYs5mpJ64KzlxZlraa-MMkEQZB5XDAQvQYVBILKU/3gh/7PrIugKjQ26dlnRMtRkXUw/h1/ClKVdXypHkuJjS_fkJlQUuX6nMK1QTG0nPaPTsnZR8s)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84jWGEGlegFG2CsLAesz7NTq5COCZqrpWhi0nK0tVdKxbDbwCOozjHkX3JL74Rwt1tUk_TTBUou5N61lS1EGUgDV-FM86HpM2xvBri7W7WevxmwrKBYAF_VDh1h_VkRIOrBfEaplb3kj_LifCEtPgZIMPlr4jajADSSeIhA5FgCDtrzP9JK_0TcW89K5cRsl_ng1Agso_5mPA_EGWl2DAZhM-BggyeH4H2ObeuFxwK0IfBpQILyuEbufiQDBBDvZrwLGfNM4-vCKREsREtoi_mqIaUQtC49B5qLv1fxIb59SC8wT8YwMLMsh8bkMdJ4M3HzE8bgiqm8wgY9f-YDJK1KQ/3gh/7PrIugKjQ26dlnRMtRkXUw/h2/EUzgVlFTWizexqaRtXtELOo6hrDOSP5BpTA-4Nu1V4c)

[ Donate other ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84nfxqBn9I0i1WdjrsLuq3wbQ6ikEGoUY9PVVOcFbNslMiyD7Lmt-D9HzHyeDxYp7EOzZv2bC6XNiiZI5P0PpjnVnzq1AusG09womQWt4EVLxeiVqIWOC-OsPJW5cNAvFqEjCcuJXjxxbaYh8Ic6yn5Rjr5PHucRQ5Gp73ooQC9M7dQjFUUNxDIjBViCYzQyDheq9F1g_jgI-mJMqQbGT9T8YN8BRcVzxSeIzKdu609Pvvmefra7ly4llrLOD4R_C_wCJOx8CJ7DcVu0dR3rjDNunOFFWNvYPXhHHqMEWTiET5Q_8Jq6G2-FfuGJ1fBMXYzf12liYbnmhdtndF_ClaVU/3gh/7PrIugKjQ26dlnRMtRkXUw/h5/waz5y9liOKONDHYNQC4GqqB-GOqYSJJLRnHg5xktzUE) ** As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history.

But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.**

That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn.

**The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, Derek. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:

[Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Common Good VA – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84jWGEGlegFG2CsLAesz7NTq5COCZqrpWhi0nK0tVdKxbxIlhkAj3fuzgGWaaiouyolsnfNpLaOH0jnVAEtxb2vXMEXYerY5piwhYaW-W1gP3XSVZZ6Lq2dGMnGNSZEKExkLpxAHS9HOMaCoIKktsppSVnml5omufTE3WEdsr4Dp8pYKbX-UNS2vFDF3AyiT_3FCb1TdfaWidCtx4I6P1RymL67O9EAjvENr-v9NqKmiJiislOsL4s4CaPry47ZOJGBhodAj4coiv_y0SOIMoMNKMaZsddQFQtUvukB2EJLlDAr2X-gGVHQwgMFwR7yyGck1nM1wo3Cz05P9bPNAM0Uk/3gh/7PrIugKjQ26dlnRMtRkXUw/h6/MIWStyKBws7T0m3z_t92Qa-tAtf3ozUTDPQVyED5xrE)**

I appreciate it – thank you so much.

– Raphael Warnock

body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37961324/313349635/601477077?refcode=20211026_p_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM5ZTdmMC04NzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVeK3snRY9CiAMWE78IIQRZ2U9Iz4gCc6P881fjYq28=)

Folks, I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read through what I’ll do to legalize marijuana.

After all, if people can brew their own beer, they should be able to grow their own weed. Can you add your name if you’re on board?

\-- Charlie
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Charlie Crist**
Subject: I'm calling for marijuana legalization in Florida -- are you with me?
> [It's time to legalize marijuana in Florida -- add your name if you agree](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37961325/313349636/2096778938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM5ZTdmMC04NzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVeK3snRY9CiAMWE78IIQRZ2U9Iz4gCc6P881fjYq28=&emci=c9ed8e0b-7736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3fc9e7f0-8736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)
> ---
> Friends,
>
> **After more than fifty years, it's clear that the war on drugs has been an abject failure.**
>
> That's why, when I'm Florida's governor, I pledge to:
> | ✅ | Fully legalize marijuana for adult use and allow up to six plants to be grown for personal use
> ---|---|---
> | ✅ | Use the proceeds from marijuana legalization to fund drug treatment and diversion programs
> | ✅ | Expunge criminal records for marijuana-related misdemeanors and third-degree felonies
> **Policies like these have been successfully implemented in _nearly two dozen states_ across the country -- and it's far past time for Florida to follow suit.**
>
> **[_We need to send a strong message that the overwhelming majority of Floridians agree with these commonsense policies. If you’re on board, will you add your name now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37961326/313349638/2096778938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM5ZTdmMC04NzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVeK3snRY9CiAMWE78IIQRZ2U9Iz4gCc6P881fjYq28=&emci=c9ed8e0b-7736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3fc9e7f0-8736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)**

subject: Poor Terry is scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
We MUST keep up the momentum and KEEP Terry McAuliffe SCARED! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8990%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Ae6nf08VWCj0traELcaPjg&sysid=1)
We MUST keep up the momentum and KEEP Terry McAuliffe SCARED!

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16012%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QPKOrtsqiUV%2bljPSRKlTaQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

Terry McAuliffe is officially scared.

**Terry knows he can’t win, so he is bringing in Stacey Abrams, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, and even Jill Biden to campaign on his behalf.** He needs the help of corrupt career politicians who campaign on stale political ideas...that do not work.

Terry McAuliffe is officially showing how desperate he is. | [**KEEP TERRY SCARED**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16013%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qLqm%2fSsRmOqpz852wPGOWw&sysid=1)

name: R. Dorilas
subject: YES or NO: Would you support a black Republican for Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_t=CIFluktsZ1XSFnTldIAsptSzzboHDaNwyq-eJJRiklI3FFoN4AOURhB7e2n2_icOdDvr01meTzv2yDoAYCtS6g9zQAWtdV0IhdrlNqVkJ4Qj5kHBBCWl9YCEMz8HfVFFkUHOJ1aytMLeXf7TfeIBoBV7XJJHc8NmuP1rJjDPL3s%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp1D3mP_m6SsueBC1YeHSjoU2qh6OvnxATBZCPV8i_fthVSStd4emq8UAgsP8iNe5iPfnYSKLh6ULlwnAD6zh5aMNjF0C4aAUJaPFRtpv-ImMHb_Wu0lvgkqipiy34NIi0WD9KsdD2Xu_uyi3Udg7k_5qKchLf8cRzWWrAgKan0q7zmUjNUre9RGjX_sS18I8gHbTmH6kPpbcxnSK77EkMAQ%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKpxkDsC7spapyh-ivC8EVGyC0iPOiK7DU67JLKbZK6yrNXOvni5_uT6cBYju8LQijfomf_JmLuB_-KUZ0uwBE7kVt3h6LFOV5bcX6PsHSv6svShcV3MvGgcaA8X-7fQtNLIHtoC2bBFnxh8XIBzqkcyn2uQqv5s7JSHxNOdGyFiH54yEgBV-lU-3iwViI5fbb8S7Ss-URsHTFDaNbG7fdpg4%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp1sNB4NDfQXMUSuQfdfiJZlvC4SwahQuM0tVudI-aEixv9xs3eXl8QEKLCJoA5poY1pPr2CuzirFCwh6GgQQXTSd2ZSAfyMBJR7gksB_aCOv1vh_dsceWP1s_LydX5LLoVz4F7EaXL-ayNe8bjb_iwqb4EwIqOvgzivqEhsapRoIut19mskUic-cPaJDCGLas_VDRwIa__ijDNK9nbbjrys%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp8_aaOuXFXydIvY8agmwE0P2dLfPxGx7L9vycnXptpJn6N7qVlE07gU3n-roFm4mSnu4BZtuz0O-oxmspmxRpSWTpl49am1YlZ5nLdCnDhW0Oh3-R9jg3UzdmFJ1ktlQEXH-I--scewozfJyhMktKoiiKMQk7lg0GBi8cig9xucqtSyjAOsLvzSfFnClDnYc_a5lAI4_riv12GhmHKFoKUA%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp7uKBYCANwsV0l4LY7DpdYYKmShF_qqNaAsfErzhYdKIDSIwhF_AiVJY8AQh5klkyhuU0hSmXGww2v70VENBgSPFkM1USeV_VeQLqvDbi-123cu0qFCS8DXSrxOkVLbPKZSPNn5Yx1l-DmHErHPm-BwUtRMiKfuR83SJD1HpwlMkPQiyNEQ57lgbVoNrlCZS92rt0ew2Zwvfy5gHIgBMh-g%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp1KU3Z0Ta1d_QyOjUo1XbldZVGr6zYRkfDVFexi7c8XpiU2uxstxFCIebgQ71OhNA8K5eXujtmboe5zkNl4VWd0vAoWUNdATKc5x1hvbP7msxle6ETIosxy5V3BxQQ4hCd6yZAjReA3XH9mzhUa68q6-9eMHjxsjb2hFJYY553vx7erw4U0RzfpHz7GZ0DW5rfxQVwtPP-PbLHWOZITL9Ic%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp7OLl4K7fJdCTNq57gpPoxFNMwDXa2UzSnAp55KZBvZ1raoF9duC_2QaeVz-vOSPNsHmrigwCg2nn_xyb3RedtQzR_2nIsAVu6oZluVl1N_axPJQOuE_BbB81PyMDKA4jxMVJjtQGOe28W1iWs1R9xxgrPdYK1WRJiB0wDUQV8dvmnauyd5cJf935nrjNdpilDWarMhLzs5CyubXW576uP0%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp4Cke_C4bhFCJAp4VRKqo8-Nnv-LpLoSNxRIZggHX5srGGwTF_izmV7p_QVQePiegZ33GShLtY05j1Z-PT--HBZqH8ZHxi0VmyeA_Szr9cb7f4ee5xe3dss04rl9mOncANwLbzmqs7JvoMXhS7qZ4_k0KHdfr4wuqOenyysXlBEe28kHDlS1TLzmN5cioQPlgrjpl8q9iqaLchD8581CHEI%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKpx9S0fc2hbr4wcjwwv61zmRwJ6psC0zaIHOlIPHTZ7ubXd2RcX-aYzih8Y-uGNFVeYKpvYFRSduj8D_vgChBNVgyJcPD3cQ6kmXozFWhVgn41azb9tQSav_GN0bVXIDqkrQKArL-d8rxa7NjewXkqT09CGaqgqhYznWTyMGDjcK1HcbLCnCW4K4aBocx18I7SZtTYzIC6ifRWSpZXnzwrlU%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d09619f065ef480db024f735765758b0&_e=8YiIY0JQIVvXyCTJc7hVLRY-Y_8QWOUJA_PIBhEPJljjwIq0C0VDf0V27CmuXiitm6mrW_zCpceX9GSDyC1Fs1X97YlVpDGdlPk8xL-Vocwif3FARTNkcYJj0oWP88E4JLeQmj5U-fM73tIkvyGFcYWFZktOxwZ71w0yduoNqmk2Apte0oXP6M36y52okERA7l2cwcEJY0kcM7THO7s9u5vu5AvC-YP1hMAW_vUBsO4XtMLBKSK6fHYrBZr6LDylYsHelU2fMmE7zp-CUADKp3nt4nFkFTXz5-S0cz_5Qtxsi5RlqBqUnWTg1TvLuL9VBqnSPsXBEbXsDXknOUK63OPAt4nbXnK2_g4gR8ybCTiKJXUjphYgElzwrd_OikGLkuy6mbKEbe9OJPEXpmZ6KgsaqUpoYyzm0TV6bvdkY3u-jXLkiGbi1A8VpBQdfo0WJ24S0ZtuLUc5OjioatHo6yIHkpC4FgMNWqlA9tPBvSI%3D)

clean_body: My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. subject: Can you help out my friend Kim?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0LXEVEYTNWxNpHWhcvPuq5y7YcFKvGwsdW_WqWtKX8o=/lmTYahYttRtHXvvFUdxZzWHLARyFiywlgL325IAv7TU=)**
---
Friend -- I don't need to remind you how crucial our election in one week is - we must keep our Democratic majority in the Commonwealth. That's why I'd like to introduce you to my friend [**Kim Melnyk**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0LXEVEYTNWxNpHWhcvPuq5y7YcFKvGwsdW_WqWtKX8o=/ICX1mwMfgKtNpRtm9HEi49jawxSxy8hwUA0syHg1Kyw=) , who is running to unseat Glenn Davis in Virginia Beach. Kim is the Vice Chair of the Virginia Beach School Board, a former classroom teacher of 17 years, and a small business owner. She is running to fully fund public education, expand healthcare access, protect a woman's right to choose, and push Virginia Beach forward. Glenn Davis is wrong for his district and is dangerous for our Commonwealth. His track record proves that he will continue to put special interests over the needs of his constituents. He has made health care more expensive and voted repeatedly to restrict women's access to reproductive health care. If we don't keep our Majority, and allow representatives like Glenn Davis to return to Richmond, Virginia could quickly follow in Texas' footsteps on reproductive rights, voting rights, and so much more. [**Can you chip in a few dollars to help Kim get across the finish line?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0LXEVEYTNWxNpHWhcvPuq5y7YcFKvGwsdW_WqWtKX8o=/AdQnWyUkIhtSLUlv0VflKTwq_rQ1YUor6G6YOhSvBso=) She has a clear path to victory as long as she's able to reach our voters, and every dollar will ensure she's able to get her message out. Team, In light of the latest report from the United Nations’ Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change, Ben strongly urged leaders on Beacon Hill to commit 80 percent of federal recovery dollars to climate-related priorities. The consequences of climate inaction have become part of our daily lives. Heat waves, snow storms, catastrophic floods, and dangerously erratic weather patterns threaten every community in the Commonwealth. _Without bold, meaningful action and investments that will put an end to new fossil fuel infrastructure in Massachusetts and across the country, climate change will intensify and render our planet unlivable._ Climate action has been the centerpiece of our campaign and includes everything from public transportation and affordable housing, to investments in Massachusetts’ clean energy economy. [**We need a strong wave of grassroots supporters to stand with Ben in his call to commit 80 percent of all federal recovery dollars to climate-related goals. These funds are a clear opportunity to support our most vulnerable residents who continue to bear the brunt of the climate crisis. Please add your name next to Ben’s:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37962000/313352231/1079999331?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU4ZmE5ZC04YTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbNCCLXustuf7Z3gWguRddLhYJKohuuo9aD6WtaQ5OI=&emci=e1291c36-7436-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cde8fa9d-8a36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37962001/313352232/1079999331?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU4ZmE5ZC04YTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbNCCLXustuf7Z3gWguRddLhYJKohuuo9aD6WtaQ5OI=&emci=e1291c36-7436-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cde8fa9d-8a36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496)

name: Team Rayner
subject: #RaynerRundown: October
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELE FOR FLORIDA
body:
THE RAYNER RUNDOWN

Peter,

Before October comes to a close, we wanted to recognize and celebrate LGBTQ+ History Month! LGBTQ+ history month is a month-long celebration in which we honor LGBTQ+ achievement and influence on the world.

This month also serves as a time for us to advance our knowledge and take action -- because while we've come a long way, we've got much further to go.

Michele made history when she became the first openly queer, Black member of the Florida legislature. The fight for LGBTQ+ rights is personal to her, and always will be. She's a fierce leader and advocate for the community, and is beyond ready to take this fight to Congress.

#RunWithRayner ON THE SOCIALS

“All people should be able to get reproductive health care that meets their needs throughout their lives and we'll be making that message clear in the streets.”

"Michele joined State Representative Marie Woodson and State Senator Shevrin Jones to react to the humanitarian crisis taking place at the U.S. Southern border."

"Michele joined Planned Parenthood and several other elected officials to vocalize opposition against proposed bans on abortion."

DONATE >>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110_email_rayner?refcode=em21_211026_rundown

This month also serves as a time for us to advance our knowledge and take action -- because while we've come a long way, we've got much further to go. Michele made history when she became the first openly queer, Black member of the Florida legislature. The fight for LGBTQ+ rights is personal to her, and always will be. She's a fierce leader and advocate for the community, and is beyond ready to take this fight to Congress. #RunWithRayner ON THE SOCIALS “All people should be able to get reproductive health care that meets their needs throughout their lives and we'll be making that message clear in the streets.” "Michele joined State Representative Marie Woodson and State Senator Shevrin Jones to react to the humanitarian crisis taking place at the U.S. Southern border." "Michele joined Planned Parenthood and several other elected officials to vocalize opposition against proposed bans on abortion." Arizona's population is changing — we're set to become a majority-minority state _in this decade_. **As the state diversifies, we need people in office who represent that shift**.

I have spent my career fighting for the communities I grew up in. For the poor, for people of color, and for vulnerable neighborhoods desperate to end the violence threatening their kids.

**Now, I'm ready to become Arizona's first Attorney General of color** and to fight for policies that make a real difference in communities of color, starting with criminal justice reform.

Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, Just like the focus was on Georgia in 2020, all eyes will be on Virginia in 2021. My friend Terry McAuliffe is running for Governor against an extreme culture warrior who has the backing of Donald Trump and Ted Cruz. Derek, Virginia made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership. If his opponent succeeds in using his deep pockets to buy the Virginia Governor's office, he will reverse the progress made across the Commonwealth. For Terry to win, he’ll need to build the biggest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics. He can do it, but he needs our help. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.” And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access. On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards. In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress. So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance. =** I’m counting on you, Derek. Stacey Abrams = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of libe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi8lkhbo39rv5tiol7g3nvb6sc4l3tsk4c88krgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9jmcp37c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onj6uo68tj6eth71cj1m4r68dhlc9oj0s31c6rjco5gstie8pr56mr3ccb4mtgmfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db66jhbbdhgepjmcd70m9h3csh5u)
*Sponsored by
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z33ks442itue1kr6m3bve18jgptst9ivfpf23c3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9jmcp37c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z15qgj2r3t93pkup04fmj7ba3olfc735eclpfkjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9jmcp37c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp6um4fpdkg1eikcpitm03cqvk40lv7rrkusg8e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9jmcp37c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: Photos inside! An update from João and me! 💕
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
What would our campaign be without a few selfies? 😅
#
Hey Peter, it’s Gisele here! And whew — what a month!
This past weekend, João and I traveled from northeastern to southeastern Pennsylvania to meet some of the lovely people who have been supporting our campaign — and folks who haven’t decided yet (but I worked to win them over 😉)!
The best part of these trips is meeting with people in every county, because João (+ this campaign) is passionate about every person and every vote. **[And if you can chip in $5 or another amount today, we’ll have the resources we need to continue this outreach.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&t=1&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)**
But just a warning, if you DM me and invite me to your awesome bar, I will show up 😅 I’ll love on your dog and I will eat all your food 💕! I love you Luzerne!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&t=2&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)
The highlight of the weekend is when João and I _alllllmost_ left the Tatamy Howl-Oween with a new addition to the family (Celeste, our political director, was no help). And don’t worry, our good boi Levi knows all about this — I got his permission.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&t=3&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&t=4&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)
When we had a few moments off of the road, we stopped at The Joint in lovely Bethlehem — I ate all of the cookies and picked up some thrifted pieces at The Attic. Made a bunch of new friends and João was able to get his much-needed caffeine ☕.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&t=5&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)
We wrapped up an incredibly busy and wonderful weekend with a stop in Hatfield. Back in Braddock — Levi Fetterman is back holding staring contests with the neighborhood 🐱, and I got João to watch 90 Day Fiancé.
I appreciate the little moments like this, because I know this campaign is only going to get busier as we get closer to 2022. I honestly don’t know how we’ll do it without each other and a whole lot of ❤️, so I extra appreciate the support that you’ve given us these past few months.
I’m lucky to watch João first-hand on these trips, Peter, and I know he’s the right person for the job.**[Will you please make a donation to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate today? Together we’re building something really special, but we simply can’t do it without your help. John and I are so, so grateful for any support you can send our way.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&t=6&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34435?refcode=em20211026-3209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)**
I’ll be back with more updates from the road soon. But in the meantime — your support means the world!
With love,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLOP)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211026-3209-footer&t=26&refcode2=3209_434096_ZnD7HZ&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=3209%2E434096%2EZnD7HZ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37962649/313355268/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTNkMGY2Yy04ZTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPSyM4NGw09aMagOYYx2h_pQfv1mxhp09SjxZwJDt6Y=)
Team, In the time that my friend Senator Michael Bennet and I have worked together, I’ve had the privilege of seeing his leadership up close. Like me, Michael has been a champion for education, climate change, health care, and other issues that matter most to Coloradans. His leadership in the Senate has been instrumental in passing legislation that has made our country better. However, we might see the end of his strong leadership in the Senate if we lose our fragile majority. **National Republicans are using every tool at their disposal to flip seats like Michael’s, and they only need to flip one seat to succeed.** [_**To maintain our majority, we’re going to need to support leaders like Michael with everything we’ve got. Split a donation between our campaigns today >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37962650/313355269/1980823483?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTNkMGY2Yy04ZTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPSyM4NGw09aMagOYYx2h_pQfv1mxhp09SjxZwJDt6Y=) I’ll be honest with you -- we can’t lose Michael in the Senate. He is at the forefront of meeting 21st century challenges like national security and the climate crisis head-on and is driven by a deep-seated obligation to create more opportunity for the next generation, as evidenced by his expanded Child Tax Credit that’s on track to cut child poverty nearly in half. We can’t afford to miss out on an exceptional advocate for the people like Michael. [_**Folks, we are running out of time to fight back against Republican attempts to take back the Senate. Can I count on you to split a donation to secure Colorado’s Senate seat and protect our majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37962651/313355270/1980823483?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTNkMGY2Yy04ZTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPSyM4NGw09aMagOYYx2h_pQfv1mxhp09SjxZwJDt6Y=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Jason Crow and Michael Bennet:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37962652/313355271/1980823483?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20211026_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTNkMGY2Yy04ZTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPSyM4NGw09aMagOYYx2h_pQfv1mxhp09SjxZwJDt6Y=)**

clean_body: | = Team, In the time that my friend Senator Michael Bennet and I have worked together, I’ve had the privilege of seeing his leadership up close. Like me, Michael has been a champion for education, climate change, health care, and other issues that matter most to Coloradans. His leadership in the Senate has been instrumental in passing legislation that has made our country better. However, we might see the end of his strong leadership in the Senate if we lose our fragile majority. National Republicans are using every tool at their disposal to flip seats like Michael’s, and they only need to flip one seat to succeed. = I’ll be honest with you -- we can’t lose Michael in the Senate. He is at the forefront of meeting 21st century challenges like national security and the climate crisis head-on and is driven by a deep-seated obligation to create more opportunity for the next generation, as evidenced by his expanded Child Tax Credit that’s on track to cut child poverty nearly in half. We can’t afford to miss out on an exceptional advocate for the people like Michael. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Jason Crow and Michael Bennet: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Jason Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
We want to challenge you to help our campaign reach a goal we didn’t think possible, but one we need to reach given these new developments
#

Friends —
This is one of the most important weeks of the campaign so far: Our October fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days. Let us tell you why this one matters so much.
Right now, Mark is facing a barrage of attack ads funded by a Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC. Meanwhile, a fifth Republican opponent just entered the race. And CNN still has us as one of the most likely seats to flip in 2022.
So we have a wild idea. **We want to challenge you to help our campaign reach a goal we didn’t think possible, but one we need to reach given these new developments: 75,000 donations in October.**
If you act now, you’ll be donation number 46,620.
It’s a bit of a stretch, but it’s within the spirit of this campaign — and Mark Kelly — to accomplish what most wouldn’t dare to try. So here it goes:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to our campaign and help us reach our goal of 75,000 donations this month? Reaching this goal is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211026-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1569_6688874_GeiL9E&akid=1569%2E6688874%2EGeiL9E)
