name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: Mockingbird Media Is Against Pima Audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Fight to audit Pima! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3dd1cdb21a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Week in and week out I have written you and let you know when there is about to be a big breakthrough.

**_And one of the tell-tale signs is when the media starts attacking what we are doing! They hope that by drowning everyone in the noise, people won’t be able to hear the truth of the corruption around them._**

And that is exactly what is happening today...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=461c5ae2d5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Media Lie #1: The Media is telling everyone that Maricopa proved Biden one!**

This is absolutely fictitious. The Maricopa Audit proved that there were countless sources of fraud, any one of which would be sufficient to overcome Biden’s supposed margin of “victory!”

_Do not let the media get away with this. My campaign is fighting against Fake News disinformation _every day_!_

>From _Business Insider_ :

_Former President Donald Trump is once again pushing for a vote audit in Arizona, even after an earlier vote audit in Maricopa County proved that President Joe Biden won._

_This time, the former president has his sights set on Pima County, the state's second-most populous county after Maricopa._

_Trump baselessly alleged in a statement on October 15 that there were "staggering anomalies and fictitious votes in Pima County's mail-in returns." He also alleged without evidence that the ballot boxes in the county were stuffed "with more ballots than were ever sent."_

_"A new analysis of mail-in ballots in Pima County, Arizona, means the election was Rigged and Stolen from the Republican Party in 2020, and in particular, its Presidential Candidate," Trump's statement read. "Either a new election should immediately take place, or the past election should be decertified, and the Republican candidate declared a winner."_

Do you see this? The second that President Trump aligns with our campaign on pushing for an audit of Pima, the media begins the attack.

_And for the record, any media hack that claims that these accusations are baseless can meet me face to face and I’ll show them the evidence._

[**_Help me and President Trump fight back against these media attacks!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c553ce6351&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2a46b61ccf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Media Lie #2: The cost of an audit outweighs its benefits**

This one is insidious.

**_The Media wants you to think there can be a price tag on Democracy. You and I both know that’s a bunch of B.S._**

If I would give my life for Democracy, tell me a price I wouldn’t pay. This is why I paid for the initial hearings on Election Integrity _OUT OF POCKET!_

So, the Fake News Media casts wild aspersions on our cause, claiming that it is a “frivolity.”

_Tucson Weekly_ reports:

_The entire recount was a mess and a circus. An expensive mess and circus. Despite a prior agreement to cover expenses, GOP state senators forced the Maricopa County and taxpayers to foot the bill for new voting machines following the audit under threat of the state government pulling hundreds of millions in revenue sharing funds._

_We should not let a similar costly frivolity occur here in Pima County._

_Sadly, the cancerous movement to hamper Arizona democracy is somehow still growing. Conspiracy-fueled advocates of “Stop the Steal” have yet to back down despite the fact that even the partisan-led, amateurishly handled Cyber Ninjas report demonstrated no evidence of widespread voter fraud. State Senate President Karen Fann can claim any nonsense she wants, but Arizona’s election was completely aboveboard._

Unbelievable. The recount was one of the most organized audits that we have seen this millennium. The only time there were problems was when the Democrats refused to comply with the audit!

**Secondarily, how can anyone ever put a price tag on Democracy? **

_You know the Democrats are scared of their fraud being uncovered when they literally claim that uncovering fraud is too expensive._

**I’ll tell you what is costly. Letting our democracy go down the tubes with our elections.**

**_It’s too damn costly, and there will be hell to pay if we do not push forward to Pima._**

I appreciate that you have read my letters to you. [And I also know that by now you know the drill.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=130bbc8838&e=44b8c466b0)

**I push forward and identify where the fraud is, and then the media uproar attempts to drown out the investigation. That’s exactly what is happening now.**

_That tells you this is where the pain is. And I need your help to push through it. The Media attacks are a daily threat to Democracy if we do not have the capital to fight back against it to push forward with the Audit. [Can you help with a rush donation of $25, $50, $100, or $250 today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=42ebb8f969&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=25056cada7&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=66e79b6769&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=67217200e2&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=80eb858ee7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=80eb858ee7).

Peter,

Senator Rand Paul has proven Anthony Fauci is a liar!

New information came out from Wuhan, China that shows the NIH used taxpayer money to fund controversial research surrounding COVID-19.

name: Tom Nelson
subject: 1 year later...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Team,

One year ago we launched our campaign. Thanks to you, we’ve built a grassroots organization that touches _every corner of the state._

**We’ve visited all 72 counties on our Full Nelson tour,** conducting listening sessions at each, the only candidate to do so. We’ve learned valuable lessons that have helped shape this campaign.

Corporate power is crushing the little guy from the countryside to the city center. We need to tax the rich, end monopolies that hurt small business, bust up unions, depress wages and kill jobs. We need to grant working families economic security so they don’t have to worry about putting food on the table, a roof over their heads, or getting their kids a good education and a shot at the American dream.

That means raising the minimum wage, guaranteeing every worker the right to organize, free two-year college and ending bad trade deals that have shipped Wisconsin jobs overseas. [Chip in now so I can fight for these policies in the U.S. Senate→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963297/313358309/67999095?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211026_2_1&refcode2=045ca190-8f36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDVjYTE5MC04ZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7DyKUhj0eXN3IeymL-0PeCslxSG2dqf7pe0b4nIFi0=)

We need health security, too. That means Medicare for All so we can ensure everyone has access to quality, affordable health insurance and no one goes bankrupt or delays retirement because of astronomical health bills.

And we need a planet. Even if we cut carbon emissions by 15% a year until we reach net-zero, we still will have caused irreparable damage to the planet. We need a Green New Deal – and we need it now. We must re-tool our economy by building 21st century infrastructure, investing in public transportation and getting out of the fossil fuel businesses into renewable fuel sources while creating millions of family-supporting jobs.

I am the only candidate from a red part of the state who has won election six times, as a legislator and county executive – the office I now hold. I can beat Ron Johnson and bring good-old fashion progressive values to Washington. I’ve done it before, I’ll do it again.

[Team, this is a grassroots campaign, powered by the people. Chip in now to help me defeat Ron Johnson→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963298/313358310/67999095?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211026_2_1&refcode2=045ca190-8f36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDVjYTE5MC04ZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7DyKUhj0eXN3IeymL-0PeCslxSG2dqf7pe0b4nIFi0=)

Thank you for the last year and the one to come. As a great Wisconsinite once said: The future is so bright – I’ve gotta wear shades.

Tom

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963299/313358311/67999095?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211026_2_1&refcode2=045ca190-8f36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDVjYTE5MC04ZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7DyKUhj0eXN3IeymL-0PeCslxSG2dqf7pe0b4nIFi0=)

# **Friend — I went to the border last month, and as I’ve said before, it’s total CHAOS.**

---
The chaos is a direct result of Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock’s open borders, pro-amnesty, pro-citizenship for illegal immigrants agenda.
I’m ready to fight back. How about you? **Watch our new video about the border crisis. **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/add831ea7d6f5a8a/4736c8d4de8093a0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We need to secure the border, finish President Trump’s wall, and STOP incentivizing illegal immigration. With one more conservative vote in the U.S. Senate — not another pro-amnesty, pro-pathway to citizenship vote — we can begin doing just that. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Friend,
The attack on the Capitol on January 6th was not a protest.
Americans and the rest of the world watched as the Capitol was violently attacked by insurrectionists. **Rioters, emboldened by Trump, attacked our Capitol in an attempt to subvert democracy through violence.**
**Now, despite attempts to block the truth, the select committee's investigation into the January 6th attack on our Capitol is underway in the House.** This is a huge step in the right direction to holding the responsible parties accountable and defending our democracy.
But if history has taught us anything, we can expect Republicans to do everything in their power to impede the investigation. They'll do whatever it takes to hide the truth and escape accountability.
[**We can't let that happen. body:

name: Max Steiner
subject: One of our first hires.
body:
It's a myth that young people don't vote. That said, we do need to do more work to reach them where they're at. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963606/313359972/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThkODk0ZS05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_UxCNUEakGudhNvhse-kpczvg_zGkFf94AONMghVws=)
Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to **[chip in your first contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963608/313359974/-209993060?refcode=em-102621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThkODk0ZS05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_UxCNUEakGudhNvhse-kpczvg_zGkFf94AONMghVws=)** toward my end-of-month deadline. But first, let me share some updates from the team. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop.

The Army requires reservists to spend one weekend every month and several weeks per year at training. October was the month I had to report for training. That means I wasn't able to host as many events and meet as many people as I originally planned this month.

The good news is that our campaign hired one of our very first field team members and I'm thrilled to be the first to welcome Holley on board to help mobilize young people and college students in the North State.

LaMalfa is banking on apathy from young people to keep winning reelection. It's a huge blindspot of his and relies on the myth that young people don't vote. That said, we need to do more work to reach them where they're at.

**Running a persuasive grassroots field program takes time and money. I'm thankful to have Holley on board, but I need your help meeting our projected field budget so we can successfully get this off the ground. That's why I'm asking:**

**[Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $35 toward my upcoming end-of-month deadline today? Any amount will help us meet our $35,000 online fundraising goal. That said, we do need to do more work to reach them where they're at. | = Friend, In a moment I'm going to ask you to = toward my end-of-month deadline. But first, let me share some updates from the team. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop. The Army requires reservists to spend one weekend every month and several weeks per year at training. October was the month I had to report for training. That means I wasn't able to host as many events and meet as many people as I originally planned this month. The good news is that our campaign hired one of our very first field team members and I'm thrilled to be the first to welcome Holley on board to help mobilize young people and college students in the North State. There’s nothing more important to me than my family.

[**_Which is exactly why I’m running for Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963621/313360015/1129282168?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2UxMzg1Yi05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duYS4JcegdVNTl9wtvHpia3Y_l1eUKrVPIfe5ufUdqY=)

* * *

[**_I promised my husband, Tony, that I’d lend him a hand today. I’m about to explain why flipping this seat is so important and why I’m confident Tony can pull this off. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963629/313360023/1129282168?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2UxMzg1Yi05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duYS4JcegdVNTl9wtvHpia3Y_l1eUKrVPIfe5ufUdqY=)

Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night.

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963630/313360024/1129282168?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2UxMzg1Yi05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duYS4JcegdVNTl9wtvHpia3Y_l1eUKrVPIfe5ufUdqY=)
That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963631/313360025/1129282168?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2UxMzg1Yi05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duYS4JcegdVNTl9wtvHpia3Y_l1eUKrVPIfe5ufUdqY=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families.

Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman.

Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, [**_I knew that Tony was the right person to replace him._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963632/313360026/1129282168?refcode=20211026_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2UxMzg1Yi05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duYS4JcegdVNTl9wtvHpia3Y_l1eUKrVPIfe5ufUdqY=)

clean_body: There’s nothing more important to me than... | | | I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my wife, Lauren. There’s nothing more important to me than my family. = My father died from COVID-19 — while Don Bacon voted against pandemic relief. My daughter was born prematurely and spent her first days in the NICU — while Don Bacon voted against the Affordable Care Act. I fought for affordable housing for everyday families — while Don Bacon voted to slash taxes for DC billionaires. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Tony P.S. I’m forwarding you Lauren’s message, in case you missed it. I hope you can see why this is so important to us. = Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night. — Knocking on doors to meet voters — Connecting with local businesses and community organizations — Raising money to keep his campaign running — On top of helping me raise our two young kids! = That's just how Tony is. = Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service. I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families. Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school. Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can. That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman. Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations. After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, = = I know you work hard for your money and I wish I didn’t have to ask. | | Folks — Voting rights is an issue that I believe cannot be compromised on because of how straightforward it is: _every American above the age of 18 should have the right to vote._ That’s why **I was proud to vote in favor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (JLVRAA).** [_**Can you add your name and urge the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963695/313360284/-1650964237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjNjMjhiOS05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-LJBrQWYUJewrrczU-4IyhGgcq9u5I7WQUdsSIiKJs=&emci=9e6a19dc-9132-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4f3c28b9-9136-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10997957) I need 12,500 of my supporters to stand up for voting rights alongside me. | | | [Sign on: Support the JLVRAA >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963696/313360285/-1650964237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjNjMjhiOS05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-LJBrQWYUJewrrczU-4IyhGgcq9u5I7WQUdsSIiKJs=&emci=9e6a19dc-9132-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4f3c28b9-9136-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10997957)
---
Republicans across the country are passing bills to make it harder for minority communities to vote.
**In states that have histories of voter suppression, the JLVRAA would require the Department of Justice to give pre-clearance before any law pertaining to voting is enacted.**
While our work doesn’t end here, passing this critical legislation would go miles in protecting the right to vote once and for all. In recent days, we’ve seen that this fight isn’t easy, so I’ll need your help.
[_**It would mean a lot to me if you would be one of the 12,500 supporters we need to sign on in support of the Senate passing the JLVRAA — just like the House did.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963697/313360286/-1650964237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjNjMjhiOS05MTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-LJBrQWYUJewrrczU-4IyhGgcq9u5I7WQUdsSIiKJs=&emci=9e6a19dc-9132-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4f3c28b9-9136-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10997957)

clean_body: | = | | Folks — Voting rights is an issue that I believe cannot be compromised on because of how straightforward it is: every American above the age of 18 should have the right to vote. That’s why I was proud to vote in favor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (JLVRAA). I need 12,500 of my supporters to stand up for voting rights alongside me. | | | Republicans across the country are passing bills to make it harder for minority communities to vote. In states that have histories of voter suppression, the JLVRAA would require the Department of Justice to give pre-clearance before any law pertaining to voting is enacted. While our work doesn’t end here, passing this critical legislation would go miles in protecting the right to vote once and for all. In recent days, we’ve seen that this fight isn’t easy, so I’ll need your help. | | Thanks for being with me in the fight for constitutional rights. Together, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

name: Eden at Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: What the hell is happening in Dayton?!
body:
Build Back Better plans to pay for itself by having corporations pay their fair share of taxes. But these Dems are against it >>

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37963720/313360366/1300596418?refcode=211026_FR_sheniseattacks_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2OTRjYWQ5LTkxMzYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5KRhHR1LNBOjbVTBF77SNwu3wiOncDJwgy7n6m1XIbY=)

Our endorsed candidate, Shenise Turner-Sloss, a __Democrat and front-runner__ for Dayton City Commission in Ohio, is under attack for speaking truth to power on police violence that has gone unchecked in her community -- __by FELLOW Democrats.__

**Although we are disgusted, we are not surprised. At Barrier To Entry PAC, we know that even when the establishment gets it wrong, the PEOPLE can get it right.**

Here is the mailer they had the audacity to send out: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37963721/313360367/1300596418?refcode=211026_FR_sheniseattacks_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2OTRjYWQ5LTkxMzYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5KRhHR1LNBOjbVTBF77SNwu3wiOncDJwgy7n6m1XIbY=) We have no choice but to call this out.

**These are Republican fear mongering tactics, and it’s complete bullshit.**

The Dayton establishment is accusing a Black mother for not caring about safety in her community— an obvious “dog whistle.” And in today’s world, not only is that unacceptable, it is downright dangerous.

**Shenise said it best herself: “I grew up working poor in Dayton’s West Side and am now a mother proudly raising three young children here in Dayton. I absolutely want to make our neighborhoods as safe as possible for all residents, and evidence shows that the best way to do this is to improve educational opportunities and reduce poverty.”**

Luckily, respected progressives like Sen. Nina Turner, are building a coalition and using their voices to put power behind Shenise where others have tried to tear her down.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37963722/313360368/1300596418?refcode=211026_FR_sheniseattacks_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2OTRjYWQ5LTkxMzYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5KRhHR1LNBOjbVTBF77SNwu3wiOncDJwgy7n6m1XIbY=) Supporting progressive organizing work in our cities that can excite and engage new voters is critical to flipping Ohio blue and implementing just policies, and it can only happen from the ground up. **[Will you help Barrier To Entry PAC provide essential resources and financial support to low-income, working-class Democrats? name: Ken Russell
subject: an update on our grassroots movement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on this campaign.

|
---

| | Peter, first things first, I want to thank you for everything you’ve done this past month.

I truly mean it when I say that engaging with my grassroots supporters is a highlight of this campaign.

I decided to run for Senate because I want to represent YOU, Peter.

So that’s why I love hearing directly from you whether through my monthly surveys, petitions or directly on the campaign trial.

Everything you do is helping me shape my strategy to WIN next November.

**I know that we can flip Florida blue and build on our progress in this great state.**

But it’s going to take my whole grassroots team working together to make sure that happens.

Which is why I’m coming to you right now.

I’m calling on 2,500 grassroots supporters to sign on and PLEDGE to do everything they can to help me flip Florida blue.
| [Can I count on your support before midnight? Add your name to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37963762/313360574/1500739088?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjQ2MDM2OS05MjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk7MIfjAbtTGRcItJd0ukQWZGoz_l9jalqBxut6NvQ0=&emci=bcccb91d-9136-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=eb460369-9236-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22995843)
---

Thanks,

Ken

clean_body: I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on this campaign. | | | Peter, first things first, I want to thank you for everything you’ve done this past month. I truly mean it when I say that engaging with my grassroots supporters is a highlight of this campaign. I decided to run for Senate because I want to represent YOU, Peter. So that’s why I love hearing directly from you whether through my monthly surveys, petitions or directly on the campaign trial. Everything you do is helping me shape my strategy to WIN next November. I know that we can flip Florida blue and build on our progress in this great state. But it’s going to take my whole grassroots team working together to make sure that happens. Which is why I’m coming to you right now. I’m calling on 2,500 grassroots supporters to sign on and PLEDGE to do everything they can to help me flip Florida blue. | Thanks, Ken | Small business owner turned community organizer who became a Miami City Commissioner. Ken is running for U.S. Senate to clean up Washington of self-serving politicians like Marco Rubio and give his neighbors a voice in Congress. Friend,
**We are officially ONE WEEK away from Election Day.** ****
I am excited to announce that this is my FINAL weekly fundraising deadline. My team and I MUST reach $75,000 by FRIDAY. **[ALL donations made this week will go directly towards handing out yards signs, staffing last-minute door knockers, and pushing people to the polls to VOTE GLENN.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs0j9054ivlpg7d2mto2sqecddrpu8rb7tntebf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9jmapr0sph2bs)** | | [**CHIP IN TO REACH MY FINAL WEEKLY GOAL!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8l4emf1kc1qnboaag92lmqmga9b2q8efnrssr60_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9jmapr0sph2bs)
---
This race is a dead tie, and if I don’t reach my final weekly fundraising goal we are going to be in trouble come Election Day.

The clock is ticking, and coming up short is not an option.

_**Can I count on you to help me reach my FINAL weekly goal before it’s too late?**_

name: Emily, Wesley, me (3)
subject: FW: Following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
I wanted to thank you personally...
| Friend,
---
I was so proud when I heard Wesley was named one of the NRCC’s first Young Gun candidates of the midterms.
---
_But I wanted to reach out and personally tell you that that pride is equally matched by my gratitude for all the support you’ve shown us. Wesley wouldn’t be here without YOU._
---
Unfortunately, after Wesley and I met with our finance team to prepare for the end-of-month deadline, it’s clear we’re still feeling the effects of Facebook’s recent outages that blocked Wesley’s fundraising ads.
---
As things stand, Wesley is still $37,855 short of his end-of-month goal, so I wanted to follow up on his email and ask if you can help us get back on track before the deadline.

clean_body: I wanted to thank you personally... | Friend, I was so proud when I heard Wesley was named one of the NRCC’s first Young Gun candidates of the midterms. But I wanted to reach out and personally tell you that that pride is equally matched by my gratitude for all the support you’ve shown us. Wesley wouldn’t be here without YOU. Unfortunately, after Wesley and I met with our finance team to prepare for the end-of-month deadline, it’s clear we’re still feeling the effects of Facebook’s recent outages that blocked Wesley’s fundraising ads. As things stand, Wesley is still $37,855 short of his end-of-month goal, so I wanted to follow up on his email and ask if you can help us get back on track before the deadline. name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Baby photo inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This is a photo of Sarah with her grandmother, who left her life in Hudson, Wisconsin, to serve in the Navy during World War II -- blazing trails few women had at that time. She never waited for a tap on the shoulder and taught Sarah an important lesson that she carries with her to this day: **"Ask forgiveness, not permission.”**

Sarah took her grandmother’s advice to heart. When the boys in her class laughed at her and said girls couldn't run for office, she did it anyway -- and won. They learned an important lesson, too: **Never underestimate a woman with a plan.** Take a look at this vintage campaign flyer:

When Scott Walker and Wisconsin politicians tried to get rid of the State Treasurer's office, Sarah was a political unknown who had never held public office before, but it didn’t stop her from getting in the fight to take on the most powerful Republican in Wisconsin. People told her it would be hopeless -- Scott Walker made his decision, end of story. But she didn’t buy it.

**Sarah stepped up when no one else would and launched a statewide campaign to stop Scott Walker’s power grab, winning with 62% of the vote -- the kind of landslide victory that just doesn’t happen in Wisconsin.**

Then, Sarah decided to run for State Treasurer and won -- flipping 9 Trump counties and winning by a larger margin than the Governor, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General. Sarah immediately got to work ending a Republican gag order on climate change, distributing record funding to public school districts to support students and teachers during the pandemic, working with Governor Evers to secure $92.7 million for struggling Wisconsinites at risk of losing their homes, and so much more.

Every time someone tells Sarah what she _can’t_ do, she shows them what she _can_ do. That’s why she got in the fight to take down Ron Johnson. The naysayers and armchair critics are already saying she shouldn’t even try, but **Sarah is no stranger to being underestimated -- and she’s never been afraid of a tough fight.**

The people of Wisconsin deserve nothing less than someone who will show up in their communities, listen to their concerns, ask how they can help, and deliver real results. That’s what Sarah has done as State Treasurer, and it’s exactly what she will do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator.

**[Will you make a contribution to elect Sarah Godlewski to the United States Senate? subject: Madison Cawthorn is an insurrectionist. Full stop.

body:
This is truly disturbing.
#
**BREAKING: Madison Cawthorn attended planning sessions with insurrection organizers.** Add your name to demand that Congress expel Madison Cawthorn. **
****[Add your name](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211026/?source=em20211026-583&t=1&akid=583%2E3698%2E1AQzmi)**
---
This is truly disturbing.
January 6th organizers told _Rolling Stone_ that they participated in “dozens” of planning sessions with Rep. Madison Cawthorn (NC-11) and several other Republican members of Congress.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211026/?source=em20211026-583&t=2&akid=583%2E3698%2E1AQzmi)
Yep, that’s right: Madison Cawthorn helped orchestrate the attempted coup to overthrow our democratically-elected government, and he did nothing to stop the violence and death that resulted.
In fact, Cawthorn and his other co-conspirators in Congress ENCOURAGED the insurrectionists to continue with their protests by hinting at a “blanket pardon.”
[**Madison Cawthorn is an insurrectionist, and he must be expelled from Congress. If you agree, will you sign our petition?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211026/?source=em20211026-583&t=3&akid=583%2E3698%2E1AQzmi)
**[Add your name](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211026/?source=em20211026-583&t=4&akid=583%2E3698%2E1AQzmi)**
If that wasn’t bad enough, Madison Cawthorn has _continued_ to stoke the flames of insurrection.
In August, he threatened to violently overthrow the government again. He promised “bloodshed” and even “to take up arms.”
The people of North Carolina deserve better representation in Congress than a lying white supremacist. That’s why Erica is demanding that Cawthorn be expelled from Congress.
[**Madison Cawthorn is a violent extremist and has no place in the halls of Congress. Add your name next to Erica’s and demand that Congress immediately expel Madison Cawthorn.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211026/?source=em20211026-583&t=5&akid=583%2E3698%2E1AQzmi)
**[Add your name](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211026/?source=em20211026-583/?source=em20211026-583&t=6&akid=583%2E3698%2E1AQzmi)**
Thank you for taking action,
Team Erica Smith

body:
Day 3 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour was a success! We are picking up speed speed as we continue our journey through the Commonwealth
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWCrD96lG78ZW2Q4_xh2F-YhYV3Z50p4z6WkkN31NNBr3lSbtV1-WJV7CgBqjW7w3VwX2r1Jx7W1jVmWJ99NvvVN8_F-vdSJDwvW4mz3nH2Wf-w4W2KpsMB98QFjwW7MnYRW74Qc6fW5F-fDG17RJ61W175m9s2-XVhHW3MN3pM7ZJ4dsW6T2ZXk6vdRtqN62yXk93xkrPN41tq89cZX4MW1_5HXL7qwhs0VF3Dqm4c6mZ1W37K7Xk4K620tW8l1b4Q4cpfnbW16v-rs84blwRW32w6lr6sFTv4W8yn6p587V7n3W5hQM4x56mH193dN71)

| | |
---|---|---
Dear Friend, Day 3 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour was a success! We are picking up speed speed as we continue our journey through the Commonwealth and head into Day 4! I couldn't think of a better way to spend the final days of the campaign than with people who are ready to join our movement to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWCrD96lG78ZW2Q4_xh2F-YhYV3Z50p4z6WkkN31NNBL3lSbNV1-WJV7CgFNfN6H6Pg-VkyZWW8d9cgZ4qF6X6W7tnsv_82BmFXW54-3cd2M4vVWN8F01_hrt5cTW9kxzKH96GzrgW12HJsZ2FrlCjW26kYjf7WwPVHW7KwJ--7WZdmGW1pHf8F4LC_8HW8D-CdB8N4l01W812MWV7LwWLVW5XbdJ62PyvHjW2WScpG8br-mpW1PH8531GcP6HW3V9Csb7lX1yvN6J5_mwlJhzhW27tDsb6nDRpjW8yRQrS9gGvHHW8YqSl95WDk2BW4lFRPY38gD-0W2yp1KL962YCh3lY71)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
Yesterday was special for me because I got to visit my old stomping grounds in Virginia Beach! Between our stops at Anchor Allie's, The Commodore Theatre, Azalea Inn &Time Out Sports Bar, the Smithfield Inn, and even Nansemond Brewing Station, it was encouraging to see the support and momentum of Virginians who are ready for a new kind of leader in November!
---
---
Spending time with a large and energetic crowd in Suffolk was the perfect was to end Day 3. Crowds like this make me ready to get to work for you as your next Governor!
---
The #WinWithGlenn bus is quickly filling up with signatures as we sprint towards November 2. If you missed an event yesterday, there is still time! Today we are making stops in McKenney, Clarksville, South Boston, Chatham, and Danville. I hope to see you all there! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---

Between our stops at Anchor Allie's, The Commodore Theatre, Azalea Inn &Time Out Sports Bar, the Smithfield Inn, and even Nansemond Brewing Station, it was encouraging to see the support and momentum of Virginians who are ready for a new kind of leader in November! Spending time with a large and energetic crowd in Suffolk was the perfect was to end Day 3. Crowds like this make me ready to get to work for you as your next Governor! The #WinWithGlenn bus is quickly filling up with signatures as we sprint towards November 2. If you missed an event yesterday, there is still time! Today we are making stops in McKenney, Clarksville, South Boston, Chatham, and Danville. I hope to see you all there! For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: If you donate before our October deadline, you could get a call from Cheri to personally thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Cheri asked us to set aside some time to call and thank our grassroots donors personally.
#

Friends -
We’re incredibly grateful for the outpouring of grassroots support to our campaign. It means the world to Cheri that so many people have joined our fight to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat and bring new leadership to our state.
In fact, Cheri is so excited, she’s asked us to set aside some time to call and thank our grassroots donors personally. So we wanted to make sure you had a chance to get on the list.
**[If you want a chance to get a call from Cheri, please make a donation to our campaign to turn North Carolina blue and expand Democrats’ Senate majority today. Cheri will be calling folks who specifically donate to emails like this one before our October deadline, so she can thank you and talk about the issues on your mind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37964599/313366962/-572197399?refcode2=57169a4f-9736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211026-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzE2OWE0Zi05NzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnsCgCcy2ud3p-bWzvlG-ZIRdF6M3d9T0rGZ_fqqHVc=)**
Small-dollar donors are the backbone of this campaign. Nothing we do would be possible without the support of lots and lots of people giving any amount they can whenever they can.
And, unlike our Trump-endorsed opponent, Cheri isn’t pumping massive amounts of her own money into this race. She knows our democracy is not for sale. That’s not how you build a government that responds to the needs of working people and families.
But it does mean she’s counting on all of us to play a role in fighting back against the self-funders and dark money super PACs who want to buy this seat.
**[If you believe that we deserve a senator who listens to the people — not big money interests, then please make a donation of any amount you can today. Whether you give $5, $20, or $50, it’s people like you who power this campaign, so if you chip in before our end-of-month deadline, keep an eye on your phone because you could get a thank you call from Cheri!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37964600/313366992/-572197399?refcode2=57169a4f-9736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211026-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzE2OWE0Zi05NzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnsCgCcy2ud3p-bWzvlG-ZIRdF6M3d9T0rGZ_fqqHVc=)**
Cheri has said from the start that winning this Senate seat would require a bottom-up, people-powered effort in every corner of the state. That belief extends to how we fund this campaign, and Cheri’s excited to call small-dollar donors soon to share her thanks and talk about anything on your mind — whether that’s voting rights, her dog Stanley, the best place for North Carolina barbecue, her flute skills or something else!
Cheri will be deeply grateful for any support you can give today, so thank you in advance.
\- Team Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37964601/313366995/-572197399?refcode2=57169a4f-9736-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211026-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzE2OWE0Zi05NzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnsCgCcy2ud3p-bWzvlG-ZIRdF6M3d9T0rGZ_fqqHVc=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race is about our future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a84a6e55784647ef9aa4dbcab0734cc8&_e=7ouF84E3GgX2Gjz6oR7WUu4OC5HBhCHgRTgKu4YQT1qfwUis0gUhd11dMzmTk_ksSomZXje18o3W63XX5WVWGdGiO2KoumZDd5QyS4ClOqLH44Z140jxn_jCCojJYL84Dh2UWD-9Jhpz7KEX9rpWWJqkhcc86WzzU7F9GuUEsTNTtvRlZB4Y98Ym0xIQ1t-dVwZKhQaPTEu7OZXK2nL2sVZGauBA1JW-YADzllooim_LZaOiLQwanRy1tYAlCnj3XTYcGW6w9hK6eq96X26Pmzqt-tk0N8P8AIsZUIQq47oJnxaKpPFavBYh7aFgnxDayGg4JVmJ32vSY-IEccmCRhKgGxSsdgVHzZ-J1O9MS6-2mk5qgblZCuZjNQXPunVouGh5y0ywWqh7wsDfJ6XfA_IYrPDPHwweLRjZNY6C-DsvVnKlnAq8APppPTEUEax_Q93vC1ulTj2q37fzVodTMw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a84a6e55784647ef9aa4dbcab0734cc8&_e=7ouF84E3GgX2Gjz6oR7WUu4OC5HBhCHgRTgKu4YQT1qfwUis0gUhd11dMzmTk_ksSomZXje18o3W63XX5WVWGdGiO2KoumZDd5QyS4ClOqLH44Z140jxn_jCCojJYL84Dh2UWD-9Jhpz7KEX9rpWWJqkhcc86WzzU7F9GuUEsTNTtvRlZB4Y98Ym0xIQ1t-dVwZKhQaPTEu7OZXK2nL2sVZGauBA1JW-YADzllooim_LZaOiLQwanRy1tYAlCnj3BldJIPkC2stca7eO9UXTgdh6Yx2yrX8NGVPrq8JSJ0wnEK7bdWa7JQQPT9Gm4Ig939h5R68ryoNpX5-xfIzpSkpYudeXmveK6Nsa5xg1ql0dmsbIBuN9BIyyKDhGLh_tiujaVhGOH4ca_HomDMNQJsarNR6eADCk936ViIv3UHKrwFpsAbBXMjV9XomDm8AbXhB-xhnMrUCXxKeku-iM-g%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Peter, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

| Along with County Legislator Lynne Johnson and Yates Councilman John Riggi, I discussed the deeply unpopular Lighthouse wind project. Our residents, community stakeholders and local officials have been united in opposition to this project. Yet instead of listening to our voices, disgraced former Governor Andrew Cuomo listened to lobbyists and their big money donations.
The political ruling class in Albany loves to set aside local control and concerns in favor of a top-down, state-run agenda. Fortunately in the case of the Lighthouse wind project, our voices have been heard for now. But the battle to defend our values against faceless Albany bureaucrats, lobbyists and career politicians never ends.
I promise that I will never stop fighting alongside you for our local values and for control over the decisions that directly impact our communities. With your continued voice and support, we can push back on big government overreach and ensure our individual rights are protected.

Two more polls out today confirm what we've feared **-** 1 week out, the Virginia elections are tied and Republicans have the momentum. One poll has Terry McAuliffe's lead dropping 6% in a month to within the margin of error, and the other has the margin at just 0.4%. Yesterday's polls had the race tied, too. **Things are not looking great in Virginia. [We need your support to help power GOTV efforts this weekend.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37965315/313371063/-780405353?refcode=email_fr_20211026VAGOTV_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmNzRiZTMyLTk5MzYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jXPaBupsQGMHALhUOsrXj6vFsIVkFhY1oZM5P9aNE-M=)** Our 5 educator candidates could be the difference between Democrats winning and losing:
* Debra Gardner & Kim Melnyk have two of the best chances to pick-up Republican seats.
* Delegates Kelly Fowler, Schuyler VanValkenburg, and Shelly Simonds have to hang on if we're going to keep a Democratic majority.

Republicans sense an opportunity, and they've pumped over $150,000 into these 5 seats in the just the last week. That's on top of the $140,000 the Koch Brothers' operation has already spent against Debra Gardner. **[That's a mountain of money in these districts, and it's too much for our candidates to overcome on their own. # These shortages are a contrived crisis
---
The Biden Administration is creating unnecessary problems that threaten our economy and way of life. You have heard about the supply chain shortages--a contrived crisis due to unconstitutional and inhumane vaccine mandates leading to unnecessary labor shortages. This shortage is impacting more than just holiday shopping--food prices and the costs of essentials are climbing while everyday items grow scarce.
This can be stopped, but Michael Bennet sits idly by, kowtowing to a reckless administration.
In my positions as Global Logistics Manager and Procurement Manager for Noble Energy, I became an expert in Supply Chain Management. I understand the critical importance of maintaining an efficient flow of goods and materials, and the significant impact degrading the global supply chain has on our economy.
We must rescind this unconstitutional vaccine mandate and any undue restrictions on our labor force to reopen our ports immediately. Now is not the time to play chicken with freedom-loving American workers who are essential to our economic well-being.

I'm thrilled to join my colleague Rep. Hakeem Jeffries and former Attorney General Eric Holder Jr. for tomorrow's virtual event supporting Judge Lane, and I'd love to see you there if you can make it!

Friend,

Judge Lane has already been endorsed by numerous labor groups, advocacy groups, and current and former elected officials, and has received a recommendation for the Superior Court from the Pennsylvania Bar Association. name: Ruth Gao
subject: Why I am running for US Senate
body:
We need new leadership in Washington | _You're receiving this email because of your support for Democrats. But we don't want to send anyone an email who doesn't want to receive it. Please click here to [unsubscribe.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk7ZdSh6orelFHVYOgakF1Tc9w1V-sz7FiGW0r77bIcnnhA4JhvMzOyCQn5xaW1SVVbCDyEfjjb0WSswLM4GDt3d_f2xJgruSmc_SFDv11HuBtYqY1Kji7VjeYmV8TvFMBHQjVCzC_UxG2fHdP5eaYQcqaKRDMM3GNdSNKWj_d-2mavjVNn6_e9wY2wKRejgsRsS6LUPFV06KYhJSweCrzKFZ3AcDBo9dHu9OTlGEITug/3gh/ZiSCuPTYRdOpwMFW5SRwgQ/h0/OuFyX4Bgc2PR8w99lQFFE90nrJlxBE3yAei21eF_RjU)_
---
|
---
|
---
Hey Peter, I am reaching out to share a bit more with you about why I am running for US Senate. You see, I get asked a lot why I jumped into this big of a race at such a young age and how I think I can win. I wanted to share with you a bit about me and what I care about that propels me in this race.
1. **I am a Kentuckian who cares about seeing a better tomorrow for our state.** I want to build a better world for my children-to-be to grow up in. Kentucky ranks 45th out of 50 in public education in the United States. In 2017 53% of Kentuckians were getting their water from utilities with at least one violation of federal safety regulations. Kentucky needs a leader who will tirelessly work on these, and other, foundational issues every day in Washington.
2. **I am an average citizen.** I don't come from a political background or money. My husband and I work normal jobs. I've been an enrollment counselor and essential worker in the food industry during COVID and my husband is a software engineer. I understand juggling work and school and keeping the house clean. In Washington, I will represent the American middle class, and fight for structures that make middle class life accessible to all Americans.
3. **I will represent the younger generation.** As young people we are faced with rising costs, climate change, and more issues that we will have to live with as we grow older. The average of of our current Senators is around 64 year old. Most Senators have not experienced the issues we are facing today. We need people in the Senate who understand the issues we face today and the urgency to address issues we are facing such as climate change.
4. **I understand the conversations needed to flip this state blue.** I had conservative friends and family growing up, and as an adult have had my own journey to where I am today as a Democratic candidate. I believe this journey will resonate and connect with many who are growing frustrated with our current representatives. If we want to see Kentucky flip blue, it is vital that we connect with those Independent and Republican voters who dislike current GOP leadership and gain their votes. I believe that we can find common ground for the common wealth and that involves engaging with these voters and helping them understand the issues at stake and how I plan to address these issues.

---
|
---
Kentuckians deserve to make a livable wage working only one job. We deserve drinking water that is safe. We deserve affordable high speed internet. We deserve access to healthcare, especially in rural areas where hospital consolidation has left communities in despair. Kentucky is behind in many of these areas because our leaders have not prioritized growth. I believe in Kentuckians and that we are ready and eager for change. I am here to fight for Kentucky and making our state a shining beacon of growth. **Help me fight to see new leadership in Washington that will put the people of Kentucky first. Join us by donating TODAY to our low-dollar grassroots movement. **
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate: clean_body: We need new leadership in Washington | You're receiving this email because of your support for Democrats. But we don't want to send anyone an email who doesn't want to receive it. Please click here to | | Hey Peter, I am reaching out to share a bit more with you about why I am running for US Senate. You see, I get asked a lot why I jumped into this big of a race at such a young age and how I think I can win. I wanted to share with you a bit about me and what I care about that propels me in this race. 1. I am a Kentuckian who cares about seeing a better tomorrow for our state. I want to build a better world for my children-to-be to grow up in. Kentucky ranks 45th out of 50 in public education in the United States. In 2017 53% of Kentuckians were getting their water from utilities with at least one violation of federal safety regulations. Kentucky needs a leader who will tirelessly work on these, and other, foundational issues every day in Washington. 2. I am an average citizen. I don't come from a political background or money. My husband and I work normal jobs. I've been an enrollment counselor and essential worker in the food industry during COVID and my husband is a software engineer. I understand juggling work and school and keeping the house clean. In Washington, I will represent the American middle class, and fight for structures that make middle class life accessible to all Americans. 3. I will represent the younger generation. As young people we are faced with rising costs, climate change, and more issues that we will have to live with as we grow older. The average of of our current Senators is around 64 year old. Most Senators have not experienced the issues we are facing today. We need people in the Senate who understand the issues we face today and the urgency to address issues we are facing such as climate change. 4. I understand the conversations needed to flip this state blue. I had conservative friends and family growing up, and as an adult have had my own journey to where I am today as a Democratic candidate. I believe this journey will resonate and connect with many who are growing frustrated with our current representatives. If we want to see Kentucky flip blue, it is vital that we connect with those Independent and Republican voters who dislike current GOP leadership and gain their votes. I believe that we can find common ground for the common wealth and that involves engaging with these voters and helping them understand the issues at stake and how I plan to address these issues. | Kentuckians deserve to make a livable wage working only one job. We deserve drinking water that is safe. We deserve affordable high speed internet. We deserve access to healthcare, especially in rural areas where hospital consolidation has left communities in despair. Kentucky is behind in many of these areas because our leaders have not prioritized growth. I believe in Kentuckians and that we are ready and eager for change. I am here to fight for Kentucky and making our state a shining beacon of growth. Help me fight to see new leadership in Washington that will put the people of Kentucky first. Join us by donating TODAY to our low-dollar grassroots movement. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Together we can win this, | | | | | | | ?linkid=14&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-big-announcement-50&emailreferrer=email1335328&emailsubject=why-i-am-running-for-us-senate Contact us at: mailto:info@ruthgao.com To donate by check, please mail to PO Box 20152, Louisville, KY 40250 (Please include your address, employer, and occupation for FEC filing purposes) Any donations to Ruth Gao for KY are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . It’s one of the best times of the year -- some of my favorite memories are trick-or-treating with my children on Halloween.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37965661/313372523/866100859?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.26_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmYxMGJjMi05YTM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAPS-tzwWIIBdc8aryvxTPQXAlTfgYd7EXGx-jxyXtU=)
**But this year it has taken on a whole new meaning: My campaign’s October fundraising deadline falls on Halloween at midnight.**

Earlier this month, my team and I pulled the numbers and did the math, and we landed on **$25,000 as the amount we need to raise to keep everything in our budget. Unfortunately, I’m reaching out today to report that we have fallen behind on our goal.**
**[But it’s not too late. We have just under a week to turn this around, and I know I can count on you to help get us there. clean_body: Just $5 makes a difference = Hey Peter, It’s one of the best times of the year -- some of my favorite memories are trick-or-treating with my children on Halloween. = But this year it has taken on a whole new meaning: My campaign’s October fundraising deadline falls on Halloween at midnight. Earlier this month, my team and I pulled the numbers and did the math, and we landed on $25,000 as the amount we need to raise to keep everything in our budget. Unfortunately, I’m reaching out today to report that we have fallen behind on our goal. = | = = = I’ll be closely monitoring the online donations that come in before midnight on Halloween, and I hope I’ll see your name on our list. Let’s do this! name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Tim and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5671?t=1006&akid=1260%2E3611125%2EKE0wWG ]A personal message from Tery McAuliffe

Folks --

We are just days away from Election Day in Virginia, and polls are tied in
the campaign for Governor. There’s no doubt this is 2021’s most important
race.

I’m up against an extremist who has pushed Donald Trump’s “big lie.” He’s
peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most
far-right supporters.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5671?t=1007&akid=1260%2E3611125%2EKE0wWG ]If you don’t have time to read the rest of this email, you can click
here to split your donation between my campaign and Tim Ryan right away.
>>

Tim’s Senate campaign is also a must-win race -- Ohio’s open Senate seat
has been dubbed 2022’s most important race. He’s up against radical
opponents who are raking in campaign cash from Trump’s cronies and recent
polling shows a razor-thin margin.

So much is riding on these elections, folks.

If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we will win on November 2. If
they don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can say goodbye to Democrats’
progress and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

Folks, I need your help to stop that from happening -- or it
could also spell trouble in 2022 for Tim as well.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5671?t=1008&akid=1260%2E3611125%2EKE0wWG ]Please, split a donation right now, and help us turn out the voters we
need to keep Virginia blue -- and turn Ohio blue.

Thanks,

Terry
Democratic Candidate for Governor of Virginia

name: Team Ted
subject: Hold big polluters accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Deutch for Congress
body:
| Team,

Putting a price on carbon is the **biggest and boldest step** we can take to respond to climate change. We all know how urgent the climate crisis is and we need to respond now for the sake of our planet's future.

Ted has championed the Energy Innovation and Carbon Dividend Act, _which will deliver near zero carbon emissions by 2050 and will rebate 100% of the polluters' payments to America's families._ We need to make big changes **before it is too late.**

[Will you add your name now to show your support for a zero carbon emissions America?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37966077/313374141/1047599996?refcode=TD_EM_PT_12MO_211026_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2ZiNjljOC05YjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHx22CBaRdAaDCGzo8MikvmRrQoSa3oXH_UD_bE7AjU=&emci=8e5031c2-9b36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27fb69c8-9b36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=740803) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37966078/313374142/1047599996?refcode=TD_EM_PT_12MO_211026_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2ZiNjljOC05YjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHx22CBaRdAaDCGzo8MikvmRrQoSa3oXH_UD_bE7AjU=&emci=8e5031c2-9b36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27fb69c8-9b36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=740803)
---

Thanks to all the grassroots activists like you it is possible to see progressive climate change solutions. While some seek to weaken the climate provisions in the Build Back Better Act, we know that we must continue to push for serious climate legislation. We cannot let our plans to protect the environment be stalled any longer; _time is running out!_

Americans must lead the way to a greener future, beginning with a carbon tax that finally makes polluters pay. We can make these progressive and market-based solutions a reality with the carbon tax.

**Ted will continue to work hard to defend our planet’s future. Now, he needs to know you support climate legislation that fights for long-term solutions to our climate crisis.** [Add your name now to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37966079/313374143/1047599996?refcode=TD_EM_PT_12MO_211026_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2ZiNjljOC05YjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHx22CBaRdAaDCGzo8MikvmRrQoSa3oXH_UD_bE7AjU=&emci=8e5031c2-9b36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=27fb69c8-9b36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=740803)

Thank you,

Team Ted

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race is bigger than me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c5afdc70b47415eb66fcaf9194351eb&_e=FbKEg6-_5MYTXOQPCa_72IFwdXd-9P2c5enbN91CvcosXinrg50hNj74ia_WhonKs3DmeSapV9czTKtEia1QFWsg1CpG5Jm9WAaBp7yoKz3MMCgOnGOUoqH_RP4tTsah98qqY-cqITi96O38gLnxy8IZC57qMTNG-8nZ9tI5ty9H8abjh2kaCMUqF3sZHxHtrMDpJe5dO1IOJmQV2wHmQix6yw2HgP4GtlAKmClbTREukIVZ6mf3z1ypQvVV52l8VqRl9-Zn5IbUskTUpWzmGeQxfC4g-Cj3tGBmiBwRr7Ik2lxrsQ30tPRuf3hrctlb_PaWZgyiNMP20k0Eu0E8ovR3CQA5sMCO6_myRgNSOfqaXMzqbxq-nxtpI681mx4VgD6JElzjLhjDNlXgjAM2dVpLz-qbqjHyPfY3lIRJvUl6w9TyzCtZp3AlE5jJ9iBFKzboYUALkBsqYCWb9F8PQA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c5afdc70b47415eb66fcaf9194351eb&_e=FbKEg6-_5MYTXOQPCa_72IFwdXd-9P2c5enbN91CvcosXinrg50hNj74ia_WhonKs3DmeSapV9czTKtEia1QFWsg1CpG5Jm9WAaBp7yoKz3MMCgOnGOUoqH_RP4tTsah98qqY-cqITi96O38gLnxy8IZC57qMTNG-8nZ9tI5ty9H8abjh2kaCMUqF3sZHxHtrMDpJe5dO1IOJmQV2wHmQix6yw2HgP4GtlAKmClbTRGIZvIIKHQh1mqw9mH0bKvTUNPt12aOKjlbj_LLUxsG_OSNuZdrG63Cv-Ea1F5slxnVNiOiBZiaMgkPDuDbj278mJEbAbub_Z0hBICDvN4BW7hb-jOr5EoGtwkX8K1PlS4-LQcoCXY2cFGi0wv-jRSdLg_h2ZxX6rOKZ8Zc84geBcZYD4iXUW8DTZA0DrESrHaDN3QBuCIv-PNBo9dVUp0SYaeHGOCiNG-jX9jcNj-49w%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c5afdc70b47415eb66fcaf9194351eb&_e=FbKEg6-_5MYTXOQPCa_72IFwdXd-9P2c5enbN91CvcosXinrg50hNj74ia_WhonKs3DmeSapV9czTKtEia1QFWsg1CpG5Jm9WAaBp7yoKz3MMCgOnGOUoqH_RP4tTsah98qqY-cqITi96O38gLnxy8IZC57qMTNG-8nZ9tI5ty9H8abjh2kaCMUqF3sZHxHtrMDpJe5dO1IOJmQV2wHmQix6yw2HgP4GtlAKmClbTREyYlrrx-svlWuH74eGiH0547mQPJxRLNYubzzpTnc-Thv9YedIF8uq7JrGJ1mKeApp4fYdnzsJpcAWl4GdKQp94_e2slbtIXAz_NGt2f7ZDNDt26Bq0SnJ1FakAeZRIrePH1PoRDnWBm9ZhLw9HFl1WeKRYkYx9FpmI2CQqRZfvCAhmhPzniiLzsdKUiKODa7jPUJRLEnbXZVpa030Mv7SNUzcc4aUaTXVmqg9PQiHpA%3D%3D)**

[**Send $5, $10, $34 or more our way today ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c5afdc70b47415eb66fcaf9194351eb&_e=FbKEg6-_5MYTXOQPCa_72IFwdXd-9P2c5enbN91CvcosXinrg50hNj74ia_WhonKs3DmeSapV9czTKtEia1QFWsg1CpG5Jm9WAaBp7yoKz3MMCgOnGOUoqH_RP4tTsah98qqY-cqITi96O38gLnxy8IZC57qMTNG-8nZ9tI5ty9H8abjh2kaCMUqF3sZHxHtrMDpJe5dO1IOJmQV2wHmQix6yw2HgP4GtlAKmClbTRGvO9zl9kijUCXEj2oAvWiI5w1Io6izjRn9sfbbL53a56-ZQsEL3sjR-PE2Hx9vX6C7ybpui9xz6di08_S_Q37sWGWOAfYtIDxz1_M81jz6b5SOvTwwY-ip8mBXuV_3RJAKYlNcIwUTy1ubD1yghgNbNo9PSfHa4wVkyXBpNlGrWz4cqWzoumGgo3fL1VYGHlqEtuspqlpgJjX14l7yC7_jDvSpzIbA-mUACdShhY08-A%3D%3D)
I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

Democrats know what's at stake.

Republicans know what's at stake.

I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now.

The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - _**and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg.**_

I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America.

I hope you'll join us on this journey.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c5afdc70b47415eb66fcaf9194351eb&_e=FbKEg6-_5MYTXOQPCa_72IFwdXd-9P2c5enbN91CvcosXinrg50hNj74ia_WhonKs3DmeSapV9czTKtEia1QFWsg1CpG5Jm9WAaBp7yoKz3MMCgOnGOUoqH_RP4tTsah98qqY-cqITi96O38gLnxy8IZC57qMTNG-8nZ9tI5ty9H8abjh2kaCMUqF3sZHxHtrMDpJe5dO1IOJmQV2wHmQix6yw2HgP4GtlAKmClbTRGFfF-XZ8aOMQRByrnOrEMwDzQTm9-S0bRhCbXGPyFF0YPp4qI5VdVdc5W6r0fmw17zHP8tozsEGSiwGlAMYvRe4zlu-pjldq_zOL-LUe1ju2W5ZTMBkrD9Ut3FSreQY_xRg0YYITmGuv0r77dSOeAyVLBFvzxbHwrRW3jTVz2NCMmhUrseSs-4jzbZJfqYhtT1rG1BgWQPShXppGBt59hLc5igUW0DZJHMyKnmMY0Dfw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. | Fellow American, As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now. While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party. This race is about the future of America. Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs. When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path. That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself. I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important. Democrats know what's at stake. Republicans know what's at stake. I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg. I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America. I hope you'll join us on this journey. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Strong fundraising is our best opportunity to show my Republican opponents that I don’t plan on giving up this seat and that I will fight to the finish to keep it blue. = | = It’s been a busy time in Congress. I’ve been working on crucial issues like the passage of the historic infrastructure bill, protecting reproductive health care, and supporting mental health services for college students. I am so proud to do this work for families and workers in the greater Lehigh Valley and across the country — and I also know that it’s only possible with a Democratic majority in Congress. If we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022, we cannot afford to lose a single seat. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: We hand-delivered your signatures––all 40,000 of them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Keep the momentum up and the pressure on.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3943?t=3&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O) Friend, Last week, we joined our partners in the climate movement to hand-deliver a petition to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen ahead of a major climate report's release. **40,000 climate advocates like you signed on to a petition to demand she use every tool she can to address the climate crisis.** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3943?t=4&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O) That new report is now out. While it's a good first step at addressing climate change's serious threat to our country's financial stability, it's far from enough. With a climate-fueled financial crash more likely by the day, we need Secretary Yellen to rise to the moment and take bold action. [**_Will you help keep up the pressure by tweeting @SecYellen and demanding she take action against Big Polluters and fossil fuel financing? (We've drafted language for you, so just click here if you'd like to join our social pressure campaign.)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3943?t=5&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O) | [SEND TWEET](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3943?t=6&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O)
---
The new report acknowledges the threat climate change will have on our financial systems. But acknowledgements and academic studies are not the same thing as action.
Because here are the stakes: Our pensions, small business loans, retirement funds, and college savings accounts are at risk.
Secretary Yellen, now is the time for action. Now is the time to shut down the money pipeline that's financing fossil fuels and threatening lives and livelihoods.
[**_Will you take a quick, simple action today so that Secretary Yellen knows where you stand? Tweet @SecYellen to keep the momentum up and the pressure on._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3943?t=7&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O)
[TWEET @ YELLEN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3943?t=8&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O)
---
Let's do this,
Lena Moffitt
Campaigns Director, Evergreen Action
P.S. Don't have Twitter? No problem. [**_Click here to share our memo on how the president and Treasury Department can prevent a climate-fueled crash with your friends and family on Facebook._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1113?t=9&akid=12893%2E53494%2EZgCi2O)

name: (1) New Message | Left Action
subject: Contact your Representatives: Support Paid Parental Leave!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Congress: Support Paid Parental Leave! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23d2d37d-b43c-4519-a676-9788188ea7c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[
](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68500057-ddb6-4ff6-a68a-6a7b0523d52b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[Email Your Representatives Now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T325d097b-7485-4be4-a544-d26370fecf67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac562c44-a913-4a2f-9c14-0afc87cd416d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Listen, the U.S. is one of just 6 countries with no national paid leave. Parents deserve to take paid time off to spend time with their newborns and not have to worry about work. But Republicans don’t agree -- and they are fighting tooth and nail to prevent paid leave from becoming a reality. Recently, Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg was attacked and mocked by Tucker Carlson and other Republicans for taking parental leave after the birth of his two children. These attacks are disgusting, and an insult to every parent. Right now, Democrats are fighting to pass President Biden’s progressive spending bill. They’ve already had to cut down their proposed 12 weeks of paid parental and medical leave to 4 weeks. We can’t let it get cut out completely. [_Send an email to your Representatives in Congress_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b05f715-8981-4403-9b30-a7272d9e23ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and tell them you support paid leave so that every new parent can spend the time they deserve with their children.
---
| | | | [SEND AN EMAIL >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17bf2ef4-45db-4b07-92a7-c47c297300d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |

Peter,
**We are officially ONE WEEK away from Election Day.** ****
I am excited to announce that this is my FINAL weekly fundraising deadline. My team and I MUST reach $75,000 by FRIDAY. **[ALL donations made this week will go directly towards handing out yards signs, staffing last-minute door knockers, and pushing people to the polls to VOTE GLENN.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58618111:6dZVe32zN:m:1:3253819041:AC5CA3B7247E1B066D5C08E49045E802:r)** | | [**CHIP IN TO REACH MY FINAL WEEKLY GOAL!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58618111:6dZVe32zN:m:1:3253819041:AC5CA3B7247E1B066D5C08E49045E802:r)
---
This race is a dead tie, and if I don't reach my final weekly fundraising goal we are going to be in trouble come Election Day.

The clock is ticking, and coming up short is not an option.

_**Can I count on you to help me reach my FINAL weekly goal before it 's too late?**_
**[Yes GLENN! You can count on me!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58618111:6dZVe32zN:m:1:3253819041:AC5CA3B7247E1B066D5C08E49045E802:r)** | [**DONATE $25 > > > **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58618112:6dZVe32zN:m:1:3253819041:AC5CA3B7247E1B066D5C08E49045E802:r)

Terry McAuliffe knows this race is a dead tie, and he is getting nervous. I know he is going to pull every trick in the book to pull ahead in the polls. **We MUST BE PREPARED for this.**
