subject: Do you have your plan to vote?
body:
| | Friend, **You’ve got an election coming up in just ✨ one week! ✨ There’s no better time to make your plan to vote than right now.** On November 2, (if you haven’t already voted) your vote will decide Pennsylvania’s next Supreme Court justice. When you vote this year, you’ll be setting Pennsylvania on a path that represents young Pennsylvanians across the commonwealth. [Make sure you’re ready to make your voice heard this election season by planning how and where you’re going to vote with our Pennsylvania ballot guide!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37966824/313377950/-2081221193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDg2YjhhZC05ZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mVu35RvT3kS1YBmCBhn6NE6LrdSwM4PKl2tBrSUAJu4=&emci=7901c338-a735-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d86b8ad-9f36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37966828/313377963/1454231216?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDg2YjhhZC05ZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mVu35RvT3kS1YBmCBhn6NE6LrdSwM4PKl2tBrSUAJu4=&emci=7901c338-a735-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d86b8ad-9f36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37966833/313377976/1454231216?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDg2YjhhZC05ZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mVu35RvT3kS1YBmCBhn6NE6LrdSwM4PKl2tBrSUAJu4=&emci=7901c338-a735-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d86b8ad-9f36-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) ** With major decision-makers on the ballot this year for the entire commonwealth, it’s important we get our votes in. clean_body: | | Friend, You’ve got an election coming up in just ✨ one week! ✨ There’s no better time to make your plan to vote than right now. On November 2, (if you haven’t already voted) your vote will decide Pennsylvania’s next Supreme Court justice. When you vote this year, you’ll be setting Pennsylvania on a path that represents young Pennsylvanians across the commonwealth. With major decision-makers on the ballot this year for the entire commonwealth, it’s important we get our votes in. We have the power to decide how we want the future of Pennsylvania to look, we just need to keep showing up as we have in the past. Thank you, Natalie Monteiro Pennsylvania Organizing Manager NextGen Pennsylvania | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

Terry McAuliffe is doing everything he can to pull ahead in the polls...he even has Barack Obama, Stacey Abrams, and Kamala Harris campaigning for him.

clean_body: The latest voter registration reports show we have the edge. | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this month’s latest report... Wisconsin's 7th congressional district -- the state’s most conservative district -- has nearly 100,000 MORE registered voters than Wisconsin’s most liberal district covering Milwaukee. Not only do we have all the momentum in this governor’s race, but we also have a clear LEAD among registered Wisconsin voters. But I’m counting on YOUR help to double-down on this advantage. We need to raise another $23,570 before the end-of-month deadline to register another 100,000 conservative voters. For just a little over $4, you’re helping us secure one more critical conservative vote in our fight to take back this battleground state from the Democrats. The pundits are claiming that our race is a 50-50 toss-up, but these numbers prove we have the edge. The people of our great state have lived through Tony Evers’ failures time and again, and they are ready for true conservative leadership. No more keeping our kids out of the classroom, no more “woke” agendas, no more abandoning our law enforcement, and no more leaving the hardworking men and women of our state out to dry. No more failure. Friend, Tony Evers’ failures are exactly why conservative districts across Wisconsin continue to register voters at an exponentially higher rate. But we can’t let this opportunity pass us by. Now is our chance to seal Evers’ fate in this race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Jake Evans
subject: Election Integrity NOW!
body:
I have been fighting for election integrity for...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friends,
When we talk about election fraud, most people think about the 2020 Election, but fraud has been happening in our elections for decades now.
I don't just talk about election integrity for votes, as an election lawyer and Georgia's former Ethics Commission Chair, I have been exposing and rooting out fraud for years.
Nearly three years ago I was the [first election lawyer in the state](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ExQRX_ZUo1hHevG26o2nrxB24xY7Mx4_99n4qXX5CJIxyELlD9SZx9Gm_LOYKm_DXaqBo5I3eXNslaJasFQJLAnUoU4CBgbsmXKeYCdbyMOaBUAa2GC2dnp9k-Aea5Vx-9mPQfUVJFbnodgR2rd8f9cr35mN9-6s9dBUWohzJYCgj_XqKkIq0bqkJuF0-Ulix5yLVk4GhZtqUPtFDhv0A==&c=-cnpqMQsQezeufjOagWK4MFOmrF4q3mu9Kja0a5Fxy0RQV1kdvJb8w==&ch=cEfhTiP3cek1_MPW2gsDBh1hiTI5rSwF7vnnbBeAK7GZBLJOCbi3gQ==) of Georgia to not just overturn an election in the courts once, but twice. I made it my mission as Ethics Commission Chairman to take on the corrupt politicians enabling fraud.
I fought hard to drain the Atlanta Swamp by taking on Stacey Abrams, Keisha Lance Bottoms and anyone else who tried to weaken our elections.
Support my America First Campaign TODAY and I will work to drain the DC Swamp just like I did the Atlanta Swamp.
[A donation of $5, $10, $15, $25, or more will help our campaign win in 2022 and STOP Speaker Pelosi and Joe Biden from permanently destroying federal election integrity with bills like HR1 and HR4.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ExQRX_ZUo1hHevG26o2nrxB24xY7Mx4_99n4qXX5CJIxyELlD9SZ_rZDkZLqtDZWzepF3nxnpGfpFeX2vtJwve9Obg6srK18OoPbQIgZ0BqXrEnXZQQoDX4-HciceBE-6sDB79HkH7embe40L38I78yIf3qWheLiIs2oj28oNQoJ5uHo248V9WRPiJ5J6IP&c=-cnpqMQsQezeufjOagWK4MFOmrF4q3mu9Kja0a5Fxy0RQV1kdvJb8w==&ch=cEfhTiP3cek1_MPW2gsDBh1hiTI5rSwF7vnnbBeAK7GZBLJOCbi3gQ==)

name: Team Padilla
subject: It’s going to take a massive effort to organize across California and hold this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

**Bad news first:** Now that the recall failed, the same anti-immigrant, anti-science, far-right, Trump-supporting Republicans who funded it are going to set their sights on Alex next.
_They pose a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and across the country. They’d love to beat Alex and end our ability to fight for a cleaner planet, comprehensive immigration reform, or voting rights._
**Now for the good news:** We’re building the sort of grassroots movement that’s capable of taking them on and winning. This month alone, thousands of people have endorsed Alex’s campaign. That’s huge, because it’s going to take a massive effort to organize across California and hold this seat.
**So we are asking for your help today. We need to hold this Senate seat in California and expand our majority so it becomes impossible for Mitch McConnell and his allies to block us from the minority.**
[**Can you please chip in $5, or any amount, to our grassroots campaign today? We’re still a bit short of our October fundraising goal, and your support is essential if we’re going to get there.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211026-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=417_159979_7n1JZt&akid=417%2E159979%2E7n1JZt)
**[CHIP IN](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211026-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=417_159979_7n1JZt&akid=417%2E159979%2E7n1JZt)**
Alex’s fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful interests who want to stop us.
But as long as we continue to stand together, our grassroots movement is stronger than any special interest.
Thank you for your support, it really means a lot to be in this fight together.
\- Team Padilla_
**[CHIP IN](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211026-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=417_159979_7n1JZt&akid=417%2E159979%2E7n1JZt)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=417%2E159979%2E7n1JZt)

clean_body: How are we letting this guy win? | | | = | | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 — a recent poll from an A-rated FiveThirtyEight pollster shows a DEAD HEAT, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year. My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us and outspend us. People are acting like this is a sure thing — that Virginia is a blue state. Let me tell you: it isn’t.** People need to start stepping it up. This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy. Let’s get this done, folks. – Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Drew Thompson
subject: No More.
body:
[](https://) **Leftists burned our cities and politicians cowered. No more.** Peter, Over a year ago, left wing rioters marched through our cities, burned our businesses, and attacked our brave men and women in law enforcement. They vandalized and defaced cities like Columbus while our elected officials stood idly by, or worse, praised their efforts. Unlike many of the spineless leaders in office, Jane Timken will not be a Senator who sits on the sidelines while Ohio is ravaged by the left and law enforcement is left out in the cold. subject: 45,000 urgent responses requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will YOU be joining Donald Trump's new social media site?
| |
| | **45,000 URGENT RESPONSES REQUESTED**

We're deeply concerned.

After being BANNED from Facebook and Twitter for spreading lies and disinformation, Trump has launched his own social media platform.

We're collecting urgent data on where our grassroots supporters stand, so we're asking you directly:

**Will YOU be joining Donald Trump 's new social media site?**
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf49-)
---|---|---

We're deeply concerned.

_**Donald Trump just unveiled a brand new social media site.**_

And now we can't help but remember what happened the last time Trump had unfettered access to a large social media following:

\-- He spread **MISINFORMATION** about COVID-19.
\-- He **LIED** about his loss in the 2020 election.
\-- And he even **INCITED** a deadly insurrection!

It's horrifying to imagine what Trump could do now that he's created his own social media site -- where he'll once again be able to whip his fringe base into a frenzy.

**And since Trump appears to be exploring a THIRD run for president, it 's more important than ever that we do everything we can to drown out the lies of this lawless, one-term president.**

That's why we're collecting data on where our best grassroots supporters stand on this pivotal issue.
**Quickly, let us know: Will YOU be joining Donald Trump 's new social media site?**
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf49-)
---|---|---
**
**

Thank you,

DCCC

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Exposing the media’s lies about Fauci
body:
The media is the ONLY reason why Anthony Fauci is not yet behind bars for lying to Congress [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c425%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=QVJwvg2ohqGonTv1PXO%2fvA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66308%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWoAqyPGE6sYBskB5JOXkQ&sysid=1)
Friend,

The media is the ONLY reason why Anthony Fauci is not yet behind bars for lying to Congress, destroying millions of jobs, lives, and businesses... but all of that is coming to an end.

**Let me tell you how the Media Research Center is EXPOSING the left-wing media’s coverup for Anthony Fauci and what is going to happen to this traitor next. **

**Here is how the media covered up Anthony Fauci’s criminal activity:**

**FIRST:** Anthony Fauci lied to Congress about the effectiveness of masks and lockdowns. Senator Rand Paul heroically called him out! That’s when Fauci doubled down and LIED about funding research done in Wuhan China on bats with COVID-19.

**NEXT:** The Media spin machine did everything in their power to cover up Fauci’s mistakes, promote his SICK agenda, and defend his lies. MSNBC, ABC, the New York Times, and the usual suspects promoted Anthony Fauci as a hero or our savior.

**NOW:** The Media Research Center has recorded and monitored ALL of Fauci’s public lies and now there is evidence that Fauci LIED to Congress about funding research in Wuhan China labs for Gain-of-Function research.

[**The Media Research Center is on the attack! I am demanding Anthony Fauci be FIRED and even ARRESTED for his lies. Please donate $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or ANY amount to help MRC expose the leftwing media. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66309%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ij3XK%2b3zQXXuk4eaUy%2fcRA&sysid=1)
[**Donate $20.22 >>

**Donate $100 >>**

Donate Other >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66308%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWoAqyPGE6sYBskB5JOXkQ&sysid=1)
Now let me tell you what’s going to happen to Anthony Fauci and the leftwing media next.

First, please allow me to introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to our efforts exposing bias in the media, 90% of Americans do not TRUST the media as a reliable source of information.

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.

**_So what’s going to happen to Anthony Fauci and the leftwing media next_? **

The Media Research Center is fighting back! You can help us expose leftwing bias in the media, _pressure the elite to hold Fauci accountable for his lies_ , and allow our nation the chance to heal and recover from the damage he has already done.

News has also broken that Fauci funded research in Tunisia that tortured and even killed dogs... You and I can put an end to this SICK man’s career and expose the evil hacks in the media who defended this traitor.

[**Please help me DEFEAT the leftwing media and their lies by becoming a supporter of the Media Research Center today!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66300%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XygpfpMJNSnsFYCAEN3W5Q&sysid=1)

[**Donate $10 >>

Donate $1,000 >>
Donate Other >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66308%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWoAqyPGE6sYBskB5JOXkQ&sysid=1)
The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization recording the media 24/7, identifying lies, exposing false media coverage, and holding the media accountable.

Our efforts have led to reporters being terminated for fake news reporting, major news publications retracting false statements, apologies from news personalities, and more.

**I truly believe you and I can put an end to Anthony Fauci’s reign as a petty tyrant by exposing the media’s lies and showing the American people who this leftist “hero” really is. **

Much like the federal government needs checks and balances, so does the media.

The radical leftwing media has become a powerful force in American politics and we risk an entire generation of young people never hearing about the real truth from credible sources.

[**Friend, please help me fight back by investing in the Media Research Center’s efforts to defeat the leftwing media and expose Anthony Fauci!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66301%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1drhtw3SSBL%2bXT79xfLAog&sysid=1)

The leftwing media protects Fauci... MRC exposes the truth about him.

The leftwing media promotes ideas such as AOC’s Green New Deal, insane transgender policies, Critical Race Theory, and big government... MRC spreads the truth and exposes the madness of these ideas.

I have committed my life’s work to exposing the media.

This cause is important to me and it would mean a great deal to earn your support for the media Research Center’s mission.

[**Please prayerfully consider making a generous donation of any amount by clicking here.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66302%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hoO6WCSsvrznuhORL1Qbog&sysid=1)

My hope is that this email reaches you and you’ll help me reach my goal of raising $5,000 in the next 48 hours.

Thank you for everything you do.

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968243/313383502/-2057546413?refcode=20211026_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmFhYmM5OC1hMzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9JFZ0heE3XEdOX-TrZxDVsP5iS0QKFySrt9PP3VneU=) Friend, JD Vance’s garbage book, _Hillbilly Elegy_ , costs $12.35. You can buy a copy to use as a coaster (or a doorstop, or a chew toy for your dog), OR you can donate $12.35 to our campaign to flip Ohio blue and expand the Senate majority. **While JD Vance pretends to be your average Ohioan, he couldn’t be more out of touch. After years of working in Silicon Valley boardrooms, Vance’s qualifications for the Senate include the backing of a $10 million super PAC from billionaire Trump lackey Peter Thiel, and a record of bashing the working class and even blaming them for their economic struggles.** [**Can you donate $12.35 (or more!) -- split between Tim Ryan and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC -- to make sure JD Vance never becomes the next Senator from Ohio? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968244/313383503/2038802527?refcode=20211026_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmFhYmM5OC1hMzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9JFZ0heE3XEdOX-TrZxDVsP5iS0QKFySrt9PP3VneU=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968245/313383504/-2057546413?refcode=20211026_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmFhYmM5OC1hMzM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9JFZ0heE3XEdOX-TrZxDVsP5iS0QKFySrt9PP3VneU=)
Folks, you don’t need to read JD Vance’s book to hear him push dangerous myths about the challenges facing working families in Ohio and around the country -- his policies and rhetoric are proof that at the end of the day, he only cares about making the rich richer. **There’s only one person in this race who we can trust to cut workers in on the deal, and that’s Tim.** [**A recent poll has us one point ahead of Vance -- but we’ve got to keep our momentum! name: Team Fetterman
subject: An update for PA voters ✉️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ve got one week until the PA municipal elections.
#
**Hi****Peter — Eric here, with another update about Election Day in Pennsylvania.** It’s just a week from today, on Tuesday, November 2!
If you’re a Pennsylvania voter, you might have seen our messages these past few weeks about the voter registration deadline and other important information about Tuesday’s election. **There’s just one more date we want to make sure you’re aware of****Peter, and it’s****today’s deadline to submit your application for a mail-in ballot.**
There are a few steps that Pennsylvania voters should be aware of to complete this process:
**⌛** Any qualified voter may apply for a mail-in ballot. You may simply request this ballot without a reason. **The deadline to apply for your mail-in ballot is today, Tuesday, October 26.**
📬 [Sign up online before 5 p.m. here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34661?t=1&akid=3219%2E434096%2Equp37f) or visit your county's designated in-person early voting location before closing time to register!
🌐 [You can find out more information about your in-person early voting location and your mail-in ballot here!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34662?t=2&akid=3219%2E434096%2Equp37f)
Once you have your mail-in ballot, make sure you follow _all_ of the instructions provided. Seal your voted ballot in _both_ envelopes and complete, sign, and date the outer envelope! If you have a mail-in ballot, your county needs it in hand by 8:00 p.m. ET on Tuesday, November 2.
If you already have your mail-in ballot, the USPS and local election officials recommend that you mail your ballot no later than today — a week before Election Day — or drop it off in person if you can (this is what we’d recommend)!
Voting in Pennsylvania is easy and secure — in part because of the incredible advocates who have fought to make it so. **That’s why we’re working to elect John to the U.S. Senate and Democrats up and down the ballot, so that we can continue to cast our ballots securely and participate in our state and federal democratic process. 🇺🇸**
Happy voting, Peter! I can’t wait to see all of the "I voted" stickers from folks who go in-person on Election Day! 😊
In solidarity,
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211026-3219-footer&t=3&refcode2=3219_434096_qup37f&akid=3219%2E434096%2Equp37f)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=3219%2E434096%2Equp37f)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3219%2E434096%2Equp37f)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Ben Downing
subject: We can build a movement for a limitless Massachusetts
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968345/313383883/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202110_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ2M2FjYy1hNDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfMIGqV0mD6p5dxoo8QYzHn7Na1nQ0TC4dNHoonsrv8=)
Welcome, friend. My name is Ben Downing. I am a former state senator, a clean energy business leader, dad to Eamon and Mac, husband to Micaelah, a Pittsfield native and proud resident of East Boston. I am running for Governor to build a stronger, more resilient Massachusetts. Today, our state leaders operate within an insider political culture that prioritizes pay raises and appointments for political allies over critical relief for working families on issues like child poverty, housing, and food insecurity. They have failed to build a community and economy that works for everyone. _It’s time we demand a political system in Massachusetts that prioritizes people, not power._ For too long we have seen income become concentrated to a few areas, while Black, brown, and immigrant communities continue to bear the brunt of racial, economic, and environmental injustice, deepening the legacy of dreams deferred. **That’s why I’m running for Governor. Because I believe the future of Massachusetts is limitless, but I know that our time is not. As Governor, you can count on me to fight for climate action, economic justice, and racial equity.** [**We need a Governor who has the will, urgency and empathy to act. If you’re ready for leadership that isn’t afraid to take on our biggest challenges, add your name to join our fight for a limitless Massachusetts that works for everyone.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968346/313383884/1888430932?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202110_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ2M2FjYy1hNDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfMIGqV0mD6p5dxoo8QYzHn7Na1nQ0TC4dNHoonsrv8=&emci=4b83659a-7378-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=69463acc-a436-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968347/313383885/1888430932?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202110_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ2M2FjYy1hNDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfMIGqV0mD6p5dxoo8QYzHn7Na1nQ0TC4dNHoonsrv8=&emci=4b83659a-7378-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=69463acc-a436-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496)
---
Growing up in Pittsfield, I lived through the legacy of industry that created jobs, but sacrificed our environment and public health, and left us to clean up the mess. I saw factories and storefronts boarded up as headlines in Boston talked about a Massachusetts Miracle.
Some version of this story could be told by kids like me from cities all across the state. Brockton, Fall River, Springfield, and Lawrence.
That’s why I ran for State Senate when I was 24. My community, like so many others, deserved better.
For 10 years as a State Senator, I worked to invest in clean energy, revitalize our Gateway Cities, and expand civil rights. I made a simple promise to voters: I would serve no more than five terms because I saw how my community in Western Mass was hurt when elected officials in the state got too comfortable — when our leaders lost their urgency. New energy, new faces, and new ideas are essential to ensuring our political system stays accountable to the people it serves. After my ten years were up, I kept my promise and stepped down in 2017. I am proud of that work, but there is so much more we need to do.
I am running for Governor because I see both our problems and the timid politics that produced them. Timid politics has never been good enough for the communities I've represented, and I refuse to accept that returning to a status quo on Beacon Hill is good enough for this moment.
**[I believe our potential is limitless, but we can only achieve it with the right kind of leadership. Add your name to join the team, fight for our communities, and work together to build a stronger, more resilient Massachusetts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37968348/313383886/1888430932?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202110_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ2M2FjYy1hNDM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfMIGqV0mD6p5dxoo8QYzHn7Na1nQ0TC4dNHoonsrv8=&emci=4b83659a-7378-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=69463acc-a436-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496)**

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf8ol1q1gd5sa0o86g8ihsuogpjpnunllnfurcd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geco72c5h2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zidti7t007dq2dseoer6gcpri5bftf0sk92flv70_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geco72c5h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqf94ldms3kr9nqb5t7s183l57iqp5vgt5rv24oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geco72c5h2bs)

Larry P. Arnn

clean_body: | | | | Joe and Kamala are ignoring it Friend, There is an invasion at the southern border. Biden’s open border policies are DESTROYING our country! President Trump constructed over 500 miles of new border wall, negotiated and enforced an effective Remain in Mexico policy, ended catch and release, and provided us with one of the most secure borders in history. It took Joe Biden less than one year to create the biggest border crisis in history, with record-breaking illegal crossings increasing every month. This madness must stop before we lose our country! Dangerous gangs like MS-13 and drug cartels are pouring illegal drugs into our country. This is a crisis like we have never seen, with deadly consequences. When I am elected, I will vote to finish the Wall, and reinstate the successful Trump Era policies that made our country safe. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

#

It’s that time of year for watching horror flicks, going on haunted hay rides, and celebrating all that’s fun about Halloween.
But do you want to know what’s really spooky? The filibuster. Global climate change. The GOP’s continued efforts to disenfranchise black and brown voters. Donald Trump.
You get the point. To sum it up, keeping the status quo is just about the spookiest thing we can think of.

name: Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Your endorsement in 20910:
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37969343/313388440/-1211950181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2JkYWM5ZS1hODM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ5tmfrdoEtSe4_fmr67UwdZuktvH3U_XySyVbuqMHI=&emci=09cdb364-8336-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fcbdac9e-a836-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837) **"Peter, I’m humbly asking you to endorse me for Governor of Maryland!"** **—Tom Perez** **[ENDORSE TOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37969344/313388441/-1211950181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2JkYWM5ZS1hODM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ5tmfrdoEtSe4_fmr67UwdZuktvH3U_XySyVbuqMHI=&emci=09cdb364-8336-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fcbdac9e-a836-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
---
_**2,000 Endorsers needed by 11:59 P.M. tonight.**_
Hi Peter \-- In a moment, we're going to ask you to [**sign your name to officially endorse Tom for Governor of Maryland.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37969345/313388442/-1211950181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2JkYWM5ZS1hODM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ5tmfrdoEtSe4_fmr67UwdZuktvH3U_XySyVbuqMHI=&emci=09cdb364-8336-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fcbdac9e-a836-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837) But first, please let us tell you a bit more about why Tom's running:

**When Tom talks to folks across our state, he hears the same stories: Families and small businesses are struggling to get by in the wake of a global pandemic while the rich get richer.** Racial biases and inequities from housing to criminal justice continue to hold back thousands of Marylanders. And so many students -- particularly low-income students and students of color -- are being left behind without access to the world-class education they deserve.

**Our government is failing too many families and Tom is running for Governor to change that.** He's spent his entire life fighting for civil rights and working people, and he wants to _use_ that experience to build a Maryland that works for everyone. But this fight is going to take _all_ of us:

[**So we're humbly asking: Will you sign your name to officially endorse Tom before midnight? We need 341 more Democrats to step up to prove we have the grassroots support to win and deliver a better future for Maryland! Can we count on your signature today? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37969346/313388443/-1211950181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2JkYWM5ZS1hODM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ5tmfrdoEtSe4_fmr67UwdZuktvH3U_XySyVbuqMHI=&emci=09cdb364-8336-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fcbdac9e-a836-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
**[ENDORSE TOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37969347/313388444/-1211950181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2JkYWM5ZS1hODM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQ5tmfrdoEtSe4_fmr67UwdZuktvH3U_XySyVbuqMHI=&emci=09cdb364-8336-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fcbdac9e-a836-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
**Tom is the proud son of immigrants from the Dominican Republic, and he paid his way through college working on the back of a garbage truck. He knows the value of hard work _and_ how to win the toughest fights.**
After law school, he didn’t want to bill hours -- he wanted to help people. He started out as a civil rights prosecutor at the Department of Justice where he took on racism and police brutality, and served on the Montgomery County Council. Then, after two years as Maryland’s Secretary of Labor, he got to work rebuilding the Civil Rights Division at the U.S. Department of Justice and joined President Obama’s cabinet as Secretary of Labor to fight for workers.
Growing up, he could have _never _imagined that the President would give him such an opportunity to help people, or that he'd be running for Governor. **Tom's here because _it's never been about him_. It's been about a team of people fighting together for a better country and a better Maryland.**
****[This race is no different, and your endorsement at this critical moment would mean the world to Tom! clean_body: "Peter, I’m humbly asking you to endorse me for Governor of Maryland!" —Tom Perez 2,000 Endorsers needed by 11:59 P.M. tonight. Hi Peter \-- In a moment, we're going to ask you to But first, please let us tell you a bit more about why Tom's running: When Tom talks to folks across our state, he hears the same stories: Families and small businesses are struggling to get by in the wake of a global pandemic while the rich get richer. Racial biases and inequities from housing to criminal justice continue to hold back thousands of Marylanders. And so many students -- particularly low-income students and students of color -- are being left behind without access to the world-class education they deserve. Our government is failing too many families and Tom is running for Governor to change that. He's spent his entire life fighting for civil rights and working people, and he wants to use that experience to build a Maryland that works for everyone. But this fight is going to take all of us: Tom is the proud son of immigrants from the Dominican Republic, and he paid his way through college working on the back of a garbage truck. He knows the value of hard work and how to win the toughest fights. After law school, he didn’t want to bill hours -- he wanted to help people. He started out as a civil rights prosecutor at the Department of Justice where he took on racism and police brutality, and served on the Montgomery County Council. Then, after two years as Maryland’s Secretary of Labor, he got to work rebuilding the Civil Rights Division at the U.S. Department of Justice and joined President Obama’s cabinet as Secretary of Labor to fight for workers. Growing up, he could have never imagined that the President would give him such an opportunity to help people, or that he'd be running for Governor. Tom's here because it's never been about him. It's been about a team of people fighting together for a better country and a better Maryland. ** Thank you so much for your support, Team Tom = Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

Hi team, When I'm on the campaign trail I'm often asked what committees I would want to be on. **It's not flashy, but I want to talk about the Ways & Means Committee.** Congressman Danny Davis sits on Ways & Means right now, but you wouldn't know it. Time and time again, we hear about how important his position on the committee is, but what good has that done Chicago? **This committee is the chief tax-writing committee in Congress, but IL-7 remains one of the most unequal districts in the country.** If we want to bridge the inequality gap in our district and our country, we need real progressives on the committee to ensure that the super-wealthy and corporations pay their fair share and give working people relief. [**Can you chip in to send a real working-class champion and progressive to the most powerful tax committee in Congress?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzfm7dCh5G7lZj1aipOoQlUpW21b5jW4UPjIWJKZAv6OLP4fCyibA5qI2vF3CfHZz7QENfSyTtBuB280iZ7tgRVHidW-RA_Wp9_A3TAcx-udQBAOPj52YXmqqZTB0JwXQDblr1XKn7X6YOpQQOU48lltCq_lJfvIEdFPv3_iJrYFhInmn5ArTw7UPEaQSMkasRFap45MXz_nTnAkQ2-Qi_VU3niBBXPLuICOKLPBhq39naR1n2OAiOGFaYee3NLBBAWjg54sipZO_Zva9uDss2QrpdO1ttD8s2zax8naJJ7nDguHQgnz925dAJsi8a9eiAPyWUUKLSUmVy5vRKVR4nDFg/3gh/KmtUurfjSA-FWE9R5t7Hlw/h1/TwqwdSfZI4ND_HWmR6_iePDC_LiJyuIP5eIrm102PbE) Now I've been clear, I am not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. That money corrupts. We're seeing it right now with conservative Democrats trying to roll back Biden's #BuildBackBetter agenda. And on the Ways & Means Committee, that money can be the difference between a tax code that helps working families and a tax code that helps the rich and powerful. Danny Davis takes corporate PAC money. A lot of it. We know our tax code is broken and it's been broken for years. Jeff Bezos pays a lower tax rate than the average teacher or nurse in my district. Not to mention most of his money isn't even taxed because of loopholes in our tax code. **[Will you donate to our campaign, and send a message that we will not accept a broken system any longer?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzfm7dCh5G7lZj1aipOoQlUpW21b5jW4UPjIWJKZAv6OLN-jxy5zNUy1UnOCAw8JWC3_3pjoqHiDLePMnakTjwA-vP2JSj9ej6P4NK2SJcqGM_S_H5l5CnSrzkByqjwLZSJ3BzIg8MsT_QFxyT3TKz8gKsfZEyE_NTVX9mJryqRKZEW3oEFrUEuCfWg--w_igrxd3p-6STvHhqa7satKcBR66BrzC4qc7O2cCE-ZgEW6tgQ0oIC7K9PqPzwFh3hmkeYYwGbNo48Jt3F-n6PUwdCJsmxssKphQOndWS99XdU2QgVtKUBpDT5J3fZS9Qs6CpS8uzCCJjNwjWEjHL8pAyLBw/3gh/KmtUurfjSA-FWE9R5t7Hlw/h2/LWYAVmR2pGYpklS9Qs7sxr3UAiy8HEs4zm5Hu1hcPnU)** [Donate now ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzfm7dCh5G7lZj1aipOoQlUpW21b5jW4UPjIWJKZAv6OLNcWMm3TyHXUL1QE98xfOUit971-JaNTCyQPjUpDQwwHd8ssGQF8dpOAAENsJHGg73V8WAdO_hriB7Yw4dKkAL2KaPGrXecOQWkEZmtg4FWQEHAIw-zIbvUTU_eJozXEpSnIIeWNfAwfpN3NMXa8FLKmnXzbj9S1jmZBZilxHGxKs5K1LraHjK_YhRROmWjDDoQK_ndxfgUplk653ffLSlKekYrLxMVA48Bdz8ofYCb8x4Yau2-ZXSCjmCNsZXytS5b1Qhi8m8YTdp3tUe1enIQoNPJAcxSpl78ysLkcpZCig/3gh/KmtUurfjSA-FWE9R5t7Hlw/h3/MlnR1p3j78yIitwdfJr-2B2ySOjC5_pElA2XdUeU1zE) A seat at the table doesn’t help if our Congressman won’t fight for us—Chicago deserves better.

Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack

That’s right: A federal judge found that Gov. Lee’s order allowing parents to opt their children out of mask mandates in schools is _unconstitutional_.
**Not only that, but Gov. Lee’s order is just plain wrong, and it’s another example of his total abdication of leadership in the face of crisis.**
Instead of working to protect our children, especially those with disabilities and high-risk factors like diabetes, Lee continues to traffic in conspiracy theories and willful ignorance. Worse, it’s not like he’s doing this out of some misguided set of principles or ideals — it’s all to score points with the extreme far-right base.
Again and again, Bill Lee has proved that he is out of touch with regular Tennesseans. clean_body: A federal judge found that Gov. Lee’s order allowing parents to opt their children out of mask mandates in schools is unconstitutional. | = Hey Peter — HUGE news over the weekend: | = That’s right: A federal judge found that Gov. Lee’s order allowing parents to opt their children out of mask mandates in schools is unconstitutional. Not only that, but Gov. Lee’s order is just plain wrong, and it’s another example of his total abdication of leadership in the face of crisis. Instead of working to protect our children, especially those with disabilities and high-risk factors like diabetes, Lee continues to traffic in conspiracy theories and willful ignorance. Worse, it’s not like he’s doing this out of some misguided set of principles or ideals — it’s all to score points with the extreme far-right base. Again and again, Bill Lee has proved that he is out of touch with regular Tennesseans. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = One thing is for sure: Dr. Martin will never allow politics to get in the way of protecting Tennesseans and their families. Bill Lee can’t say the same, and it’s costing all of us. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get Vaccinated or Starve"
body:
The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vacc
_Sponsored message_
Fellow American, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**“Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve.”** _ **_I’ll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z89eva9dp1lurhc4b1usmibg9n80oo318pvkf1ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) This isn’t an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don’t get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don’t care about your right to religious freedom... They don’t care about your right to medical privacy... They don’t care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb2sg2j1epkrkqg22sp7n0hurc88eevos21u5ff8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) If we don’t stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can’t do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden’s UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they’ve shouted, “my body, my choice.” But it’s clear that they only care about “your body” and “your choice” when it fits their political narrative. And if we don’t take immediate action against the Biden Administration’s new vaccine mandate – your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd8ecdta97b1pkcj6fllhuc97l685ub9tulo7ei0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) If we don’t fight to keep our freedoms today, they’ll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3cvbg9gu5jki60er02rs7h0agdfbi4fqgote9r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdrrj685a2o41cvomd31k40394gkk26nblg309vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj4hv0vv21gvhhkqe4l1enq5fobvehc1vi15lq0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7luke4rjhdnb2ghchjjlq6ul1lrt424l5ptcgbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c9geaor4clh2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCYssUCAPEQFoXiToHt9RZBtiBZl0t8dC1QlhwGvqW1M01EhS9AuTwV-NJ2mhxYZ2ID3ZIhyPJh83mqLidZ_6gtMra3G1MqLOKCPJIvBuSet4pQiUeNeT-3lMTZSFSYMXm5eMlZ_rUSEi-cy2-5zPUDdjzGQ8tnYSJvSFZXWVs9jDQndKtDWlWpBm97YgHqc6VqKIt4x9-I1j2HKZB49RAGTAF5-4-v5g8yftZ9-mHGwr1CZRiG3AmjicAbirsRyjTqXBFfR4NMgRSMx2oA3bEc/3gh/g4hl7SYTQOKb8FWJDDhTHA/h0/14gnhH5RnZlm65woy-FzICHtlXvfWgsMKaDdwI44z70)
Derek, we’re running out of time ahead of our midnight deadline, and not enough donors are stepping up.

We don’t need to remind you that **_we’re just one week away from the most important election of 2021._**

We don’t need to remind you that **_Republicans are favored to win._**

We don’t need to remind you that **_polls have Virginia TIED._**

name: Team Booker
subject: Peter, did you see all the headlines yesterday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, did you see
all the headlines yesterday?

A huge news update came out revealing evidence that members of Congress
and White House staff participated in planning and meetings leading up
January 6th.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ][IMG][ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ][IMG]

It’s an urgent reminder why we must replace every insurrectionist in
office who incited this domestic terrorist attack. That includes Rand
Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ]Let’s show the GOP and Rand Paul that there’s a grassroots movement
rising up to elect Charles. Will you chip in $20.22 or anything you can
afford right now to show your support?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ]DONATE $20.22 →

If you missed Charles’ email yesterday about these developments, we’re
attaching it below.

Thank you,

Team Booker

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

From: Charles Booker
Subject: They lied.
Date: Oct 25, 2021

Breaking news,
Peter.

Reports just came out that the insurrectionists on January 6 participated
in dozens of planning meetings with members of Congress and White House
staff. Trump’s White House even promised these violent insurrectionists
they’d get a “blanket pardon” after the fact.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ][IMG]

What was Rand Paul doing throughout all of this?
Peter, he was
right there alongside them. He lied about the election being stolen. He
incited a domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol. And he even voted to
block the formation of an independent commission to investigate the
attack. Who was he trying to protect?

Rand Paul swore an oath to this country and to the people of Kentucky to
protect our democracy. He has betrayed that oath time and again, and we’ve
had it. We all deserve better, and I know in my heart that Kentucky
deserves better. That’s one of the reasons I’m running for office.

But it’s going to take everything we’ve got to take him on, which is why I
have to ask:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1045&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help power
our grassroots campaign? Every dollar you chip in helps fuel our
organizing efforts so we can end Rand Paul’s political career and start
writing a new chapter in our politics.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1046&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ]DONATE $5 →

It was an inside job,
Peter.

There’s no doubt in my mind that every member of Congress remotely
involved with this domestic terrorist attack should be expelled and
prosecuted.

Today is an urgent reminder why we’re running to replace Rand Paul and why
THIS is our moment to turn the tides of our politics. We can elect leaders
who won’t sell us out to the highest corporate bidder. We can elect
leaders who won’t try and silence our voices at the ballot box. We can
elect leaders who do not seek to divide us, but lift us up with love and
compassion. We can, and we must.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11883?refcode=em20211026-1108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1047&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM ]Please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to our
campaign today. Our Democracy and livelihoods depend on electing leaders
with backbones that will fight back and hold these domestic terrorists
accountable. Will you chip in?

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211026-1108-footer&t=1048&refcode2=1108_346206_cDQtzM&akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1108%2E346206%2EcDQtzM

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: I've Seen the Border. Biden & Soto Haven't.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elect me. Close the border! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f26e828ee6&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

This week, I did a thing- a thing Joe Biden hasn't.

I went to our Southern Border to see the humanitarian catastrophe first hand. And I have some stories to tell you.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8df539c8b5&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who is a Biden sycophant!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=675baaa69b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| I visited Del Rio, TX, where the migrants were under the bridge a couple weeks ago- over 20,000 of them.

Well, I have visited the Southern border exactly “1” more time THAN “President of the United States” Joe Biden, or his sycophant incumbent Congressman Darren Soto has! What a disgrace!

It’s over 1300 miles from Orlando to Del Rio. The President travels in the lap of luxury on Air Force One. I traveled in my Ford Escape Hybrid with my wife as my copilot!👍🏻

ON MY OWN DIME!

_**Unfortunately, because Joe Biden, with the enthusiastic agreement of congressman Darren Soto, has dismantled President Trump’s border plan, many of the 20,000 are now walking the streets across America- untested and unvaccinated.**_

NBC News also reports that, because the incompetent Biden regime rolled out the welcome mat for these unvaccinated, untested illegals, that even MORE are now on their way!

_U.S. officials are tracking large groups of Haitians in Latin America, including more than 20,000 in Colombia, who like the thousands now massed on the Texas border may soon try to reach the U.S., according to an internal document obtained by NBC News.

In addition to the 20,000 Haitians gathered in northern Colombia, DHS is also monitoring groups of about 1,500 in Panama and 3,000 in Peru, the document said. A senior DHS official said it remains to be seen when and whether those migrants will come to the U.S., but they have begun “staging” in the various countries, potentially signaling they are planning to travel in large numbers._

_Biden has screwed this up SO bad. Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by this psycho this year._

**The only explanation I can come up with, is that he hates America. No one who loves America would try to destroy it like this. **
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7313a30c26&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0788e31849&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _Biden is a mess. He's being forced now to reinstitute Trump's successful border policies!_

_“When the Supreme Court effectively revived a cornerstone of Trump-era migration policy late last month, it looked like a major defeat for President Biden,” The New York Times reported, referencing the Trump administration’s Remain in Mexico policy. “But among some Biden officials, the Supreme Court’s order was quietly greeted with something other than dismay, current and former officials said: It brought some measure of relief.”

The report noted that Biden’s steps to loosen “the reins on migration” was “quickly followed by a surge of people heading north, overwhelming the southwest border of the United States.” Every month, the number of illegal aliens apprehended at the border under Biden has increased to a higher number than the month before.

“In fact, some Biden officials were already talking about reviving Mr. Trump’s policy in a limited way to deter migration, said the officials, who have worked on immigration policy but were not authorized to speak publicly about the administration’s internal debates on the issue,” the report added. “Then the Supreme Court order came, providing the Biden administration with the political cover to adopt the policy in some form without provoking as much ire from Democrats who reviled Mr. Trump’s border policies.”_

**Biden may be forced to revert to Trump's policies, but he's doing an AWFUL job.

I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and bring back President Trump?**

[I will force Biden to close our border. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=20ae349a0d&e=afa21b7626)

[I will get this truth out to the voters, with YOUR help!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fa9b28f733&e=afa21b7626)

_I will stand up for America against Biden and his Yes Men in Congress- like Darren Soto. They are anti-American and they gotta go!_

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a check on Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e950143588&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6a66eccaad&e=afa21b7626)

clean_body: Elect me. Close the border! | | | | Hi Peter, This week, I did a thing- a thing Joe Biden hasn't. I went to our Southern Border to see the humanitarian catastrophe first hand. And I have some stories to tell you. My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet , in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who is a Biden sycophant! | | I visited Del Rio, TX, where the migrants were under the bridge a couple weeks ago- over 20,000 of them. Well, I have visited the Southern border exactly “1” more time THAN “President of the United States” Joe Biden, or his sycophant incumbent Congressman Darren Soto has! What a disgrace! It’s over 1300 miles from Orlando to Del Rio. The President travels in the lap of luxury on Air Force One. I traveled in my Ford Escape Hybrid with my wife as my copilot!👍🏻 ON MY OWN DIME! Unfortunately, because Joe Biden, with the enthusiastic agreement of congressman Darren Soto, has dismantled President Trump’s border plan, many of the 20,000 are now walking the streets across America- untested and unvaccinated. NBC News also reports that, because the incompetent Biden regime rolled out the welcome mat for these unvaccinated, untested illegals, that even MORE are now on their way! U.S. officials are tracking large groups of Haitians in Latin America, including more than 20,000 in Colombia, who like the thousands now massed on the Texas border may soon try to reach the U.S., according to an internal document obtained by NBC News. In addition to the 20,000 Haitians gathered in northern Colombia, DHS is also monitoring groups of about 1,500 in Panama and 3,000 in Peru, the document said. A senior DHS official said it remains to be seen when and whether those migrants will come to the U.S., but they have begun “staging” in the various countries, potentially signaling they are planning to travel in large numbers. Biden has screwed this up SO bad. Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by this psycho this year. The only explanation I can come up with, is that he hates America. No one who loves America would try to destroy it like this. | | | Biden is a mess. He's being forced now to reinstitute Trump's successful border policies! “When the Supreme Court effectively revived a cornerstone of Trump-era migration policy late last month, it looked like a major defeat for President Biden,” The New York Times reported, referencing the Trump administration’s Remain in Mexico policy. “But among some Biden officials, the Supreme Court’s order was quietly greeted with something other than dismay, current and former officials said: It brought some measure of relief.” The report noted that Biden’s steps to loosen “the reins on migration” was “quickly followed by a surge of people heading north, overwhelming the southwest border of the United States.” Every month, the number of illegal aliens apprehended at the border under Biden has increased to a higher number than the month before. “In fact, some Biden officials were already talking about reviving Mr. Trump’s policy in a limited way to deter migration, said the officials, who have worked on immigration policy but were not authorized to speak publicly about the administration’s internal debates on the issue,” the report added. “Then the Supreme Court order came, providing the Biden administration with the political cover to adopt the policy in some form without provoking as much ire from Democrats who reviled Mr. Trump’s border policies.” Biden may be forced to revert to Trump's policies, but he's doing an AWFUL job. I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and bring back President Trump? I will stand up for America against Biden and his Yes Men in Congress- like Darren Soto. They are anti-American and they gotta go! Help me bring America First policies to Congress! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Flooding, mud slides, and power outages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The fight for our planet and future generations is up to us.
#
Peter,
World leaders are set to meet next week to discuss urgently needed action to fully address climate change. But real action to protect our planet for future generations isn’t happening fast enough.
Just yesterday, millions of people woke up to more flooding, power outages, high-winds, and even mudslides after torrential rains and a “bomb cyclone” hit their communities. It was the strongest storm to hit the Bay Area in 26 years, but it also impacted communities up and down the west coast including Seattle.
Extreme weather and the deadly damage wrought by these kinds of climate disasters won’t let up until we act — until we transform the way we are treating this planet. As long as we keep burning fossil fuels, refuse to transition to clean energy, and maintain the status quo of corporate-led environmental degradation, more disasters will come and the climate crisis will only get worse.
[**I’m fighting in Congress for real action to address climate change. Our fight is strong, and led by the people, but we need to keep up our work in the face of Big Oil and corporate attacks. Can you chip in $3 to support my work to protect our environment and prevent future climate disasters?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8209?refcode=em20211026-749&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=749%2E420207%2ElTJ3Ey)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8209?refcode=em20211026-749&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=749%2E420207%2ElTJ3Ey)**
Climate change has led to more and more extreme weather events, killing people and destroying our communities. From the Texas power outages during record low temperatures last winter to the recent mass flooding in the northeast to this latest bomb cyclone and so much more, lives are at stake. And so is our planet.
World leaders need to act right now. And so does Congress. That’s why my fight for the people and our planet never stops. [**Can you join me in this urgent fight with a $3 contribution today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8209?refcode=em20211026-749&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=749%2E420207%2ElTJ3Ey)
So much is on the line, and I could not continue this fight for climate action without your support.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211026-749-footer&t=22&refcode2=749_420207_lTJ3Ey&akid=749%2E420207%2ElTJ3Ey)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Eileen Filler-Corn here — Speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates and a proud friend of Terry’s!

**When Terry was governor from 2014 to 2018, I saw firsthand how he stood up to the Republican majority in the General Assembly.**

He was an essential barricade against the GOP’s fight to take away LGBTQ+ rights, abortion rights and so much more.

Virginia Democrats have delivered incredible results for the Commonwealth since taking the majority two years ago. And with Terry as governor and Democrats in the majority, there’s no limit to what we can accomplish.

But with Trump-endorsed millionaire Glenn Youngkin investing huge sums of his personal fortune into both his own campaign _and_ GOP House candidates down ballot, we can’t sit back and let him buy this election. There is too much at stake, Derek.

clean_body: | | | Below, I’ll explain what’s at stake this year in Virginia. Read on to learn more, or — Eileen | Eileen Filler-Corn here — Speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates and a proud friend of Terry’s! When Terry was governor from 2014 to 2018, I saw firsthand how he stood up to the Republican majority in the General Assembly. He was an essential barricade against the GOP’s fight to take away LGBTQ+ rights, abortion rights and so much more. Virginia Democrats have delivered incredible results for the Commonwealth since taking the majority two years ago. And with Terry as governor and Democrats in the majority, there’s no limit to what we can accomplish. But with Trump-endorsed millionaire Glenn Youngkin investing huge sums of his personal fortune into both his own campaign and GOP House candidates down ballot, we can’t sit back and let him buy this election. There is too much at stake, Derek. That’s why I am asking you today, Derek: Virginia Democrats have a bold agenda for next year’s legislative session, but we can only continue pushing forward if we have a Democratic governor and a Democratic-controlled General Assembly. From the bottom of my heart — thank you for your ongoing support, Derek. Sincerely yours, Eileen Filler-Corn Speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: My election, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 7 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58619921:J3ZrO32N2:m:1:3299561967:A1CD71C4A967B1B9286C5008A1D732F3:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58619921:J3ZrO32N2:m:1:3299561967:A1CD71C4A967B1B9286C5008A1D732F3:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58619921:J3ZrO32N2:m:1:3299561967:A1CD71C4A967B1B9286C5008A1D732F3:r "So, can I please count on you to
pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58619921:J3ZrO32N2:m:1:3299561967:A1CD71C4A967B1B9286C5008A1D732F3:r)
---

---
_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58619922:J3ZrO32N2:m:1:3299561967:A1CD71C4A967B1B9286C5008A1D732F3:r "Will you join my team today?")**

subject: Why I'm running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Luke Mixon for U
body:
WATCH: My candidacy announcement | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lukemixon/announcement-video-5140054?e=03e0a9e31b)
---
| | [ ](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=52e34aa480&e=03e0a9e31b)
---
| [ ](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=f69dd92213&e=03e0a9e31b)
---
# [WATCH: My candidacy announcement](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=c603a5d333&e=03e0a9e31b)
| | My name is Luke Mixon, and I am a proud product of a farming family in Avoyelles Parish, a proud graduate of Bunkie High School, and a U.S. Navy veteran. **I am running to represent Louisiana in the United States Senate because for too long Sen. Kennedy has sowed division in our state by valuing partisanship over progress.**

[**Will you donate to my campaign today to stop Sen. Kennedy from further dividing our state?**](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=decd62ac9c&e=03e0a9e31b)

Our state is reeling from two historic category 4 hurricanes and all our senators can do is play partisan games instead of delivering resources that Louisianans desperately need. [**Our infrastructure is crumbling, healthcare costs are skyrocketing, and families are struggling to make ends meet.**](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=c0b45fd1bb&e=03e0a9e31b)

Sen. Kennedy has made a mockery of our state and its people for too long. **It’s time to put down the partisan theatrics and come together so that each and every Louisianan doesn’t have to worry about where their next meal will come from or how they will ever recover from the impacts of another natural disaster.**

I am ready to answer the call to serve Louisiana just like I answered the call to serve our nation as a fighter pilot in Afghanistan, Iraq, and Syria. **I hope you are ready to join me build a better Louisiana because I know my kids Samantha and Charlie and my wonderful wife Renee are ready. **

[**Will you donate to my campaign today to stop Sen. John Kennedy from impeding progress in our state any longer?**](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=6c7b60ab8f&e=03e0a9e31b)

Learn more about my candidacy for U.S. Senate at [LukeMixon.com](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=3090712121&e=03e0a9e31b).

Sincerely,
Luke Mixon

Friend,

You get to decide what goes into your body - not the government.

Giving up your right to bodily autonomy is a slippery slope to losing other rights, like freedom of speech and bearing arms.

That’s why Jim Renacci opposes vaccine mandates now and forever.

Just like President Reagan said, “If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth.”

While DeWine is stripping Buckeyes of their freedom, Jim Renacci is putting Ohio First. Renacci will make Ohio a sanctuary state and protect your _**right to refuse**_ vaccinations.

The first step to preserving your freedom begins with firing DeWine. Team Renacci is working hard to make that happen, but we need all the help we can get. Please consider donating today.
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJyNkE1uwyAQhU9Ddlh4bINZeNE2yg3aLhHhJyEyYGE7aW5fnJIuuqqERuINfPPm6YEeuaY7NwCBuiZAa96RjletVJrbRuuOGNpbiVriq4vzyQSplKtU9LvzQGxPAYCTXqm6I4oayjmwXteWUMbIbhzOyzLNqHlBcMhnNmpNprq5kIzeIFkrSGxjwqd4NSnElOUQ8XXTg8FeBi0XM-PJJBc1ag7r4oU32q0eNXvjpRsR0E2c45qUyWJQo5B-Gp29l5bKV-lOITefy-KtiGJA3Nw4imCyA1EmiuJgfiJiWExYfvD48nWxH5K_f25tEUaXne3_iPNDPLa2UcdeY95ahlvV11jm3DHVHeNWUiCs3qVBT5sFN1OW4z5tWz1yLmsMiL0igHXNSIBHpPAf8PYY3nJd7pP5_VmgVQkPENt_A5wlpg0)

| | Halloween is just around the corner, and DeWine is hoping he can trick you with HB 244. Don’t be fooled. It doesn’t prevent school vaccine mandates. Instead, it’s a backdoor that allows approved vaccines, like Pfizer, to be forced onto school children.

Renacci will never deceive or trick you. That’s why his message is clear: **NO VACCINE MANDATES. PERIOD. **

Thank you,

Jim Renacci
Candidate for Governor of Ohio

| Peter,
---
| **The COVID-19 vaccines were NEVER effective** ... and now, we have cold, hard proof:
* New data shows the Pfizer vaccine is **only 45% effective** after 6 months... against _any_ COVID-19 variant.

* A leaked video shows a **top Pfizer scientist** admitting that **vaccines are vastly inferior** compared to **natural immunity,**

* Sweden **halted Moderna shots** for people under 30 because it **causes major heart problems,**

* U.S. COVID-19 **cases are skyrocketing** **to their highest peaks EVER** ... even though the _majority_ of Americans have been vaccinated.

Meanwhile, the Left is ignoring the science to create a** tyrannical apartheid state...**

...where anyone who _dares_ to question their authority is **fired** from their **jobs** , **stripped** of their freedom of **movement** , **denied** **healthcare** , and **barred** from participating in **society.**

This only ends in one of two ways, Peter. **Either the far-Left wins** their war on America... or **patriots like you and me do.**

Did you hear the news, Peter?

**One of our Trump-supporting opponents was listed on the National Republican Congressional Committee's "Young Guns" list.**

"Young Guns" is a recruitment program to find candidates in competitive races like ours who national Republicans see as having a path to victory. The NRCC provides these candidates with "the tools they need" to win.

After the first public poll in our race showed Kim with just a one point lead, Republicans think they have a real chance at defeating Kim, and now they're ready to do whatever it takes to help our opponent win.

This is going to be another tough race, so we're counting on grassroots supporters like you to help make sure we have the resources to take on our opponent and his national Republican allies.
