subject: Mark Pukita ZOOM Town Hall!
body:
Hey, Patriot!

The Pukita Train is on fire 🔥💥 and gaining momentum- _you don’t want to be out of the loop!_

We don’t want to elect a Rob Portman 2.0- right? That would be someone who says everything they know we want to hear and doesn’t give any substantial answers to what they would do. Then they go to Washington and compromise.

**We have the opportunity to work to get a PATRIOT FIGHTER elected, not a Swamp creature!**

God bless America and draw her back to her roots and Him, 🇺🇸

Linda Kelly

clean_body: "People are sick and tired of President Biden's weak and incompetent leadership, and they are completely rejecting his socialist agenda." Peter, Did you see Sarah Sanders on Hannity last night? Wow. She dropped some absolute truth bombs on the Biden Administration. Read a few examples below and then click to watch her entire appearance. "People are sick and tired of President Biden's weak and incompetent leadership, and they are completely rejecting his socialist agenda." \-- “Under President Trump, our country was winning. Our allies actually respected us and our enemies actually feared us, and right now they're all laughing at us." \-- "Under Joe Biden our adversaries know he's not capable of running this country, but also that he's not capable of standing up to any other country either, so they're walking all over him. It's the reason everything he touches he ruins." Sarah's appearance on Hannity last night shows exactly why we need her as Governor. She will not back down or give in to the Radical Left. She will stand strong as the last line of defense against the Biden-Harris Administration and their socialist allies in Washington. Our country needs a leader and a fighter right now, and we can count on Sarah. - Thank you, Team Sarah PS - Sarah is going to send an EXCLUSIVE video message to every single October donor. name: Laura Loomer
subject: It’s you and me, Patriot
body:
We're closing in on the end of the month and this has been one of the worst fundraising months we've had!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3XdEPnvgkkdtZd1By48rg/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3XdEPnvgkkdtZd1By48rg/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ) We're closing in on the end of the month and this has been one of the worst fundraising months we've had! If you can [**help me catch up**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3XdEPnvgkkdtZd1By48rg/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ), I'd really appreciate it!

The reality is, I absolutely won't be getting support from the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) - **even after I win the primary and oust a Do-Nothing Republican**.

Knocking out an incumbent is a BIG no-no in the GOP - especially when you're knocking out a party puppet like Dan Webster who does what the Establishment tells him to do.

That's why [**I 'll need your support every step of the way!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3XdEPnvgkkdtZd1By48rg/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ)

Let me give you a few examples of what the NRCC does to "outsider" Republican candidates if they dare to "rock the boat":

In 2020, when Lauren Boebert knocked out incumbent Republican Scott Tipton, did she get support from the NRCC?

If you guessed "NO", you guessed correctly. **They didn 't spend a dime on independent expenditures for Lauren DESPITE spending $80 million on other candidates!**

Remember House Majority Leader Eric Cantor?

He was knocked out by Dave Brat, a conservative college professor who was backed by the TEA Party in 2014.

**The NRCC never spent a DIME on Brat and even LET HIM LOSE in 2018 to Democrat Abigail Spanberger by only 8,270 votes!**

Get the picture here?

The NRCC and RNC will use the hundreds of millions of dollars they collect from patriots like you to protect the establishment - **and that 's it!**

If you want to see a fighter like me in Congress - leading the charge in the HOSTILE TAKEOVER the GOP establishment - [**then you have to help get me there by donating to my campaign directly**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3XdEPnvgkkdtZd1By48rg/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ).

By this coming Sunday, I have to raise $27,000 to get back on track for the month. [**Any amount you can chip in will help me claw away at that**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3XdEPnvgkkdtZd1By48rg/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ), and I really appreciate anything that you can do.

Thanks so much for all that you do. I literally couldn't do it without you.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/lM0kqRHGyB2AU1vhXXjcQQ)

body:
this just ruined our day

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37972561/313415539/1309164061?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGEwYzIxZS1iZjM2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCKFJDThVg8z6uELgaySvbPNRD0FMCmgK2FOshVVTNg=)

**BREAKING: Latest poll shows GOP in the lead over Democrats to retake the House** Listen, this is really (**REALLY**) bad.

The last time we lost the House it took us 10 YEARS to get it back.

That’s 10 years of awful MAGA Republicans like Ken Calvert, Madison Cawthorne, and Marjorie Taylor Green ruling the House.

We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership – including President Trump – We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|

Fellow American,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6c231bfd7d74825bd738ab265985b79&_e=qZmiIf-mkf_WK_bHAepEk-3X1b4Zj_gXfwrsm1PHjdoV7xNBcSKKaf-nhKEksucKJ7Z776aFW2TVQHbhgzJ4ctyW9TBRV8hKYggV5y3mgOv8TyCJQv46PNit3wR9BIRl8SWnc0nWSR6skL6wNkuEvUHxwVMEj57qn3L0_aDFdYXV4J1cGb8XOUhj2WWm5m-nJ9rIoqMvZadz_tLW9jt6O8bmgmYfjiNi4HX41GsP6kyHnd8Y9ITK5fp1VIK7mz_8zzNc5xnj_dECNzSowR7hKQrYflDbZHbXGReNOKdoBsNNnYrT6f1CLgcIFkGjmatt_4DfXukQfc8HVJ3XGS1DtlSw0lowaFsRMLIyuo3zU6pQekeJh6YaMKNkW-V7DfnzYbDcln5lFm7TESvkvDeBHRABghuqBqnOjG1t7NW3XoDAoVUGiO9pQCHZhZdvIx_B5K-jtYrjYlgkTedcGvrFVeMfo03uXfOrpBx0qfIKe_nQVXs8KIeNcBPVmKR9nH9LLStXN30Lp1P3wRx32mIu5A%3D%3D)**

body:

Friend,

They’re coming and they’re coming to take over.

Every day the radical Left is coming for the heart of America and it worries me to death. That’s why everyday I’m doing absolutely everything I can to fight back to stop their attacks on the foundation of our country.

They’re coming for Iowa fast because they know if Iowa falls, so does the rest of America. I need your help and I need it now if we’re going to Keep Iowa red.
| [**KEEP IOWA RED**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=439e60be83bd4e9292a7006dbbb1f7f9&_e=tebBAurmJUL0-3qaUx58gtbOteulvepoul7FByXdM1URsXdGpCeEES0LYvLvwHxOueKfJRdgi5Qhe-e3FbLHOjb3GMlQaGd-qSimoLCxbcuUZV7CjtGVbaXfStOTWLruCVzPg467hRNr3NXaqo4Ba7WhYSpLy2UvuNsLPxIA3qGEjpdSYg9Q7TFsGHmg5X1HwLay2ex6tW64RCfgqtRQgTBbYo6yMuYHs2_Znv4DXiZcq-5fCjZ8CLDCSV_2ikP9ctnYApL6b47dl-0Z45-bluetwClcVrcgUYOucdYjp5BiceGJUYTN2g4Wd6RhNbJ9tnZ4u5lGw9lpk6yKCeb8dvro_MHBeWZsDPGBTiG1MW4AXJdQOkV5L_7UZ8sRx88esOdt3HpGkiuzOAoCXftCRjJAZU2Xpxr2vhp4iWJksC8WN_z5lr-rRL1HWAbKgpVhXeeHK_GVEzkLIS173lth3IKUS96f_5yp4wJucz9gvQZ3iBtvYPLA5sQ20cqfvQN1O5i23_YXr51vhbimfSqHLA%3D%3D)
---

If we want to make sure our border is secure, our economy is not in shambles, and Socialist policies don’t rule our nation then I need you to step up and step up right now.

[**Can I count on you?**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=439e60be83bd4e9292a7006dbbb1f7f9&_e=tebBAurmJUL0-3qaUx58gtbOteulvepoul7FByXdM1URsXdGpCeEES0LYvLvwHxOueKfJRdgi5Qhe-e3FbLHOjb3GMlQaGd-qSimoLCxbcuUZV7CjtGVbaXfStOTWLruCVzPg467hRNr3NXaqo4Ba7WhYSpLy2UvuNsLPxIA3qGEjpdSYg9Q7TFsGHmg5X1HwLay2ex6tW64RCfgqtRQgTBbYo6yMuYHs2_Znv4DXiZcq-5fCjZ8CLDCSV_2ikP9ctnYApL6b47dl-0Z45-bluetwClcVrcgUYOucdYjp5CQMTl3jEjmtpuaTOeeZLSQBdkluiG0_Io3Zu3wWeN2j7gLUToboxU_jAqeUbkUeG-f4ccPbNUq4PKgkcUsg6gqaPAQY3GZKpgPcm0PMK8upk08t68DdoDB6AVvRUDf1-mK0mxLVP90ZENs0BlAAsqPSCn_pwkwEInFSTLNJndtkEQ-eVySoGC5Dwm7QOXlkzV7NUkx5EU6lj1M5nimeXY_wgcAIaa28UzVBcl7NqvvsA%3D%3D)

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Which do you want in Congress?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
Under Democrat control, we’re not getting the leadership we need. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78014257af3049adbd3d74c63273978e&_e=sGstV9qL9E7B-AFN0xI3sPcs4mUmKzEvvtknVO3DyWKkuKZyRJ6XgltadsX4uywbL5Izpy7sq_Afswz5BYU4L2YGye9sDK9uvcCnZmZo-pXyt2XAHpkD1w6PW9muRnhkjbsE-X7amizSYdEdqy3teKv-KzGijfFjFzQOCz7KFGoVc4jNqC6Y_sbxqNCz65mccydwZRIlWGw3IV42lyHA2v-tAb0iV7tsHnknyDzsIxDFimfnBOjm1AXp_vvSsHENf4v2VmX3ifrzLrvlaswPnJqzmA3ep9R2nLbR2ZOZNsfCFlv0EJRsx_GqH8a8XICNJphQW1VjQfTsjp9PKbt9GHJKBODvzPrz5z9H9Pvbz0cEiUcUs7lzYFF-XFbq-e_x1O74i1uhPBSy06-v5a84f4rJswXMPrb2yRoLlut-paBgr9l1qjL6YiNwn4wC96zwpBJwxflKeD7xOuZyz7roCdsCBRuEc8zzP6gQ7lNpmQ0%3D)

---
Peter,

Who would you rather have representing you in Congress?

Far-left politicians who are focused on appearing on talk shows and in magazines and hanging out with celebrities...

Or a conservative Navy combat veteran and active Navy reservist who fought for our Constitution and will focus on providing leadership for our country once in Congress...

I’m Shawn Collins, and I’m running against far-left Congresswoman Katie Porter in California’s 45th District – a top-target seat for Republicans to flip in 2022.

**I fought for the Constitution I swore to uphold and defend, and now I’m taking that fight to Congress.[Will you join me in this fight?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78014257af3049adbd3d74c63273978e&_e=sGstV9qL9E7B-AFN0xI3sPcs4mUmKzEvvtknVO3DyWKkuKZyRJ6XgltadsX4uywbL5Izpy7sq_Afswz5BYU4L2YGye9sDK9uvcCnZmZo-pXyt2XAHpkD1w6PW9muRnhkjbsE-X7amizSYdEdqy3teKv-KzGijfFjFzQOCz7KFGoVc4jNqC6Y_sbxqNCz65mccydwZRIlWGw3IV42lyHA2v-tAb0iV7tsHnknyDzsIxDFimfnBOjm1AXp_vvSsHENf4v2VmX3ifrzLrvlaswPnH8Q9wtyUfhsfME16Zaz2ADXvI8YkRsyAz2cI3xCTi6gX12_dF8MtEHsRD46vS6pLTWLkaOVL2fcHcOQA9rIW1sE9ChaZz9fuUAwRekUneIJwDFlJj3TgIcMlMExl0lXJ8pR_1U7WkHz2kP-xbEkTvSAcfxLbzNhD4_nyjOitiYi6RxV_iN6l9JBB3wsAYd09WY5xoAlmDtXe0ORIjfCkHc%3D)**

To RSVP, reply to this email or email: events@ganslerformaryland.com. Please remember to include the names of all attendees in your message. If you're able, For more details, check out the information below, , or call us at: (240) 442-8746. I hope you're able to make it! name: Save Warnock (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: Anti-Warnock donor says swastika is just an “artistic protest”...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Hershel Walker— the ex-football player whose domestic violence and financial malfeasance rap sheet impressed even Donald Trump, who is all-in for Walker to replace Raphael Warnock in the Senate— just cancelled a $500-per-ticket fundraiser hosted by a longtime GOP donor whose Twitter profile picture featured a swastika made of COVID-19 vaccine syringes until just days ago. The donor said “I specifically chose that symbol as an artistic protest.” This is just the latest example that proves Hershel Walker has a blank check from hatemonger Donald Trump's riled up extremist base. CBS reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised a jaw-dropping $3.7 million. Raphael Warnock poses such a serious threat to the GOP establishment that Republicans are running anybody they can find who can galvanize Trump's best friends: The Proud Boys. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. Please, there has never been a more important time to donate than RIGHT NOW. You stepped up time and again, BIG TIME, in 2020. But with the future of America hanging in the balance of the US Senate and Trump's pending return to politics, we're asking you personally: Please rush us $1, $5, $25, $100, anything you can spare right now. **[This cannot wait, Peter: Please, we need you to take a moment right now to chip in $5, $10, $25, or even more to protect Raphael Warnock, defend our fragile 50/50 Senate Majority, put Trump's hand-picked disaster artist back on the bleachers, and FINALLY get this country back on the right track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37972759/313420381/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211026_GEN_FDR_Z&refcode2=NG211027&refcode3=ASCibd4JTsvQz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlYTE5NTM3LWMxMzYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OqFlF2jN46CnlFkBnXCPRgAIZq-Rt3s0Ek76qXe_2NE=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Hershel Walker— the ex-football player whose domestic violence and financial malfeasance rap sheet impressed even Donald Trump, who is all-in for Walker to replace Raphael Warnock in the Senate— just cancelled a $500-per-ticket fundraiser hosted by a longtime GOP donor whose Twitter profile picture featured a swastika made of COVID-19 vaccine syringes until just days ago. The donor said “I specifically chose that symbol as an artistic protest.” This is just the latest example that proves Hershel Walker has a blank check from hatemonger Donald Trump's riled up extremist base. CBS reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised a jaw-dropping $3.7 million. Raphael Warnock poses such a serious threat to the GOP establishment that Republicans are running anybody they can find who can galvanize Trump's best friends: The Proud Boys. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. Please, there has never been a more important time to donate than RIGHT NOW. You stepped up time and again, BIG TIME, in 2020. I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d95cbd4bbf14962928da653e59f5a38&_e=9n5AEML384NORQmqCK3DgxAsbaRMiApGlO8mko1fpubUfkHJpbxJHEPq0IbsNRq5WNACmbrJbB1ii6O32PpoGlZzUOg8cYWV_qz9CfPAxK5R80gvGVqkQWDwQFKcwg0tOuIu2EwORGDkWvhBuoCM7BnJgUmBFIrvh6MpmE2FsFPz1kyx9Zd96tuERsWXDeVrPlhXaWFf-caXOJcWciq8b7SgFTntyps6yMJSZF_ag0TaSa8Od_TG8aazSvCWbT9v54qO2vbqEo6ytYas3vZ5nHxgz4fPGT9EkLj5whckgjrvXuCfMvFgkX8D4U6RF7rItJgfrti8FLJeiU03B5VLzFJj74aZ5m-8tHpmHdK0NGuMDKRjYd5Os-v9JgQKt0ZRUIjjImpcBuELPD7xP3y3ddlS-ZzUWt9MDxsnbvjKYdw6XAdJ4cLZ9Uab0ECn67MIG3BOfx0o1WGYMqoDvLuZgg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d95cbd4bbf14962928da653e59f5a38&_e=9n5AEML384NORQmqCK3DgxAsbaRMiApGlO8mko1fpubUfkHJpbxJHEPq0IbsNRq5WNACmbrJbB1ii6O32PpoGlZzUOg8cYWV_qz9CfPAxK5R80gvGVqkQWDwQFKcwg0tOuIu2EwORGDkWvhBuoCM7BnJgUmBFIrvh6MpmE2FsFPz1kyx9Zd96tuERsWXDeVrPlhXaWFf-caXOJcWciq8b7SgFTntyps6yMJSZF_ag0TaSa8Od_TG8aazSvCWbT9vPpJFkGMmjoLF4SCS0WQ23WVlL3bPCwXDA8ygYi6_5ApVuGcnkQ87_WT3HqxWwpxyQn6IoYpOMBf7YVghIGqZPRn6r33_Es-uBS5w8uBsubdY2dDlhnqIDKmpu6OMulUJmUidLVwcIWygiz-nftmgB4RelRbkmG3ao63fbAuUdjJnc4PU7cXu0QiKf7hSSKCZO-uB0Xqtj1bLm29Ty2DzCA%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d95cbd4bbf14962928da653e59f5a38&_e=9n5AEML384NORQmqCK3DgxAsbaRMiApGlO8mko1fpubUfkHJpbxJHEPq0IbsNRq5WNACmbrJbB1ii6O32PpoGlZzUOg8cYWV_qz9CfPAxK5R80gvGVqkQWDwQFKcwg0tOuIu2EwORGDkWvhBuoCM7BnJgUmBFIrvh6MpmE2FsFPz1kyx9Zd96tuERsWXDeVrPlhXaWFf-caXOJcWciq8b7SgFTntyps6yMJSZF_ag0TaSa8Od_TG8aazSvCWbT9vUfAoYv0hEmaur1p--JPBs0NAieYpxhltbDSrN0EhR1l1EO2VguC8q0DvSMBuvCCjIpNLFd3zclv8erIqgUYuIK5Ybapt3csTOXGPBAdyFMxouXLw50GVvwpEnbnSW-oJ1ySbJFWrtxU0Um7Sz7BwfwZ2qOoZKhRhHZirjMgUM7jIs80QuQ1mqx5Qq-HCwQCqmvteMjwIPf5RnrPsQAe33g%3D%3D)**

[**Send $5, $10, $34 or more our way today ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d95cbd4bbf14962928da653e59f5a38&_e=9n5AEML384NORQmqCK3DgxAsbaRMiApGlO8mko1fpubUfkHJpbxJHEPq0IbsNRq5WNACmbrJbB1ii6O32PpoGlZzUOg8cYWV_qz9CfPAxK5R80gvGVqkQWDwQFKcwg0tOuIu2EwORGDkWvhBuoCM7BnJgUmBFIrvh6MpmE2FsFPz1kyx9Zd96tuERsWXDeVrPlhXaWFf-caXOJcWciq8b7SgFTntyps6yMJSZF_ag0TaSa8Od_TG8aazSvCWbT9vGEVmHgGcWO8uID0p7nQp0nPiGrdl8tdAFmNzVzhkQPtJEsD0OSCgvbJj4g68CkFRJxssBN27xJ9tKWgZ9sR1Gqr2TbXIXFyR3KUmfmdvRSWx4ie1HgZ9dYHcxI_Me8iSkRAAMLavfjTn1uqXtImnxkBguPtTaXv7BMTLL3hqR89Yyoi0IxV8-yCG8PLpxWoesDUtzDN5yU2hZDJ-8tasuw%3D%3D)
I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

Democrats know what's at stake.

Republicans know what's at stake.

I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now.

The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - _**and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg.**_

I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America.

I hope you'll join us on this journey.

Thanks,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d95cbd4bbf14962928da653e59f5a38&_e=9n5AEML384NORQmqCK3DgxAsbaRMiApGlO8mko1fpubUfkHJpbxJHEPq0IbsNRq5WNACmbrJbB1ii6O32PpoGlZzUOg8cYWV_qz9CfPAxK5R80gvGVqkQWDwQFKcwg0tOuIu2EwORGDkWvhBuoCM7BnJgUmBFIrvh6MpmE2FsFPz1kyx9Zd96tuERsWXDeVrPlhXaWFf-caXOJcWciq8b7SgFTntyps6yMJSZF_ag0TaSa8Od_TG8aazSvCWbT9vK01TfQAlGx55JgEtHvbhVsYfdILJSAzGRG-yBTdwlB3MH7p0MvKi5aGtTZ4BLiFtt_v1vgNejf6t7SQHTi4EwhDV2E3_Tie1s3CjoNyVfQ8y-bnDwZAqr-908EzVvWnJGuQ0zfK865lA0_HghC1up6LSU1S4d9rcYRJND0G1LtfVTDmIdEONw8o3d4MlQzlZC4eYrMEy9I0aTGXD9G-z0g%3D%3D)

body:
|

body:
Haitian Immigrant. Former Trump official. Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story today |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_t=16WVvGcPAwpPK68sBIangweyYIU8o6DFD4OTUo4YLeKi8mE5hEDpP_nIERQCFOZeSY2gQfeSq5EHEO9XKpYvhEeIR8omX7Ygo5NZtkEjCELWR_ed_t39CKmYmNsjkYxfx-BEj4IZmCABRPqrT_T_E3VgjiJHR0-AxcnVExEtG-w%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlFa3GejIWcKCLsfgtlvQBrksg9y-Pisx01XtSQFAaEFTcMqv6I7KUgnb7iB2vZkVowDAVaSn5PgmUwAvWolrhr5_rCPZhliBpsPZpZcDS7PyccMDjTTLod2hvng4KHiKAg34aCPYKZWfu_mAY5Bo34v3aIp4hcQ7GuKwq6kEQ7hw1aMDPQw-CypLfhkOBOz7gM19jiHMORiLOBXCYwnwk-B)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlGdIoTiRr1CFy4Ze8VWQSEiRlyAOdm5FWU2RU7Wg64sly8x_AD0AM4KTEhvvtcb_1Xmoi2TfXvNentZgdHoImbOEXF_zs7RLV6AYiR_Q6njR5oqD3y6SZfizzlrKszeWQ9pxKhuJ2JXsw34me21T1KtRkXH-VTT2g1GfwFyA8mbnNLJ8tjEOL-m6rlTgurZv60VTJCxKjgFTHXiEaN-hYcc)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlHUD_d31IL9VMeB8vHXGwbeQaIvuCP5vB63uUnU6ysU412ER5assT7Xwx7U_9cQYZUf_NPHbYiyC5WyngXhJ0oSnN3C-MSuBEKT7yvjFSYhvhxxoLagaeO1BPtdQaH7erNICrHifloDLkQzLe3jBGednaGv-kjOE9Md3lrAaK4ceGY2Hes5QPVJM2ITducUONcHwwO3PRhQOB9xIquZ5s6u)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlHRIoSlAJTI6n4YreUBfCmqdNoyawDh1L3BGxGelk8A-Vn97aAgD_3yHp5lxYr8EBMOGZMc1mS7V-IUpmS_FoUWqYJ1KU6BZYlDClExDs1ETfAO_kakeOH7HB53aFsAfi30EvpkY62JvThXBpY47reTRhZI0K4OPHCci9r_lVRU4GZ1c09ifcKvhGr5sYki9zI7GKVFu9TSzpVpBCfULM7Q)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlGXRZ3ZtwJpoizFsX0NZJtKFJ1XQyW7RcfTxVJEU3gTM-bGSXfbucydM28BgBGGAxN-kP3tKxCaMraOTz3_yFkPnznogsnoMSAmzMr5WI2CMJaIywyP-IcM1DWeXm7tbA8LjRqWA79ESOwsO9-9T5WcWrH-OsMSpp-e7PUmaZOEkhCAoGZw6zxks6e0lhhWAbad_EP-2LOIgH1PAsPSWpbq)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlH-VAVDC1p1D69sEKOfxxwBLsm7MR23j6zJD4qsLGne9Pv3GzzMUdBb30wvLK1HJaFYicFf_5mQIWHHiBdmBSzbvz-3Pe0NJG17NGCuUbG6f0p46i55oQ_BM2rhwZ_GeGxhSr6IzBJZCA2r5618xQo4_zSOqCNUfQ0qfp93HVF1XU2BqUWXhGX07PgHhkatM99vCioA3N8e2CfiMAVUygtO)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlEQZ0-BJ3jfZVecBvPJHsU7VesbshlvO3jz6cyNg8bBcUqqKzar_7qn0xNf7PG8HbU_rBXgNUYs16-IDvMF-8TfuMJ2ZxorlJCga6-EC73eUb4C69xejh1waMdT8cDzdfhLV8I84VCM1NXoGFy-7IKZRsxOxgtVJS6M2uJ3Sj8zvnpyGkSqo4mf1vavT0aDSXgEFw1GGxaNUfLkK-Aj-jBb)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlGxc495Ny0_vYxjUqBrzhneoRZ0eBfPoz4M1t-GB5al7aBUxOhdYBKvlogWWcUvZmxX5KUBEcZ0XL1X0BVt5l7vnCC3wLykpApI2f-iaNazKQQh1eISPCBtizN-Kv11D1JWfrCwl_q-ZAIuUzrC3Tjrcjb__LRr3J_YtHWp-hFo3EhotRQUYfL8-KnuLKlRjQ7C7gZlV8HtlGspuyegcmUh)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlGRTPkON8p0jgTZ36PhCTNZb7Ynox4XQddJGEPCZUliKjqDExnlbJX4sEZ8D0ab9P38Kdc-Vy4IqNZW17V-EHA3Wb0U9Uuo0Nk5UgFKSJNvnYHpzLFqwSz_Z2HFR9BGMB_yPr34KkZOH5GaGite3vmkYCdi6OemVNirvSQjh6OJXTlWRU9dL96uIGYFwNWy66cl6uGsNemjPDE4-hCnqJAT)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_e=keBP8KdDcoHf2KtcsU8z_K8BjDWrseRwBIyJUezfJqeiseeOwjtBQaEUqWK0ySKbOWC47qjqvvV9HeWOjUxY-BpAHzlHOWEkGgv4bUXi3pRjx7SesxxF0t_THofUH2WXmm1NfJ_joL0eV7hTTX9KS8peiI1cLv6jHzWP1Eh_eZ8gvv0DpWQEKWa_DvMTYZMe_QNslUmXH0Sy9T0bc6vC2eUsSu_9IuCLgq5u6Npgi9I6Q7WPHhl5mUT-FOYWFa4HPzNbywpjZ_VdksRcTUEslCpGIZMOmdEXZbcGwWVTJlFnpScQwardwnGlYi5L1wCbQ8fXuja5ARfQBhEnn7UPpjtFl1oi5XgXnG9gbGVv_FJZm2f5c9jcu4mahiIy4NQRjQcl84JcBRtmhE9b9IjdNZ2aLa0L3NqXbv7jCEEUqS1N0-wab_mNxPK0g4dr_P9f0qfqCFNPi6wY4TworuzWD6afejaU57HCyZKvFiYl9TbFxPec3T5Q-XkwDSpFxEig)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=b41cf8f4d08a4f169ef720827145a677&_t=16WVvGcPAwpPK68sBIangweyYIU8o6DFD4OTUo4YLeKi8mE5hEDpP_nIERQCFOZeSY2gQfeSq5EHEO9XKpYvhEeIR8omX7Ygo5NZtkEjCELWR_ed_t39CKmYmNsjkYxfx-BEj4IZmCABRPqrT_T_E3VgjiJHR0-AxcnVExEtG-w%3D).

But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. For Country, Rod Dorilas | ABOUT ROD** Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "Biden’s Climate Ambitions Die in the Senate"

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is the
frightening report from the Wall Street Journal yesterday about Senate
Democrats blocking climate action:

"It renders the US really unable to deal in its entirety with the problem
of reducing greenhouse gas emissions, it puts the US into a spot of
focusing much more on what it’s dubbed resilience, basically just learning
to live with it."

U.S. policy on climate change CANNOT be 'let’s figure out how to live with
it.' As temperatures rise, extreme weather events become more common, the
seas rise, and ice caps melt. We can't live with this. We must take
action.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79052?refcode=em20211026-20187&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20187%2E1203867%2Ex95BHh ]Justice Democrats is fighting to transform the Democratic Party and
elect progressives who will take action to protect our environment and our
people. Can you chip in $3 to fuel our fight for real
change and real action on climate change?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79052?refcode=em20211026-20187&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20187%2E1203867%2Ex95BHh ]Contribute $3

Climate action is a central part of the Democratic agenda. If Democrats
can’t pass it, the party needs to change. The status quo isn’t working and
it hasn’t been working for a long time.

The progressive bloc of Justice Democrats in Congress have been fighting
to protect climate policies in the Build Back Better Act. It’s the first
time in a long time that progressives are using their power to shape
policy. But we need more Justice Democrats in Congress to upend the
Democratic establishment and pass transformative policies.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79052?refcode=em20211026-20187&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20187%2E1203867%2Ex95BHh ]So, Peter,
can you support our Justice Democrats in
Congress fighting for climate action AND help us elect more progressives
to Congress? Chip in $3 now to help us transform the
Democratic Party.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=20187%2E1203867%2Ex95BHh ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=20187%2E1203867%2Ex95BHh ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

name: Castorani, John
subject: Re: The Benghazi terror attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_t=MHP8MqilddjPgADF8MhPUzbrehn8lI4DRfJLTwXxdBopRgtD8JAiBTQ_AyEv-VGZ5pviRW5QG6LwU_D-WHhlBNiA8fhTikdakESwE205rZHGEbOLvM2uREc5mzKGo0CfasAOkn2bbtEm6Prc7Bom-6ZJZZtjOxLWPkJGcLGd4-k%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-Bq6EtpQ5QxzNVFcwHq__NVT1AB4FSHWhzWn98Kq1f2uPgZOvD7Jrh47w-5cuH6MsdNlmYW-KkEg9ZzeiGXanqBaiFUI_4rjlUjW_GvTNNo_sWYMdtc0JMQLOdpxXv4tcxjdWSDRVmKBb83f4yvrqhZXpbjuAI3X4NWmpO7NjJiBjmdgR2iR83ioer4BeAdOvUg9fSSFGrHa6rB-AdCT3VaE%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-Bq_txZiGMHjxurA3Z4uwd1FXgoBVr9wl6_7P2z07XJ72pYPSYwUTK0I1O2XggAxbuWXpC-q2kDbKoFqn0cmYZzV2v3FAMCZVXJFIOXEfb0bM9tG5r5OYcwMBIUK7eVF_ksO5CxZc1YZ116tZH9jSKXaPM4I0bE4R5gRn46HdHOQdRnTsAp6jKW0jsnQV5eXdMfR2RpwVwLRJ_u-WdQy-_bI%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-BsMj6DOp7rQvH6fgqp0WDMQnCFUIpOoBUODw0seNGPlax2ZbSmYNR518hy5nOV0mWEzcsgUWOuj6U2sJboSR8Y6x6WLyz60OqGxXD1AZChNpQ_UVt_brl3D8KGS3z5X4GbnPQ0AeckejGffVZzQGpcYkdVDhOGiCUNAL8jCnJlyKnkC6WlMh-WHYxJib7CZzA75M0QdNECSkrnrC_FFj_Ic%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-BlCyNlMx80X_YN_DaucsL7Ym92zxJavk8WTK9zSbVyCo0dD6JyTDc_nI2dM_JCdcAAXCD9fK0OiK5W3xBxbvtnzFlifQHm2l8MVlmvmEHD5IzJlH2MRUErXBRmiHOx4ODwkxlzM9m-SBe7jSZr2ZJcu2fCqV0c12zqTE-5kJl7otBNsl5kb17mVzgyGJMGXs0JLlSArP-UK7QHLhYcJ9mz0%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-BloD4Sop3cbsZI7FhRCdcmzSH9P7ljNNzaISg3wuLtLDH0ZuOdV6otG6s4075xbA7Fk2SN7g7ZQSHL6wHluMP_x9qwKmrtzRfDyfJZMa_Y_VPd9eG2pVlk-dv1J4-IKrBHG3ex0HuroWSN5DCWyhuLkHAsK2u03KzsbNuqh4877d-oliCoZtVZ7pE9_9DlOy2JTMMb4e1X3jMSgUnyYszho%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-Bn872nWkY20-feFMYMPHFNUvqkrzRe8hdL1YzUVl-_pZtdiBIJWQ-0FEj03cm6bGEZ5Z2gr8Y_11u-7n7kr1nmCNcz1xmo-nl5lg5G_Rsc2-WigJ31-sgxEl8z9gG-2u-FdLiR7HC8tmklXf9V1gmvlkDAIguwiiXRfR9CBHZ_X6MTRXlro1_d3rEjepJRwaDacWyyf3j-54FjzREtRtzOY%3D) **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-BqgVZVvxNgoqM30AivTgOzAdk6xmocjQDHXL43ytqyO7YVY0OxNyvkCaxAgUkEyWC35dxnHQ835cjDwsvDkl18rClqFexafHlEzYJXrdj9ap2nenP6lfOb9zC_UeDHf4GHcrCYT5_PbJKtqz8ET9jl_aliTAaQ7B6cNTPCTObCBXBS64bmlhoIhskszqZK94d6gk3COmC0fIqXNEQZfNuaU%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-BqJD9l5aRgdYNsfIZznI_mv_PY2czRm9rja34gSW-UmLvFRykhCFB1nnV_EDnTpj56wBPKrn2WQVLA5dcn5k8IgnJ4CEwTFCT3quEv4z4y3jH0Uq-I9FIqCL3hFAhdQGLvu8yNd4_YnsgwCKS6OOt1uLWSQ_iTXhewb3yXhGnCWmvRuZkEbXhpVWkovLlXCYSaVPzWXi06V61rVJ04a-GPk%3D)**.

John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6c83488c28ab4fc6be24c0d380496a9b&_e=49bcw1o3Kxd2XaAOJP63Z0RR4eUAXThJsl2Bn0EJKl4ikBIiYVAq-rAPBGjMOIwbPSBxNpgKdSCy5FiKZH7Hn_q7zW8dCYaBrl_VfTW2UxgUDHAUcPNmTZdqGqeuZnYF5-8zDv0TBzYbi5Gf0MEuhRHP0s9nr86BZEhXEOuGtKU8jCNokWhKHyRDqzp5oLOj2hOb3S1mXyKeqQQ0PimRa6dqJJVyoSdhyr65BP_bSAIbuS7fZqHRwCbuIP3v0cm6Bk6ZuhqMsVVCyyiIJUt-BpBYbTt57ZyqSYFrC0rxC3uk8g392GYc9KwkTQ56oI_NYM-N6N7YgKK42txsjXnmLeVXSOwY2jet_2VBDPpDDh144uY5Y60MFlSO1tCL9iiCpLpHDV1kEO00SYGzXa9zWWgjmbzfnAkQAXq8g5Rk-iOzEonLJ6caFlwdjUt0lIG4Tn8NOxT8ig03PhImdjcMEg0D8Ylwk8mB8fcXolKmrBc%3D)**

clean_body: For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Which would you rather?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
Under Democrat control, we’re not getting the leadership we need. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=301f96294ce74c8c8069b27d1fdb4f20&_e=DmvYhyxyFkGBK63iZBYt8Gd5tv6oEobupPRiL7z5C87ToK0kKWlYxNm6B5LCwWvifxPqPZKwzlWyHPa7YSdAPhKHn27qzCh6gKequ_Vy4wSHy0Z1jog_-VGpotTWEqYs6Q-2liaIUy0YNIuOTlF9Zw8hwgK_nG1nK-igv_TUSRTkJ7aapwaUKgDkyP1mqD_ELFnQpzH9EB-Cahloz4EfbuP4tbMrsIIg7QKGv6McwX2weBu-3Nkfejccb6lNUFFPha5BzNoRZiuy6oj_T8U8AryvMjBik-XHVflPoSw9wV7Bfmam2gcbAZgQ9GEfsW9yifOv8Pja8YsFPcPxt0Vxqe8PdvxOiva3DyXFZsn7P9cdz7djQmd4uEQiumtUBBQfMyAKYKRJrBkrPkOyYtO2WXk9wmcgkkscWXwecs0FX3i4r-HWjOmsf-5PyP-j5YlyzmQyJWELrbsasQ6rwpyHMg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow patriot,

Who would you rather have representing you in Congress?

Far-left politicians who are focused on appearing on talk shows and in magazines and hanging out with celebrities...

Or a conservative Navy combat veteran and active Navy reservist who fought for our Constitution and will focus on providing leadership for our country once in Congress...

I’m Shawn Collins, and I’m running against far-left Congresswoman Katie Porter in California’s 45th District – a top-target seat for Republicans to flip in 2022.

**I fought for the Constitution I swore to uphold and defend, and now I’m taking that fight to Congress.[Will you join me in this fight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=301f96294ce74c8c8069b27d1fdb4f20&_e=DmvYhyxyFkGBK63iZBYt8Gd5tv6oEobupPRiL7z5C87ToK0kKWlYxNm6B5LCwWvifxPqPZKwzlWyHPa7YSdAPhKHn27qzCh6gKequ_Vy4wSHy0Z1jog_-VGpotTWEqYs6Q-2liaIUy0YNIuOTlF9Zw8hwgK_nG1nK-igv_TUSRTkJ7aapwaUKgDkyP1mqD_ELFnQpzH9EB-Cahloz4EfbuP4tbMrsIIg7QKGv6McwX2weBu-3Nkfejccb6lNUFFP14Mf82MNfeRUnxI6gWAvxsHu4M3yFY5cN5Gwz5WQgDGscazfatfNAeK3rDHv5abo4cHyyKLWYcs8i9bdFDRvjXAhLgMoTIm63h1w6RldOJfEdcQCy1bpNy4RC111L38GUmD1g_XCn2RgpM1XXPYG7oX6ACAiirbVvp-3BErnF0JQrU6OXcWnPMj2WNeVmIWJIbJRvO9ovhHh3xzpI6v41Q%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN SHAWN TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=301f96294ce74c8c8069b27d1fdb4f20&_e=DmvYhyxyFkGBK63iZBYt8Gd5tv6oEobupPRiL7z5C87ToK0kKWlYxNm6B5LCwWvifxPqPZKwzlWyHPa7YSdAPhKHn27qzCh6gKequ_Vy4wSHy0Z1jog_-VGpotTWEqYs6Q-2liaIUy0YNIuOTlF9Zw8hwgK_nG1nK-igv_TUSRTkJ7aapwaUKgDkyP1mqD_ELFnQpzH9EB-Cahloz4EfbuP4tbMrsIIg7QKGv6McwX2weBu-3Nkfejccb6lNUFFP6Z_NRzocpN4m17ZTufljMr0-JUy3fJdzvEBIocCAh_pABiO9osUPdURAPHkRIWkqP5ErJSSOZpBqZfNNBEe0x6OpckCMe-EMtNuYzJC4h5Xx9SVX_whVhsSVe-W6GJzeAWexmBfGlw7rL-5a-I45vh2HdkVNP4OMKzZnE0_pgmfj22LNg626LFNEUsoWui2JKJlRm1LikmgPnBJWoX4-mg%3D%3D)
While serving a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan, I coordinated with Special Ops teams to help them track down possible suicide bombers. **_I even survived two suicide bombings._**

Now, under Biden’s failed leadership, a botched withdrawal from Afghanistan has entirely undone everything I and thousands of other service men and women fought and even died for.

My opponent Katie Porter has still done absolutely nothing to hold Biden accountable for this failure. In fact, she congratulated him for what she perceived to be a _successful_ withdrawal from Afghanistan.

Under Democrat control, **we’re not getting the leadership we need** – not in my district, not in Congress, not in America – and America is less secure, less free, and less prosperous.

**We must secure our borders, we must restore economic and personal freedom, we must stop wasting taxpayer money we don’t even have, and we must support our law enforcement and our military.**

clean_body: Under Democrat control, we’re not getting the leadership we need. | Fellow patriot, Who would you rather have representing you in Congress? Far-left politicians who are focused on appearing on talk shows and in magazines and hanging out with celebrities... Or a conservative Navy combat veteran and active Navy reservist who fought for our Constitution and will focus on providing leadership for our country once in Congress... I’m Shawn Collins, and I’m running against far-left Congresswoman Katie Porter in California’s 45th District – a top-target seat for Republicans to flip in 2022. I fought for the Constitution I swore to uphold and defend, and now I’m taking that fight to Congress. While serving a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan, I coordinated with Special Ops teams to help them track down possible suicide bombers. I even survived two suicide bombings. Now, under Biden’s failed leadership, a botched withdrawal from Afghanistan has entirely undone everything I and thousands of other service men and women fought and even died for. My opponent Katie Porter has still done absolutely nothing to hold Biden accountable for this failure. In fact, she congratulated him for what she perceived to be a successful withdrawal from Afghanistan. Under Democrat control, we’re not getting the leadership we need – not in my district, not in Congress, not in America – and America is less secure, less free, and less prosperous. We must secure our borders, we must restore economic and personal freedom, we must stop wasting taxpayer money we don’t even have, and we must support our law enforcement and our military. It was only four years ago that this seat was represented by a Republican, Thanks for your support, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. clean_body: My Trump-endorsed opponent could win | | | | = | | Derek, I’m sorry to bother you, but it’s important. Late last night, we learned that my Trump-endorsed opponent wrote himself another HUGE check from his personal fortune — this time, to the tune of $3.5 MILLION. He’s literally trying to buy the governor’s office, Derek! Meanwhile, our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days. I need your help so we can kick it into high gear in the final week of this race — this is really urgent because we’re running out of time. = If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin six separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your time, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

body:
"While my opponent relies on tired lies to push people to vote, I'm counting on YOU." | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d9ab2af3b215/rally-with-allison-russo-rep-joyce-beatty-and-more-this-weekend-5028217?e=400a181d5a)

## _Watch this video message from Allison Russo:_
---
[ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cc0b925c15&e=400a181d5a)
| Hi ,

There is **exactly 1 week left before Election Day**. We are sprinting towards the finish line, and in a special election that means turnout, turnout, turnout! That's why Allison Russo and Democratic leaders from across the state are holding GOTV Rallies, Canvasses, and Phone Banks all across Ohio this weekend!

**We need our voters fired up and ready to #Flipthe15th, and we need your help to make that happen!** Sign up to join our GOTV events, and then invite your family, friends, neighbors and coworkers to join you!
---

## _Make Phone Calls and Send Texts:_
* [**GOTV Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=234728f40d&e=400a181d5a)** with OPAL!**
* _Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Rural Voters for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f665b9a239&e=400a181d5a)

* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Seniors for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a50679eb11&e=400a181d5a)

* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Students for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e7b01e35fa&e=400a181d5a)

body:
AZ Democrat Kirsten Engel claimed there is **_no crisis_** at the border. Friends, These are the **_facts_** on the border, though. _**FACT**_ : Illegal immigration is at a **TWENTY** year high. Another _**FACT**_ : Border arrests are at their highest level since **1986**. For Kirsten Engel to state that there is no crisis at the border is not just factually wrong, it is incredibly dangerous to all Arizonans -- especially our border ranchers and communities.
There very much **_IS_** a **_CRISIS_** at the border. And it’s beyond time that Democrats acknowledge reality at the border and address the problems they’ve created for Arizona. [**Demand Democrats take the border crisis seriously NOW >>>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0e099c3a08a140d08877968b0661e121&_e=BNw1_URLsp9hujot8qnTv90IDHOMy1lWUyR8u7CMXXFV61Zft6jYTdYbj6H0xXw7niVggKpCGWj47oUiWsSk549DsPwJxPr0zqf51HKFRezw5J4JE5PiFtIBuviSgSQXjwuGslbJTXK7PcRKIbRQMXpT07CHecqbU5h2a-D1Ems8qKQTAqtEn38T_ZXmxmHW0XKGh4OMafxrtxYVw35AX37VjB6ZoHK7VBDYyIZcD7oQSlezfoK63iNGyNI5J2NwlfqF5bvwLvDkhXTDbkSKPJf21eZwOloveCksEo2-tD2HP2GPtHsV6LmsAf5VO4XLOsubcTg5WU5xvpZKWhMIiQKhlGaQBm7rqXbM0D6g0pmI28geLDKFwmg0YiU1kxtQToUk0NsncgRGALaVASbrIjRYOGuzmwA3H5unRD_YM_63bvXZ7S3vgdX_JyYCmqY6ugqpx0rYhmO7lkeyXuZsow%3D%3D) Our border ranchers are living through this border crisis everyday -- many have lost friends and loved ones to violence committed by illegals and Mexican drug cartels. It is a **direct** **slap in the face** to the victims of this border crisis to say what they are experiencing is not real.
As Arizona’s Attorney General, I won’t stand for this incompetence because I’ve experienced our border issues firsthand. I’ll defend our border communities and ensure that the border is a _**_TOP priority_**_ , just like it was under President Trump’s leadership. [**Protect Arizona with a Secure Border**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0e099c3a08a140d08877968b0661e121&_e=BNw1_URLsp9hujot8qnTv90IDHOMy1lWUyR8u7CMXXFV61Zft6jYTdYbj6H0xXw7niVggKpCGWj47oUiWsSk549DsPwJxPr0zqf51HKFRezw5J4JE5PiFtIBuviSgSQXjwuGslbJTXK7PcRKIbRQMXpT07CHecqbU5h2a-D1Ems8qKQTAqtEn38T_ZXmxmHW0XKGh4OMafxrtxYVw35AX37VjB6ZoHK7VBDYyIZcD7oQSlezfoK63iNGyNI5J2Nw3In7xBvwgsC33wYIl7z2sKlbC7VJxjXLWERfjuiMVU4FP2tO8Z6cdmqGquhk-xqJrmyfm3DsfI208gx1KZm8e7_wbu7mcAEIPo93iXDN94sGNti48UudYh4i67ZjXFk1Qxw1u8hKKXM-3OGKdUAOH67-rcYM7r_OaUYZN71fsxmndXUzbGVUWo8VnxNXH-EWn6rH3auuwcX89dkC76Rrag%3D%3D) If you agree that it’s time to prioritize border security and acknowledge reality with **REAL** solutions, [**then join me in this all-important effort HERE.**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0e099c3a08a140d08877968b0661e121&_e=BNw1_URLsp9hujot8qnTv90IDHOMy1lWUyR8u7CMXXFV61Zft6jYTdYbj6H0xXw7niVggKpCGWj47oUiWsSk549DsPwJxPr0zqf51HKFRezw5J4JE5PiFtIBuviSgSQXjwuGslbJTXK7PcRKIbRQMXpT07CHecqbU5h2a-D1Ems8qKQTAqtEn38T_ZXmxmHW0XKGh4OMafxrtxYVw35AX37VjB6ZoHK7VBDYyIZcD7oQSlezfoK63iNGyNI5J2Nw1ROvaNxZ0tvw22tgQzks9nh_MO1L3MEV6rfukCwilkpf3SLPrKNE7mEl9UWVHAwdR2iQSWTn9zRq1LObhDDrYinaWuCuhjMxtkhUCIDkRIUvKHL5vBnAWd_VtKUS9HZ5EUqwFcCmokJA7ZRsamQdwvc3fOIaWVLXn_AIXsQ1SNdqUL2GUt_rIsINd7RigCL5gVZfrkX92P0-rspY94ITiA%3D%3D) Thank you,

name: John Castorani
subject: Hillary Clinton's lies cost lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_t=IFdpRlH1UwTxgjG-1cj4AIudFcos6SHDWBAriqYPk8Y06TW2IYo7gKhOSQy-Qx_QKJmstATKHDR7EsCzB-AKBtpD5RW9pRBQDWFRB1ALrMbZTe7tAthQH9UWNpTRBobNyMQ6ii85CF1oGsC2B4k2Qr1L4JNlkSdCf-py-AzEtK8%3D) | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_e=FBwnDDe3L89DNHd8cTMaNcEvab3gM9DifzEjsd6_a0CueW_mRKwrbkdwW5i_yAjNjM9EvLVTqXQm5dJ9uGfIRryBTY2VoZrSBfsvX4RHiWWzwuGVgGk--SVI1sxKea1hKQgDGJOgWAS-HXS2QVTQBKMgnAIiyD1bzVFFbkJRKI4TYwigj0ogab3qDCqnLiaT0IC-DaqVDBPeOfCVpfeL-Kbq9TRrsmiib3Bhhd-gInmKx2GCZ_Ne-ffsMuDO8bDZ9KJB064_P3OiAnZjMu1aL-H1yc54UYhilpzOavvHwYTPCy1g4xy5YDioKVoYNNZGd9RaU_eibLP42oUdaQj21tfkSW1uUSgsQo_YPCCcE5KRCKM0E7DTzxuIAEGX0DoKiF25QUC30bo7t5auMv2YUIDugPguv-ALrsxZ7MMJ2cKS1VB_3V4uuFdSRcWGIVUCIKZyKS21_RqQS-1hBZUP3igAoVLnTUBbHwiHdq9ZPyV-p8mxLMzwl8d4oTeg4FW9)

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_e=FBwnDDe3L89DNHd8cTMaNcEvab3gM9DifzEjsd6_a0CueW_mRKwrbkdwW5i_yAjNjM9EvLVTqXQm5dJ9uGfIRryBTY2VoZrSBfsvX4RHiWWzwuGVgGk--SVI1sxKea1hKQgDGJOgWAS-HXS2QVTQBKMgnAIiyD1bzVFFbkJRKI4TYwigj0ogab3qDCqnLiaT0IC-DaqVDBPeOfCVpfeL-Kbq9TRrsmiib3Bhhd-gInmKx2GCZ_Ne-ffsMuDO8bDZ9KJB064_P3OiAnZjMu1aL-H1yc54UYhilpzOavvHwYSAhSYS8Zu8Zgjxu1hnDACQPmC2uFzXbc-Pf0RsJPGZtWFIC6ddWmfI2b5lldlYnVai_gn-flinZuaRA4LeByHm3GN3seHxEDZFuvQcj-r4YAcOGT7ot_CEy_42SY_x7LAeOnkB0-M6k4lpTR5WRuAbfGmJCjJT5u7Smd5neylP19sH0V5utSZIbvAIuVwNRJnHxaK0x8wPzsBaBlUq9o7v)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_e=FBwnDDe3L89DNHd8cTMaNcEvab3gM9DifzEjsd6_a0CueW_mRKwrbkdwW5i_yAjNjM9EvLVTqXQm5dJ9uGfIRryBTY2VoZrSBfsvX4RHiWWzwuGVgGk--SVI1sxKea1hKQgDGJOgWAS-HXS2QVTQBKMgnAIiyD1bzVFFbkJRKI4TYwigj0ogab3qDCqnLiaT0IC-DaqVDBPeOfCVpfeL-Kbq9TRrsmiib3Bhhd-gInmKx2GCZ_Ne-ffsMuDO8bDZ9KJB064_P3OiAnZjMu1aL-H1yc54UYhilpzOavvHwYR_5QZNDJQFW73yzwdTp3U7RISKPo4rSAXX8AolqAoJWkIfsfO2AFm5DEyn9hvhVpiN2L92Ju6tPCgXsAJQykqs-FSvHXsYYLlkHdjtRswZCysr2RbuGNXxP0HHjRtSbuu0vyQa5Xoe-F9nrolJSm7mq1i2Tyi5V71z_ftXsvnpV6QLHTMfHcnDUVlG4AVmnYVqXvAOC5KSe_CxcN2h-xew)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_e=FBwnDDe3L89DNHd8cTMaNcEvab3gM9DifzEjsd6_a0CueW_mRKwrbkdwW5i_yAjNjM9EvLVTqXQm5dJ9uGfIRryBTY2VoZrSBfsvX4RHiWWzwuGVgGk--SVI1sxKea1hKQgDGJOgWAS-HXS2QVTQBKMgnAIiyD1bzVFFbkJRKI4TYwigj0ogab3qDCqnLiaT0IC-DaqVDBPeOfCVpfeL-Kbq9TRrsmiib3Bhhd-gInmKx2GCZ_Ne-ffsMuDO8bDZ9KJB064_P3OiAnZjMu1aL-H1yc54UYhilpzOavvHwYQpE4RxO2KE-g_yqv_jPpbG5Vr2lbWJnER0ig5aEsS9OgJCScrrPk06pKDz8-7aryQxWcjTe9YPBBihKs8WkGHTMDg-VIFWcStlRw1pbWqHmyjVwfu2ut9rFke4wb--sjWQZJbpUaN5nolzVca8MzSSbHeA1mmjLjAtnvp2CrEwrzDhlwFs6vRlfXW3hI3KP1ydqGMDQj7vVchKElILvFys)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_e=FBwnDDe3L89DNHd8cTMaNcEvab3gM9DifzEjsd6_a0CueW_mRKwrbkdwW5i_yAjNjM9EvLVTqXQm5dJ9uGfIRryBTY2VoZrSBfsvX4RHiWWzwuGVgGk--SVI1sxKea1hKQgDGJOgWAS-HXS2QVTQBKMgnAIiyD1bzVFFbkJRKI4TYwigj0ogab3qDCqnLiaT0IC-DaqVDBPeOfCVpfeL-Kbq9TRrsmiib3Bhhd-gInmKx2GCZ_Ne-ffsMuDO8bDZ9KJB064_P3OiAnZjMu1aL-H1yc54UYhilpzOavvHwYQORrkn-TKXXJh44Pp3McZVQuFkndrdJWpD8UOgw7UoXKCuMVWMeL4Mcex6nMpwVUpQm6JQVgoeOGPJvBGEyfB0yV3FOqi02eQzXo_8Zt12YzwvvI0jRTgYmAWVRw3ySgVQBOzLVyUOKjKBNQEGdWLLb-_zPNDIS_V1ZKTkxPzpyguhpmGvuSPokkTpJglsXSl9fgTUIEzR0HAMSQyhQ962)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b66f5d6d73a349359ddd52a2da61861f&_e=FBwnDDe3L89DNHd8cTMaNcEvab3gM9DifzEjsd6_a0CueW_mRKwrbkdwW5i_yAjNjM9EvLVTqXQm5dJ9uGfIRryBTY2VoZrSBfsvX4RHiWWzwuGVgGk--SVI1sxKea1hKQgDGJOgWAS-HXS2QVTQBKMgnAIiyD1bzVFFbkJRKI4TYwigj0ogab3qDCqnLiaT0IC-DaqVDBPeOfCVpfeL-Kbq9TRrsmiib3Bhhd-gInmKx2GCZ_Ne-ffsMuDO8bDZ9KJB064_P3OiAnZjMu1aL-H1yc54UYhilpzOavvHwYSvP3oSW0U5AVzieAJ-f_r9KhM5WKgPJ-1ys5h2Nx-_3i2KX1sU6yx32DvtdVhExS4Fkrp8CeyNy4wOYNsrTQitBBJ-tgfwsjWNDuDjwMjgKB55u1i0o2HfeNdAmWcV_YtzIJ3Fq_5q8VgM9q0oScZTYex8EncPAGtNjVr7QNgLAecuQSBFTZ5QLohOfI3XrsrN_gNvW-u6QFwKPw1PefAO) **

At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

subject: It's you and me, Patriot
body:
We're closing in on the end of the month and this has been one of the worst fundraising months
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg)**.

Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg) We're closing in on the end of the month and this has been one of the worst fundraising months we've had! If you can [**help me catch up**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg), I'd really appreciate it!

The reality is, I absolutely won't be getting support from the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) - **even after I win the primary and oust a Do-Nothing Republican**.

Knocking out an incumbent is a BIG no-no in the GOP - especially when you're knocking out a party puppet like Dan Webster who does what the Establishment tells him to do.

That's why [**I 'll need your support every step of the way!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg)

Let me give you a few examples of what the NRCC does to "outsider" Republican candidates if they dare to "rock the boat":

In 2020, when Lauren Boebert knocked out incumbent Republican Scott Tipton, did she get support from the NRCC?

If you guessed "NO", you guessed correctly. **They didn 't spend a dime on independent expenditures for Lauren DESPITE spending $80 million on other candidates!**

Remember House Majority Leader Eric Cantor?

He was knocked out by Dave Brat, a conservative college professor who was backed by the TEA Party in 2014.

**The NRCC never spent a DIME on Brat and even LET HIM LOSE in 2018 to Democrat Abigail Spanberger by only 8,270 votes!**

Get the picture here?

The NRCC and RNC will use the hundreds of millions of dollars they collect from patriots like you to protect the establishment - **and that 's it!**

If you want to see a fighter like me in Congress - leading the charge in the HOSTILE TAKEOVER the GOP establishment - [**then you have to help get me there by donating to my campaign directly**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg).

By this coming Sunday, I have to raise $27,000 to get back on track for the month. [**Any amount you can chip in will help me claw away at that**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/AjQrrIN965GYqgn892ajiXCw/hzIxyJGxGLB8WzLpKVp2Dg), and I really appreciate anything that you can do.

Thanks so much for all that you do. I literally couldn't do it without you.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer
