name: Murray Huber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter, it’s nice
to meet you. I’m Murray, the Distributed Organizing Manager for the Booker
campaign.

As Distributed Organizing Manager, my number-one priority for this
campaign is to make sure that our campaign can reach as many Kentucky
voters as possible — from the hood to the holler. Mobilizing folks next
November to vote for Charles will require our team to build deep ties to
communities throughout the Commonwealth, and build trust.

We’re building the largest organizing team Kentucky has seen and we’ve
begun some of this exciting work already. But the truth is that in order
to reach voters in all 120 counties of Kentucky, we will need to bring in
significant resources.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11892?refcode=em20211026-1109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1109%2E346206%2E6_5mDe ]That is why I wanted to reach out to you today for a favor: Will you
chip in $12 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today so we can
keep this work up? I’ll share more details about our organizing
investments below.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11892?refcode=em20211026-1109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1109%2E346206%2E6_5mDe ]DONATE NOW →

To give you an idea of how much it costs to run some of the plans that we
have, here’s a quick overview by the numbers.

* $0.05: The price of reaching one voter in Kentucky. If you chip in
$15, we’ll be able to reach 300 Kentuckians. Even $1.50 allows us to
reach 30 Kentuckians who may have never heard of Charles Booker
before.
* $15.28: The price of funding one voter registration team. Each of our
voter registration teams get clipboards, pens, printed materials to
share with voters, and training from our organizing team.
* $47.59: The price of gas to drive 395 miles — from the furthest point
of Kentucky to the other. Our staff and volunteers will be doing a lot
of driving to reach every corner of Kentucky to do our organizing
work. Contributions from our grassroots team, of any amount, will
literally fuel our work.

This may seem like a lot,
Peter, and it is! That’s why
we’ve already begun our organizing, because listening to communities and
building trust takes time — and to do it right, we need the resources,
starting now.

What we are able to invest from today through the rest of 2021 will have a
huge impact on our success. So I have to ask one final time: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11892?refcode=em20211026-1109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1109%2E346206%2E6_5mDe ]Will you
please chip in $12 or whatever you can afford so we can fund our important
organizing work?

Thank you for being a part of this team and this movement,
Peter. I’m glad to have you on
our side as we fight for the Commonwealth that we love so much.

Together,

Murray Huber
Distributed Organizing Manager
Booker for Kentucky

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211026-1109-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1109_346206_6_5mDe&akid=1109%2E346206%2E6_5mDe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1109%2E346206%2E6_5mDe

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

As Distributed Organizing Manager, my number-one priority for this campaign is to make sure that our campaign can reach as many Kentucky voters as possible — from the hood to the holler. Mobilizing folks next November to vote for Charles will require our team to build deep ties to communities throughout the Commonwealth, and build trust. We’re building the largest organizing team Kentucky has seen and we’ve begun some of this exciting work already. But the truth is that in order to reach voters in all 120 counties of Kentucky, we will need to bring in significant resources. [ ]That is why I wanted to reach out to you today for a favor: Will you chip in $12 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today so we can keep this work up? I’ll share more details about our organizing investments below. [ ]DONATE NOW → To give you an idea of how much it costs to run some of the plans that we have, here’s a quick overview by the numbers. $0.05: The price of reaching one voter in Kentucky. If you chip in $15, we’ll be able to reach 300 Kentuckians. Even $1.50 allows us to reach 30 Kentuckians who may have never heard of Charles Booker before. $15.28: The price of funding one voter registration team. Each of our voter registration teams get clipboards, pens, printed materials to share with voters, and training from our organizing team. * $47.59: The price of gas to drive 395 miles — from the furthest point of Kentucky to the other. body:
WE ARE EXCITED!!! We are super excited about our first fundraising dinner for the campaign. As you know this is our first rodeo when it comes to runn

# **WE ARE EXCITED!!!**
**We are super excited about our first fundraising dinner for the campaign**. As you know this is our first rodeo when it comes to running for public office and we have certainly learned many things along the way.
One thing our team of political strategists and analyst have constantly said is we must raise money. Winning is a money game and we have brought in some of the brightest minds in California to **help us win** , but we need to put the money behind it.
In the beginning we thought we would have to raise 5million, but come to find out we only need to raise $500,000. That's a big difference and I think it is completely possible.
If the church can raise millions for personal jets and buildings we use once a week, we should be able to raise $500,000 to help save this country. Some of you will be able to come because you are local and others can not make it.
I would ask that you purchase at minimum 1 virtual ticket to be a part of this history making movement. We are projected to be the clear choice in the primary and then on to slay the dragon in the general election.
You can be a part of that! You will see that you have several different ways to help.
You can be a **Host** ****at $2,900 and receive 4 tickets, special seating, and special recognition.
You can **Sponsor** the event at $1,000 and receive 2 tickets, special seating and special recognition.
You can be at the **Friends of Derrick table** for $500 with 1 ticket, special seating and special recognition.
And you can also help by simply grabbing a general admission ticket for $100.
Please don't let the numbers chase you away, every amount counts in this fight!!! Maybe you can give a large amount and maybe you can give something lower, every dollar adds up in the fight as we build the war chest to take down the dragon. We love you all and you all are part of this battle right along with us!
**CLICK THIS LINK FOR OUR OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN GIVING LINKS. THEN CLICK ON FUNDRAISER**
[www.officialderrickgates.com](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=117.3.1.7027566c00913306e4b8489dfb7d9473)
**Love you all,**
**Derrick & Nena**
|
---
|
---

subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:

I'll get straight to it folks --

We’ve got a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline right around the
corner. And the stakes couldn’t be higher since we’ve been called 2022’s
most important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5666?t=1007&akid=1249%2E3611125%2E4FC69k ]Before I go any further -- can you chip in $25 or more to help us win
the race that will determine Senate control? Whether or not we’ll have the
resources to take on our opponents comes down to you:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5666?t=1008&akid=1249%2E3611125%2E4FC69k ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5667?t=1009&akid=1249%2E3611125%2E4FC69k ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5668?t=1010&akid=1249%2E3611125%2E4FC69k ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5669?t=1011&akid=1249%2E3611125%2E4FC69k ]Donate $200

My far-right GOP opponents are backed by billionaire-funded super PACs and
big dollar donors who want the gavel back in Mitch McConnell’s hands.

McConnell and his cronies won’t do a damn thing to help the working class.
The only way we’ll cut workers in on the deal is by expanding the
Democratic majority -- and folks, that hinges on what happens here in
Ohio.

I’m depending on our grassroots supporters to help us meet our
end-of-month goal so we can compete with the GOP fundraising machine and
flip this seat blue -- the Senate depends on it.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5666?t=1012&akid=1249%2E3611125%2E4FC69k ]Can I count on you to chip in to ensure we meet our $50,000
end-of-month goal and expand the Senate majority?

Tim

name: Major Trump Notification (via NRSC)
subject: re: Trump Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

We’re counting down the hours until Election Day, Derek, and let’s just say, there aren’t many left.

Every hour between now and next Tuesday is an opportunity to turn out more voters, and Derek, we’re doing the math, and at our current rate, we just aren’t going to turn out enough Democrats to win up and down the ballot on November 2nd.

Tonight is our one-week out deadline, and we REALLY need to hit this goal, or we just won’t have the resources we need to keep Virginia blue.

**_With Trumpism on the move in Virginia, that just isn’t acceptable._**

[**Will you donate right this minute to help ensure we hit our midnight goal, turn out strong Democrats, and defeat Trumpism?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCYssUCAPEQFoXiToHt9RZAnbFZ9rRiVlfaXqrp9xTA4pdDh3IdWiPPY0CkazcDiUjKP0cQS3-0mTqtVIKOZAwPZIPi2gWG3BMgGHskFVsDGM5Yl8VFYLRr0SCLKFUOgKdEQC1hSgbHVVLNk8c-D8d0WWx3FJu4aLcY4EXloPV-iu-2Cr3sEKjhSKU9CWYhxWvG6jzJSpOgmoq6ASsqLyDJSNskW6LfvlzZXxnXE6yqUmNlIbh7KAIxT9Y8ZNSddj-U5hjiXtNGbLBoO92FLF0U/3gh/dgiII6COQKSzMAlWHUGI3g/h1/Dpz8DZwZnxGfH_2ZDJ1SJFml1R7amwY7_1sVUxkx8jA) **[ Donate $15 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCYssUCAPEQFoXiToHt9RZBRlNmPg6RP4591LqjA4VIzwm-ffB5j5ciCk3Qa8oZVT_pttHg0i508jTL3wV2tcIOpqL_E-x5AoI8dcVOutefQkGw1b7rOxBUfyMf8JgxsjFOyj2THriUhQREOu8eVP0uo_HXYmIc4Xd3MRLuoxebui63c6VIvJmdGERtobDS5eYObufNb0lCk--r2fldftc-I84qmFEcXS5KKm2RcRzqFmR55EbgyW2sWYtUQBjmH4q1Pw4Bu3o3k3JaMVnTLbHRNDgJFXTp_vE3BiFcjmyOb/3gh/dgiII6COQKSzMAlWHUGI3g/h2/FWzwDRT3u5JRSOGFKHB_f0Dho2BFQGU_iOPqL3G2xBY)

Not only is the Virginia Governor up for election, but so is the House of Delegates, the Lieutenant Governor, AND the Attorney General.

If extremist Republicans win, they’ll be that much closer to banning abortion in Virginia, to restricting access to health care, to putting more guns on our streets.

Derek, we know what happens when extremist Republicans take control -- we see it in Florida, we see it in Texas. We can’t let it happen here in Virginia

[**Please, donate right now to ensure that we can reach as many voters as possible over the final week of this election.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCYssUCAPEQFoXiToHt9RZCyDkyRtPLKVy3iQTCwhGzd76bbWXmEONTpqQUavArSBBc63JncObwBR6KbGoxlJBLAPzLg87sxRH0InjBOGy5Xn3ckx1LS3e-a8SmzCALNF1QbDj-oa2ZyVMDUj_RCWsMdi77e9STJTgG8CmqMSA5JcY40Op3EaaXQrIXHaX_dmQvV-JdEr-bPiCxEi-cgjKYa7XwClxN650V9NSQzKrcg1RLjyieBUptSYMvytYDWMSuftrcfZJLkcG5fnyhcMvc/3gh/dgiII6COQKSzMAlWHUGI3g/h6/NcbeVFwKvDbpnTW4N95S9zGERGTwMf4n_ubw-kjB-RU)

body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
My team at the DCCC has our path to victory mapped out, and senior leadership at the DCCC is ready to share it with you -- so we're holding a special Zoom Briefing for all our Majority Makers who are ready to support my House Democrats in this fight.

**I 'm so excited for you to hear from the DCCC's senior leadership on their plans to fight voter suppression, engage voters of color, and combat Republican gerrymandering.**

**[So, will you chip in a monthly recurring $5 now to join my Majority Makers and attend our special Zoom Briefing on November 8 at 7pm EST?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**

Majority Makers will also receive exclusive updates about the state of our races, a personalized member card to show their leadership in this fight, and opportunities to hear directly from me and other Democratic leaders. | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cvKLv_)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
MAJORITY MAKER STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $5](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_)

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45841545&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjg4MTYwMwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45841545&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjg4MTYwMwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

| | you deserve a living wage and a governor who will fightfor us all! The time is now! our survival is on the line.We have only 7 days to break free of the oppressive Duopolyand vote in the only candidate who will put people overprofit and politics. Please jump onboard and answer our Very Urgent Call To Action:
---
| |
---
| |
* Get knocking! Need flyers? Email or DM us ASAP and we will drop some in the mail to you. Live in Richmond? Even better, we have drop-off and pick-up options. Hit us up! Email: contact@princessblanding.com
* Mobilize people to the polls! Help get as many of your community members to the polls as you can, bring people with you to vote! (Carpool, ride-share)
* Help out on Nov. 2! We need you! Drop your details and location in our [Volunteer Google Doc](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/9bNozFwZp/c?w=0DnDOhdDODy7-sFlbV7ndzZlU23dx6Js4Uha_2vjS-E.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vc3ByZWFkc2hlZXRzL2QvMVc4UWNqV1phQjZJY3o0eHlJeFRhd3Z5ei1Qa3A4MER0ekdpdENiNHpfQVkvZWRpdD91c3A9c2hhcmluZyIsInIiOiJhM2Q4NWZlMy04YjY0LTQzNDUtN2JmZi1lMDUzMjc2ZjU2YWUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI5YTUxZThhNy02ZGMzLTQ5NzMtOWI4Ny0wYzBiOGZhYTY1NmIifQ) and we will get you what you need to be at the polls
* Spread the word! Don’t feel comfortable knocking doors? No worries! Text/Call/DM friends/family/coworkers and let them know there is a candidate who is for the people on the ballot! (See message to copy & paste below)
* Send people to our website: [www.princessblanding.com](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/9bNozFwZp/c?w=4VRh8YSZZU05MYn5FkvfjEaN8xukZuwZPgO32Mky1-w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5wcmluY2Vzc2JsYW5kaW5nLmNvbSIsInIiOiJhM2Q4NWZlMy04YjY0LTQzNDUtN2JmZi1lMDUzMjc2ZjU2YWUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI5YTUxZThhNy02ZGMzLTQ5NzMtOWI4Ny0wYzBiOGZhYTY1NmIifQ)
* Share this article: [Princess Blanding aims to make history with candidacy for Virginia’s governor](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/9bNozFwZp/c?w=uduDGFUetcm4DCaakO1Guei-ABHoNv8ReRld1m5q1j0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92cG0ub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvMjYyOTgvcHJpbmNlc3MtYmxhbmRpbmctYWltcy10by1tYWtlLWhpc3Rvcnktd2l0aC1jYW5kaWRhY3ktZm9yLXZpcmdpbmlhcy1nb3Zlcm5vciIsInIiOiJhM2Q4NWZlMy04YjY0LTQzNDUtN2JmZi1lMDUzMjc2ZjU2YWUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI5YTUxZThhNy02ZGMzLTQ5NzMtOWI4Ny0wYzBiOGZhYTY1NmIifQ)

Please head to the polls today and bring as many people with you as you can to vote for Candidate for VA Governor, Princess Blanding. She is also the only candidate who is fighting to ensure that liberation is a human right, not a privilege for all Virginians. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: have a quick question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Do you want to have dinner with my father?
Hey Peter -- this is Don Jr. with a quick question for you:
[**Do you want to have dinner with my father? Respond now >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616796:JdNwR32NE:m:1:3253819041:0E386E290564BFEF81D5F781BDB28831:r)
Because of your tremendous support for our America first movement, you've been flagged as one of the most dedicated members of our grassroots network.
_As a thank you, House Republicans are offering up the trip of a lifetime: **dinner with President Donald J. Trump!**_
[**They 'll cover dinner AND the flight AND the hotel -- the only catch is you must respond TONIGHT BEFORE MIDNIGHT.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616796:JdNwR32NE:m:1:3253819041:0E386E290564BFEF81D5F781BDB28831:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616796:JdNwR32NE:m:1:3253819041:0E386E290564BFEF81D5F781BDB28831:r)
******[RESPOND NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616796:JdNwR32NE:m:1:3253819041:0E386E290564BFEF81D5F781BDB28831:r)******
I can assure you this will truly be an unforgettable experience.
Trust me, you WON'T want to miss it.
[**You still have a few more hours to respond. After that, you 'll miss your shot to have dinner with my father. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58616796:JdNwR32NE:m:1:3253819041:0E386E290564BFEF81D5F781BDB28831:r)
I'm so grateful to have strong supporters like YOU on our side.
_\-- Donald Trump Jr._
